Fellow Conservative, For the sake of Texas and America, I urge you to read the update below. **It has been revealed that, Colin Allred, the Democrat running against me in my Senate race, has supported a Dallas-based organization that hosts _drag shows for children_ – and promotes gender transitions and genital mutilation to minors under 18.** Rep. Allred even used his position in the U.S. House of Representatives to help the organization receive $1 million in federal taxpayer money. This is wrong. _Fellow Conservative, this does NOT represent the values of Texas Republicans, independents, and even the vast majority of Democrats in our state and our Nation. _ It’s WOKE INSANITY that borders on outright child abuse. _**If you believe our values are worth fighting for, make a generous contribution to help me DEFEAT far-left extremist Colin Allred and PROTECT our children from name: Team AOC
subject: Are you on other political email lists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Are you on other political email lists?
If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money. Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM machine. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating.
It’s bad, and getting worse. **Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect.** Here’s what we believe:
\- Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action.
\- Instead of guilt-tripping you for not donating enough, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative, educational content.
\- Instead of misleading you about fake 5X matches or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help.
\- Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it.
**But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have fundraising goals and deadlines.** Everything we raise each quarter is detailed in our public FEC report, and we want to post the biggest possible fundraising numbers. But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your donations to AOC are important and meaningful.
[Would you be able to make a $5 contribution to help us reach our October fundraising goal? Every single donation will truly make a difference. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231011.u7Sj_V&refcode=em20231011-5126-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231011.u7Sj_V&refcode=em20231011-5126-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)**
If you can’t make a donation today, that’s okay too. We still want you here, and we still appreciate you reading our emails.
The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because you’re here, with so many others. It’s powerful because when so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change.
So, maybe you can’t [donate right now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231011.u7Sj_V&refcode=em20231011-5126-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H) But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road.
No matter what, we’re glad you’re here. Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231011?refcode=em20231011-5126-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=22&refcode2=5126_2526796_DNMt-H&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231011-5126-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=23&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=5126%2E2526796%2EDNMt-H)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Patriot,

---
Red-blooded Americans have reported feeling overwhelming feelings of patriotism upon taking the first sip of their morning coffee from their Never Surrender Coffee Mug.
---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=ebda06340e674b9484b36bee4f0b8b69&_e=rVtGJ0Fzq59gCkZoKXT30Qxnfm9Wee3vryUORufx721MATpHFh44ayf_S8hMwHAE1gOpgwbKKdg7rzNzj-7fFPg0KcHGLuQrcFhSHwOPf8gDD1EdggS-Rn_1IFxGaOKJF8XUgXmWVVDoDhisQ4B1S4wioj9Gn3pz7ZUra9t4AHE90VlK8dfYxchZsDSCx0wp1n6m8ey7Ud875sb9PQ69g4IxuilpWIIhSuB2wes2bX1tafJI9r7Ip_6abDImsXnjFBb_Eu07MnOfRd0A7tMBXFdV067JgCTCKhHFofRKwnijUa7uEu6c2HKcVYHpZ1ODwsbJwcMQEM03pIIU6VjAhPQEGKT8cYb_IpNhwZ46GJtRP1Z2PFZ39hRJoFJmUkK41AnwbIulaEgkVIDdC0AtQH9GKGv7nDVWUfL34-YwP0KoHOZqS-vDdIMqajx7j3HXIGWLKEpsAo6xKugC8T0eYdGnqlT2uIhRDItklwu0lZtAClWRKqwk8JBj3lGIsF3E)
---
But, we must confess: _it won’t work for everyone._
---
There is simply not enough coffee in the world to wake up Crooked Joe from his deep mental slumber or to motivate him to finally care about the citizens of our country.
---
But a patriot like you will certainly feel the immediate desire to save America and NEVER SURRENDER our country to the very dark forces who seek to destroy it.
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, I have GREAT news! We received over 4,004 contributions from patriots like you last month. And the average contribution was $28.27 - which means the vast majority of that money is from grassroots conservatives. This is absolutely incredible news for our team. We’re so excited with all the momentum we’ve built - but we can’t stop yet. Our opponents showed MAJOR fundraising numbers last quarter, and if we’re going to defend this seat, we need to keep our foot on the gas. -- We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: if we lose this seat, we lose our opportunity to take back the Senate. Josh has been a fearless champion of conservative values, and losing his voice in the Senate would be absolutely detrimental to our movement. We’ve seen how much damage Democrats have done with their majority so far - I don’t want to risk seeing what else they’ll do if they take Missouri. Thank you, Tyler Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: The Ohio Dems
subject: Shouldn’t your elected officials look out for you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Frank LaRose only cares about his own political ambitions.
|
Team, Frank LaRose prioritizes one thing and one thing only: Himself. Instead of looking out for Ohioans, LaRose is spending his time in the Secretary of State’s Office planning his Senate campaign. Shouldn’t our elected officials be focusing on addressing the needs of the people they represent? Not according to Frank! He’s yet again putting his own political ambitions ahead of Ohioans, all while making them foot the bill – if you missed it, **he recently moved his official office to the same building as his campaign headquarters,_costing taxpayers $600,000._** He shouldn't be ignoring the voices of Ohioans shouting at him for change, and he certainly shouldn’t be ignoring the majority of Ohioans telling him we support reproductive rights. But, here we are, fighting tooth and nail to stop him from passing an abortion ban next month. **[If you’re tired of Frank LaRose only looking out for himself, chip in $5 today to help us hold him accountable and protect access to abortion.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71421467/432058235/-470668383?refcode=odp_em_231011_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGE1M2EwZC05NjY4LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rekRQw-AdAUdSjxiWLZ3oaLZGw95pNJjq5YGoHrL1ms=)** Right now he’s putting our reproductive freedom on the line, and what’s next? If we don’t stop him from winning this Senate seat in 2024, he could be the deciding vote on a national abortion ban, or vote to strip away Social Security, Medicare, and more. There’s no doubt in our minds that LaRose will always put his career above you. The proof is in the pudding. ****[Help us elect leaders who look out for you by donating anything you can today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71421468/432058236/-470668383?refcode=odp_em_231011_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGE1M2EwZC05NjY4LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rekRQw-AdAUdSjxiWLZ3oaLZGw95pNJjq5YGoHrL1ms=)**** Thank you, The Ohio Dems ** ** | ****A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Over the past 8 years, I’ve worked hard to listen to the people of Louisiana, and to find solutions to public policy that benefit us all.
_Like improving access to quality education..._
_Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our southern border..._
_Like securing the resources Louisiana needs to aid disaster recovery efforts..._
And most of all – protecting and defending your Constitutional Rights as set forth by our Founding Fathers.
I don’t find any of the above controversial – I just see it as putting YOU first, Friend.
If you feel the same, then I hope you’ll take me up on my offer and join my team of 2023 Sustaining Members – it sure would mean a lot to me.

clean_body: | | | | Intended Recipient Only: Please do not forward this message or otherwise share| Friend, Down here in Louisiana, we don’t always do what’s popular, trendy, or what everyone else wants us to do... But we always do what’s right. Which is why today, I would like to personally invite you to join my exclusive team of October Sustaining Members – it will go a long way in helping me fight for Louisiana values in the Senate. | | | | | Over the past 8 years, I’ve worked hard to listen to the people of Louisiana, and to find solutions to public policy that benefit us all. Like improving access to quality education... Like prioritizing American Citizens by securing our southern border... Like securing the resources Louisiana needs to aid disaster recovery efforts... And most of all – protecting and defending your Constitutional Rights as set forth by our Founding Fathers. I don’t find any of the above controversial – I just see it as putting YOU first, Friend. If you feel the same, then I hope you’ll take me up on my offer and join my team of 2023 Sustaining Members – it sure would mean a lot to me. Thank you, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \-

body:
I’ll keep it real with you, folks – things aren’t great right now.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=8b8473bd6e634e4dbfce2a65e700ef4e&_e=wj9ivq4fvDX8Hq7us61tq7ZEQ2ZaAa0LA7Po9JMO2SuZNAjycVkBDYuOMgyDx6ZP4EgEQwpyvL4jJFJMU0o3Pyf9OHH2_S9PDGlkKX2SplOCNkqIwOjsm7efYUG0ffScjo5v5UriRoBWukjKbHbNUWwVdTO8udepP0KTWPHCk7HfOzMh0QPOV-_QQ0AWzTu5BurybgekW1Y9ikNJDv6Mpz0yoBz7mu0kFFNv5xpopMpZNqC4mSZmtI5XCt2H-77xpvy7WGhY7q5ScR2DgNmhkhLiARWtpeCYeZfDOirnYhWyO58wX8UTTNKvL5mJWKyzLUjAmjug8Caull9bgSkuYJtHxpztvltkHfHXKY1-TxR1GGnEMGLXfTNs97Cazl2jIGY591AFDRaOKKoO8K-dqQ%3D%3D) I’ll keep it real with you, folks – things aren’t great right now. There is a new war in Israel and in Gaza. There are ongoing wars in Ukraine and Azerbaijan. And here at home, we barely funded our government for 45 days, and we still don’t have a Speaker of the House. It’s exhausting and disheartening. And it makes a lot of folks lose hope in the efficacy of government. But that’s why I believe it’s so important that we win this race and restore Houe leadership to Democrats. Under a Democratic House, Senate, and White House, the American people actually saw real results, and things were one hundred percent less chaotic and exhausting than they are now. And we need to get back to that. **[So help me win this race, flip the House, and return our government and country to sanity by chipping in $10 or $20 to my campaign.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=8b8473bd6e634e4dbfce2a65e700ef4e&_e=wj9ivq4fvDX8Hq7us61tq7ZEQ2ZaAa0LA7Po9JMO2SuZNAjycVkBDYuOMgyDx6ZP4EgEQwpyvL4jJFJMU0o3Pyf9OHH2_S9PDGlkKX2SplOCNkqIwOjsm7efYUG0ffScjo5v5UriRoBWukjKbHbNUWwVdTO8udepP0KTWPHCk7HfOzMh0QPOV-_QQ0AWzTu5BurybgekW1Y9ikNJDv6Mpz0yoBz7mu0kFFNv5xpopMpZNqC4mSZmtI5XCt2H-77xtL6AbAoAUKpYTrUBB_uPkgL0Kagj9tlyoGWlE5CXvT_RlGUn8cHnUjYgB40Ok7nEpJwMyJIFd2SzUENDjr7zb3GuQ2q5HI9ihD1_xJibpOH6JTjy9IaS-1iRy79Eo5PJDvRzIzhmK446XHNd-DItFA%3D%3D)** As your Congressman, my job will be to fight for you and to represent your interests to the best of my ability. And that simply isn’t happening right now under Ken Buck. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to an October 26, 2023 reception at the Mar-A-Lago Club consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; (v) two (2) limited edition Trump 2024 hats signed by President Donald J. Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $8,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: John Eastman
subject: Prosecuted for giving President Trump Legal Advice....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | | **[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlq8qf3abkrni12vnqtvsm8ofgi3j5ki84su8n5o_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvoce6vd1hjovilrqlsogqavd9taed60ckdi8180_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9if89bgd8ms1v87nnnrp7f39s541spoldqgagng_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsdi20o616jnkk7ahn0o6f446b3or0dqmj6vafsg_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z41s7u8n8m9o961657f3hnidtnvqubov3ujpbmh0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
---
**[DONATE $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9vqvp0jj3f4uqutiavdlvhtq03un62k8okg36f8_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z12ousqci2qr408ie14po3du3h4fb0dq9rukvfu0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1frg61ro6q38m92au6r47raqjsihp1s62k8pbfo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zflksmmt389ebh8vv8l5p15fjs3pq261aqvb95k8_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmhe8mh7g66gcpmsa376d8ae9m1ennjfchb345o_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[DONATE $1,000 or more](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6objgglkk26va1jh8qjf0on2tl5mdno80a0o5jg_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf53nvsqaig45ggghp5b1tlqeede4n94jsnt6k2g_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4smgc1k18h26um4j7f51k0moio2s564lcpjvl6g_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z85s96n3ql4er40jsmmss18s4dfada2sq53gk71g_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjdi42mtkhu7vrihj54cpq9ra12igm30d3g9rak8_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**. The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.
| | **[I'll help by donating $15](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcs0h3itf2end6h83c9qvc6mi8ojucgehdf0blqo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
---
**[I'll help by donating $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z890pc9re1l9500jspi63ktmtkr2ksbn1fimk8oo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhbbuee9adtq03d75ivl2ahinuvncvhds9vsd7ag_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[l'll help by donating $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcjm3klith9jc6n2vquvprn8ulls61in76n49bi8_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7uivdeurftmoilr74nq119b65pugoeeb348seeo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**
**[I'll help by donating $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0fsrgaip9l1mmjh1vur2mgjb38k3aaj5mga1s40_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg68oj6chh2bs)**

| | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers.
---
| | | Sincerely,
---
John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump

clean_body: The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, | | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer. This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: we're gonna need a bigger boat
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Right now, _Students for Life Action_ is on a roll, but without your support, I’m afraid it won’t last...

You see, our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour is making major headway in exposing the extreme views of radical pro-abortion politicians like President Joe Biden.

And now, it’s headed to two more states!

This weekend, on October 14th, we’ll be stopping in Charleston, South Carolina to continue targeting Joe Biden’s abortion-on-demand policy, but also to expose his favorite weak-kneed Republican, U.S. Rep. Nancy Mace (R-SC), and several GOP sellouts who killed the South Carolina _Life at Conception Act_ in the State Senate.

But with so much going on, and young people flocking to the pro-life cause with every state we visit, we’ve had to **_double up_** on our stops to make sure every pro-life and on-the-fence voter hears our message in time for election season!

So, on October 14th, we’ll also be in Lexington, Kentucky, and we’ll be holding a crucial _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop_ to train the next generation of pro-life leaders.

**[So, would you please reconsider a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to _Students for Life Action_ to help keep our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour on the road and continue training grassroots pro-lifers](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-ssuidl-duchtdja-y/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, these tour stops and _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshops_ are both so important because each one of them takes place in an area where we believe pro-life activists can make the most impact possible.

With the ever-increasing radicalism of the Abortion Lobby, many formerly pro-abortion and on-the-fence young people are becoming disenfranchised by their extremism.

And our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour is just the push they need to ditch the disconnected agenda of politicians like President Joe Biden and give the pro-life movement a look.

But now the success of our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour has posed a unique problem – **_we’re being flooded with support!_**

Sure, young people turning to the pro-life movement in droves is a pretty darn good problem to have!

But with our growth in popularity and our tour stops growing in frequency, we’ll need a much bigger boat if we’re going to carry our ever-growing movement forward!

It would be nice if I could just snap my fingers and have dozens of tour stops, _Political Leadership Workshops,_ and voter-engagement programs in every state across the country all at once, but that kind of outreach doesn’t just appear.

_You have to work hard for it._

The best I can hope to do is put my own heart and soul into fighting for the human rights issues of our time, and then humbly ask good folks like you for your generous support when the going gets tough.

And right now is one of those times.

**[So, could you please make your most generous contribution right away to help me keep our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour on the road and continue training grassroots pro-lifers](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-ssuidl-duchtdja-j/)?**

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – Pro-Life Friend, we have no shortage of manpower for our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour, but this increase in demand has put a strain on how much we can afford to do – _I’m afraid we might not be able to reach all the voters pro-lifers need to secure 2024 as a sweeping victory._

**[So, would you please reconsider a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to _Students for Life Action_ to help keep our _“Stop Abortion Extremism”_ National Tour on the road and continue training grassroots pro-lifers](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-ssuidl-duchtdja-i/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-ssuidl-026154D2-duchtdja-d) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-ssuidl-duchtdja-h/)
**

**
---

| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpv449ejo273op4le8vobhssnuhhdgf05jhv6h88_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg62o75c1h2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**

| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5i6bb9qsng9fk5ta3qo4edrddsl965ehhqusitg_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg62o75c1h2bs)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqf46k1l9b2tqnmcs3fc2ha8daf7rr2bposj5obo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg62o75c1h2bs)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.

As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu7cuohskn9budvpjbi78ccp55g8j7feerd9640g_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg62o75c1h2bs)**. name: John James
subject: No room for error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc
body:
There's no room for error when you’re in a combat zone.

| | | Friend, **There's no room for error when you 're in a combat zone. **

You can't give half-effort. You can't afford to be skeptical of your fellow soldiers. You have to be laser-focused on the mission because it's not just your life that's on the line - it's your whole team's.

My name is John James. I flew Apache Helicopters in some of the most dangerous combat zones in the world. And even though my feet are now firmly on the ground, I still take the same work ethic and dedication I took to my missions in the air to my mission in Congress.

**America 's combat veterans get the job done because we don't know what it's like to _not_ give 110% to everything we do. **

_But we also know that no great mission can be achieved alone._

Right now, I'm in one of the hardest fights of my life. Last year, my Congressional race was one of the closest in the country. **I won by less than 1% of the total vote.**_This year, it could be even closer._

The road to defending our House majority runs right through this district, and I'm counting on my team at this critical moment.

**[Can you pitch in now and help us defend this district for Republicans and hold onto our House majority?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm8sfvsmq6aqdikaa26c5vo6e427kivht2gfvhbo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg62o75c1h2bs)**

clean_body: There's no room for error when you’re in a combat zone. | | | Friend, There's no room for error when you 're in a combat zone. You can't give half-effort. You can't afford to be skeptical of your fellow soldiers. You have to be laser-focused on the mission because it's not just your life that's on the line - it's your whole team's. My name is John James. I flew Apache Helicopters in some of the most dangerous combat zones in the world. And even though my feet are now firmly on the ground, I still take the same work ethic and dedication I took to my missions in the air to my mission in Congress. America 's combat veterans get the job done because we don't know what it's like to not give 110% to everything we do. But we also know that no great mission can be achieved alone. Right now, I'm in one of the hardest fights of my life. Last year, my Congressional race was one of the closest in the country. I won by less than 1% of the total vote.This year, it could be even closer. The road to defending our House majority runs right through this district, and I'm counting on my team at this critical moment. Today's Democrats aren't just failing America's veterans; they're failing ALL Americans. Our country needs leaders who understand that freedom isn't free - it's something we need to work for every single day. I know what it 's like to put America's needs before my own, and that's something I've never backed down from. But if we 're going to continue our mission, I need all the help I can get from my support on the ground - and that means YOU, Friend. Thank you, John James | | | | Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc. "" John James for Congress P.O. name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670691%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QGsXxoQyXAsW622f%2b%2fiJBg&sysid=1)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670692%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WoKgXp92Q3ehO%2bBFAOfWYA&sysid=1)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670693%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=16VTYXB9KdCGNJUZKsUu7Q&sysid=1)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670693%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=16VTYXB9KdCGNJUZKsUu7Q&sysid=1)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7c744e5775192db3fba4a7299ee45911bb23c6437d5affcfd60a92512caff40998ec8eda473b63600bf141dfaae3abf8ba5deddb99601892d14867b03759d4c27874354085003f7873bf6c2733fcfe02

Friend,

I’m sick of having to worry about this. I’m talking to voters and hearing stories of being mugged and stabbed and having their cars broken into. What happened to law and order in this country? Why have our streets become a free for all?

Because Joe Biden and his woke mob have bullied cities into defunding the police and letting crime run rampant so they don’t offend anyone by putting criminals behind bars. I can promise you, we will put an end to this immediately and no one has the record to assure you of that but me.

Accountability has been STRIPPED from law enforcement and leadership. Even in Florida, we had a prosecutor and state attorney who wanted to pick and choose which criminals were brought to justice based on what laws they agree with. We did not let that stand. I swiftly removed these corrupt leftist activists from breaching their duty, and I wouldn’t hesitate to fire anyone else standing in the way of protecting public safety.

We will never be weak when it comes to upholding the law and holding people accountable for criminal misconduct. That should apply EVERYWHERE across this country, and I am humbly asking for your support to make this happen.

I will never let our streets look the way they do in California. This country’s decline is being accelerated by allowing riot and disorder to prevail over law and order. No more. I am proud to back the blue.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuh4fgp69jhl99a094oqlr8q9j4m65lkm7vkdk50_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg61ob6c5h2bs)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg6j774e0b012q44mevqi8cdv99b3sp2angjg6s0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg61ob6c5h2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zerjfuq1uc7tgd8u2gvcf9p56s32pvebei337g88_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg61ob6c5h2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvq4ip42icdup7k1gg0d2imrb9tq8mpnf3e6j01g_rp22sh2s8i66p77chg61ob6c5h2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: John Eastman
subject: OUTRAGEOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

Dear Friend,

The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election.

The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.

Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1 Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense.

Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court.

This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs.

All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.

DONATE $15 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24913%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5AHngiB0p8qmC%2fXzhdKVhw&sysid=1

DONATE $25 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24914%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W5l7cEJTp9Jxl2yTrdAcsw&sysid=1

DONATE $50 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24925%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tvgKAypNLLQ2F64RQGkiig&sysid=1

DONATE $100 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24926%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ChrYA6skIFTGt17KhKVavw&sysid=1

DONATE $250 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24927%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PS2E3Zx%2fnd2OI7SbN396kw&sysid=1

DONATE $500 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24928%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A6BB7yvPN5KfO%2fkOWOmVgQ&sysid=1

DONATE $1,000 or more https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24929%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mU7s1cBSuNcLU8XQCm%2f2Zg&sysid=1

Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me:

Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes.

Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.

https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office!

Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted.

For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters.

Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.

Help Me Fight These False Charges https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1 Help Me Fight These False Charges https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities.

I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there.

In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.

Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1 Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1

As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges.

The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will have my back https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qMyPH6%2f29kz4fcN078JVQQ&sysid=1 .

The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.

I'll help by donating $15 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24913%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5AHngiB0p8qmC%2fXzhdKVhw&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $25 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24914%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W5l7cEJTp9Jxl2yTrdAcsw&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $50 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24925%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tvgKAypNLLQ2F64RQGkiig&sysid=1

l'll help by donating $100 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24926%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ChrYA6skIFTGt17KhKVavw&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $250 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24927%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PS2E3Zx%2fnd2OI7SbN396kw&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $500 https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24928%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A6BB7yvPN5KfO%2fkOWOmVgQ&sysid=1

I'll help by donating $1,000 or more https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24929%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mU7s1cBSuNcLU8XQCm%2f2Zg&sysid=1

Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers.

Sincerely,

John Eastman

Constitutional Scholar

Attorney for President Donald Trump

P.S. Contributions to my legal defense fund are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

| Maryland voters won't head to the polls to pick a new representative until next year, but the race for the 6th District seat set to be vacated by Rep. David Trone is growing. Jim Lokay talks to Democratic candidate Stephen McDow about why he's also working with the nascent Forward Party in the crowded race.

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: Replace Dina Titus and End Her Open Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Let's Put An End to Open Borders, Fentanyl, and Human Trafficking!
| | | |
---
# Dina Titus: Champion of Open Borders, Fentanyl, and Human Trafficking
---
The fentanyl crisis and human trafficking are two devastating issues that require strong leadership and decisive action. However, Titus's unwavering support for open borders makes these problems much worse, leaving our community vulnerable to devastating consequences. Titus continues to prioritize Biden's failed policies over the safety and well-being of Nevadans.
Fentanyl Crisis: The fentanyl crisis has reached epidemic proportions, claiming thousands of lives yearly. With synthetic opioids flooding our streets, it is evident that the uncontrolled flow of people across our borders has provided a gateway for drug traffickers. Titus's negligent and irresponsible refusal to acknowledge the link between porous borders and the ease of fentanyl smuggling is a dereliction of duty. It is time for her to retire!
Human Trafficking: Human trafficking is an appalling crime that preys on the vulnerable and marginalized. However, instead of addressing this grave issue head-on, Titus's support for open borders has facilitated human traffickers' operations. Nevada's First Congressional District, which she is supposed to represent, is one of the top locations in the world for human trafficking. Titus has brought shame and embarrassment to the people of her district. She has got to go!
Ignoring the Consequences: What is most concerning about Dina Titus's stance on open borders is her refusal to acknowledge the consequences of her policies. Instead of taking responsibility for the negative impact of uncontrolled immigration, she clings to idealistic visions of inclusivity and equity without considering the real-world implications. It is time to replace Titus!
Conclusion: Dina Titus's unwavering support for open borders has proven to be a grave disservice to the people of Nevada. Her refusal to acknowledge the link between porous borders and these issues demonstrates a failure of leadership and an alarming lack of concern for the safety and well-being of her constituents. We need new representation!
As your representative in Congress, I will make national security one of my top priorities. I will demand more robust border security and will provide law enforcement with the resources they need to keep us safe. I will put the welfare of Americans ahead of all other considerations. It is time for a change!
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: What will you do to support Veterans? -R.W. A. I understand the needs of our veterans. Both my parents were veterans. My son and I are veterans. (We deployed together to Iraq.) Each American owes an enormous debt of gratitude to the men and women who have served in uniform. I will work hard to make sure that we take care of those who took care of us!
Q. Mark, what is your position on abortion? -S.S. A. I'm pro-life; however, in Nevada, the abortion issue is settled by law. The people of Nevada voted to have limits, allowing abortion up to 24 weeks, and then for the life and health of the mother. This is not a federal issue. It is left to the States and the "people" to decide. I will not support any federal legislation that overturns the will of the people in Nevada. I support exceptions for rape, incest, and the life and health of the mother. On the other hand, Dina Titus completely ignored the will of Nevadans when she voted to remove all limits and then to have hard-working Nevadans pay for other people's abortions.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.

clean_body: Let's Put An End to Open Borders, Fentanyl, and Human Trafficking! | | | | Dina Titus: Champion of Open Borders, Fentanyl, and Human Trafficking The fentanyl crisis and human trafficking are two devastating issues that require strong leadership and decisive action. However, Titus's unwavering support for open borders makes these problems much worse, leaving our community vulnerable to devastating consequences. Titus continues to prioritize Biden's failed policies over the safety and well-being of Nevadans. Fentanyl Crisis: The fentanyl crisis has reached epidemic proportions, claiming thousands of lives yearly. With synthetic opioids flooding our streets, it is evident that the uncontrolled flow of people across our borders has provided a gateway for drug traffickers. Titus's negligent and irresponsible refusal to acknowledge the link between porous borders and the ease of fentanyl smuggling is a dereliction of duty. It is time for her to retire! Human Trafficking: Human trafficking is an appalling crime that preys on the vulnerable and marginalized. However, instead of addressing this grave issue head-on, Titus's support for open borders has facilitated human traffickers' operations. Nevada's First Congressional District, which she is supposed to represent, is one of the top locations in the world for human trafficking. Titus has brought shame and embarrassment to the people of her district. She has got to go! Ignoring the Consequences: What is most concerning about Dina Titus's stance on open borders is her refusal to acknowledge the consequences of her policies. Instead of taking responsibility for the negative impact of uncontrolled immigration, she clings to idealistic visions of inclusivity and equity without considering the real-world implications. It is time to replace Titus! Conclusion: Dina Titus's unwavering support for open borders has proven to be a grave disservice to the people of Nevada. Her refusal to acknowledge the link between porous borders and these issues demonstrates a failure of leadership and an alarming lack of concern for the safety and well-being of her constituents. We need new representation! As your representative in Congress, I will make national security one of my top priorities. I will demand more robust border security and will provide law enforcement with the resources they need to keep us safe. I will put the welfare of Americans ahead of all other considerations. It is time for a change! Your Questions--Mark's Answers Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently: Q: What will you do to support Veterans? -R.W. A. I understand the needs of our veterans. Both my parents were veterans. My son and I are veterans. (We deployed together to Iraq.) Each American owes an enormous debt of gratitude to the men and women who have served in uniform. I will work hard to make sure that we take care of those who took care of us! Q. Mark, what is your position on abortion? -S.S. A. I'm pro-life; however, in Nevada, the abortion issue is settled by law. The people of Nevada voted to have limits, allowing abortion up to 24 weeks, and then for the life and health of the mother. This is not a federal issue. It is left to the States and the "people" to decide. I will not support any federal legislation that overturns the will of the people in Nevada. I support exceptions for rape, incest, and the life and health of the mother. On the other hand, Dina Titus completely ignored the will of Nevadans when she voted to remove all limits and then to have hard-working Nevadans pay for other people's abortions. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == *Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

# THURSDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1492, a crew member aboard one of Christopher Columbus's ships, the _Pinta,_ sighted land--likely the island of _San Salvador_ in the Bahamas. If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, [you can do that here with one click.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1OwzAQAOCnsbdW5zs7P4MHpCoTYWWM4vicHDhJlZoi3h4hlkqwf9P32g_9KFm2-WVc2Ze0D-NU5M6DgZPBE9JgdfSJGZk0e1O1tTHOIunFU4gMwBhjlUJCdrXFhqY2GhOcS0GLR0AyYBBa56g5W7IYXBsgNG0KEygLHKXsx_ltl60snPLXfufjPO2rzn4p5XpT9KSwU9j9JQq7fpxlepbt_cdQx4ou8fopOcutqhU6C_M6Sv7V1UdZFV0s6MM_qAejy_8H3wEAAP__jvJcQA)

Want to comment on a story? Head over to our [Facebook page](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tuKyEUAL8GOq84B9hHQXEbOru6UsoVj4OXhDXWLjLK30dJ2vQzI83bdb26XPLjfnM7mZbq6kLLL1pBXAAvKFfFo0lESJKTgXGZALRCyTezjDAF74SPyWk9kY6zB9QYkw4AUfJsUKAEASgWreU8KKnQ68ULPy_JB8GUoJhbPYb3mh9to1Q-64uOIdSdF7O19jyZ_MfQMrS99yG5QL7Wj2-Aof2_kf01btRPhpYfJj57LiWf48SUuO8ul59a-3vuKwAA__9oQ1Ba). |
---
## **Scalise Secures Speaker Nomination**
In a 113 - 99 vote, Republican majority leader, [Steve Scalise secured the GOP nomination](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGn0QwLGmQwILjEbC690EJshr5FsYAZd95-azfe-E_--v7dl7ujRMfjr9vRtpAX5xu9cBGcCWAgF9VvNiACyh6t0NNNiFGB7KMVoIzGCZQxk0LvON9AG9BBSzSobz1Z4CAFF8CncZRmUFLBOk4rX80UVs87xXGjlsvwP9PRIob0zi8sg897n2xs7ayd_NPB3MF8XdcQ8ueBV_3uHcxnTtTI1w7mmJ8VWcHzuSby7qjMx5wrsupdoorMVdYiUmHeHRttriELubB6ovvAwlxoWNjuvSstvivLz9qw9MVu50UpUdW3TvHH7ij9zLXfrb4CAAD___4Ibj4) for Speaker of the House during a secret ballot election yesterday afternoon. Scalise beat out Trump-endorsed Judiciary Committee Chairman, Jim Jordan for the party's support. After the election, several of Jordan's backers claimed they would not vote for Scalise in the final vote, prompting [Republicans to call a recess](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D9vwyAQBfBPAxsRHIf_DAxdvKVrRwuTc3wtNpYhifrtK2fu9qSnp5_0vq7jNXDi7f4ZVvJ1zmOIlZ80Gq0MKLAjypufiYCsJG-avjXGIVi5-Dmgaea2axpjNbpeT9gi2kidbp2LRrIHDdZoA7p3znYXtAiT6yc9df08RS1Q041rPi7fmbe60Jx-85OOS8yrTH6pdS_CfggYBAx1oYVTOjsBw5JX2uhV3vFRSMCAgD2iUQftjylxDFtRW155C5VU2Sn80KESP0nFEwn3cyQPf9tfnBKXphWo72vgtyHr_3f8BQAA___F3GB7) as they look to secure the votes needed to proceed with their pick. Currently, the House is split 221 - 212, making it difficult for the GOP to secure the 217 votes needed for a majority decision. Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH), who many thought would be the GOP pick, has [offered to nominate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OrSAURp8GOgxswJ-C4jZ257ZTGsTtcTsoRojOvP3Eqaf5mi9ZK1kfr-HlKdL-_u83dGVOgw-FLhyUFAoE6MHwyc2IgJqjU3XXKGUNaL44nHwNYH0HEEJAo2yLY6gVtNpAUxtODiRoJRXIzlrdVkYbGG03yrHt5jFIZiROVNJZrYn2suAcv9OFZxXSxqNbSjky0_8Y9Az6-74r_0UpPy-D_mEz6JV8RjHoV9rEms7J72JPG-2-oMgFLxQ5-EgZRT7Qf-LJTzcdN8VIuW6Yke_NU_x1lr8T_AQAAP__Wmhbxw) Scalise on the House floor.
## **Republicans Look to Be Rid of Santos **
Yesterday, Congressman Anthony D'Esposito of New York announced the New York House Republicans were putting measures in place to [expel Representative George Santos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u6yAYxvGrgY0IXsAfA8NZvOWsHS1MXgwtBgtI0tx91czdHuk3PNL_47pebUwx7__tgab7slrX4wNXwZkABnJV9GY8IqCkaMQwj0JoBZIGI6WCySlt5Qh-s8INo3J6VsMIzgoPNBrgIAUXwGet5XRRUsGm541v0-w3x4nieIu91MtnibkH9OlVHlgvrhw0mdD72Yj8R2AhsPSAIab0awSWUA7M-GzveW9IYFGgOZ9mtmOpO7Jmcy-NvZXh93lPLZbMMj7Zq9QvtpeT-YotHJgJLLSa2_mMKcU2jETx_bDxfUb7311-AgAA___MoGR3) from the legislative body. This resolution is backed by fellow New York congressional members. ## **Hamas Weaponizes the Web**
Hamas has been disseminating videos detailing the brutal treatment of civilians and soldiers. Through social media sites like [X and Telegram](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO5CAQBNCvwRkWNNhjAoJLnM2lF1pt3Iz7BGZk0Fj79ytvvElFJdVT_XsuT-TEx-svZvItlgVD4w8tWkkNEsxiu81HIiDTkdeje2g9WDDd7kMcgpo2t45RDU5rwiGCdg8DONqNsGMPCoxWGpQbBjP11lhYB7eqdXJxDUpYRRu3cvb_Cx9tp5i-yofOPpTcJb-39q7C_BEwC5iv6-rfJXHjUO6CgPmgqwqY7xUBs1Z3aAHzjhmrrCUwJplpY5SR8JSZKx-xnBkbl0NyPZGSVDdwmmx3-u19cUpcx4ew6pWR0w-l_f7MdwAAAP__PMVjDQ), the militia is promoting propaganda while simultaneously spreading violent imagery. In the aftermath of the attack, social media networks have been besieged with [misinformation and fake videos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3ojgAAcGhi7Z0rWjdeAjvhabyKBE7ddX6dzx6S1P7-M6X5EL77d33Cj0XGdMnR80KykUCNCzGZeQiYD0SEFN_qyUNaDHNVgLePYJYrILGJMSopOLB-3yEr2SIweQoJVUIL212p2MNhCtjzI6n2OSg5G0cK_H6bPy3lfK5bs-6Diluo0lrL3f26DfBrgMcMH7Ts_2Ui84OqdCA1y4HUhFrLhhEzf8QbFx4z3XY8POdRcZUxdppfQlyLrsMbrJT1p6LW3ShBBzhMmDdTQeYbk_uRRu03kw8rYhl7-Y_v-b3wAAAP__taBklA) related to the conflict. Footage from past battles and false claims from across the region are flooding the web. In our current era of seemingly endless information, many are concerned with how Hamas could weaponize social media to skew circumstances in their favor. So far, main social media companies like X and Meta [have not commented](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8N3rDggeN48NDFW7p2tJ7hEZOCsQAFtb--SqVuXW463X36Pm7rDX3wx_0dI83VpRVN9U9apeASOKhVd3Z2RECqo1leplHKQYPq9nlyaLUdtXKjcpMxepwMbeMIxqGSm-j8DAKUFBLENAzq2mulYRumTWzXyW1GMC3I-ppy_0j-qDu58JWelHuTYhfmvdazMPXGYGGwtNZ6DA_8Jsr4ajBYDmqFwfK6YbBI8RclGY-BR7Ie-RmwupRj4aVhPMny5uvOHX4Sfw3wdPC6E_clIwW-Y8TCG-Yuz_ZsPgRfLiPT4h7Rh1-0-r-pnwAAAP__i7RqwQ) on the issue though many are awaiting answers.

On this day in 1492, a crew member aboard one of Christopher Columbus's ships, the Pinta, sighted land--likely the island of San Salvador in the Bahamas. If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . If you'd like to help the Flyover take off in the mornings, check out today's sponsor: "NativePath". | Scalise Secures Speaker Nomination In a 113 - 99 vote, Republican majority leader, for Speaker of the House during a secret ballot election yesterday afternoon. Scalise beat out Trump-endorsed Judiciary Committee Chairman, Jim Jordan for the party's support. After the election, several of Jordan's backers claimed they would not vote for Scalise in the final vote, prompting as they look to secure the votes needed to proceed with their pick. Currently, the House is split 221 - 212, making it difficult for the GOP to secure the 217 votes needed for a majority decision. Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH), who many thought would be the GOP pick, has Scalise on the House floor. Republicans Look to Be Rid of Santos Yesterday, Congressman Anthony D'Esposito of New York announced the New York House Republicans were putting measures in place to from the legislative body. This resolution is backed by fellow New York congressional members. In a , D'Esposito referred to Representative Santos as the "People's House fraudster." This comes just one day after New York prosecutors charged the congressman with 10 new criminal charges, bringing his rap sheet up to . Santos is accused of stealing campaign contributors' financial information, wire fraud, and theft of public funds. Hamas Weaponizes the Web Hamas has been disseminating videos detailing the brutal treatment of civilians and soldiers. Through social media sites like , the militia is promoting propaganda while simultaneously spreading violent imagery. In the aftermath of the attack, social media networks have been besieged with related to the conflict. Footage from past battles and false claims from across the region are flooding the web. In our current era of seemingly endless information, many are concerned with how Hamas could weaponize social media to skew circumstances in their favor. So far, main social media companies like X and Meta on the issue though many are awaiting answers.
