name: John Eastman
subject: OUTRAGEOUS Prosecution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC
body:
The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week.

| | | | **[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn0d9fr6nlkmq7boaan3ahdc6hdlok88nlampaoo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zheeq13uc8u5gu6quf6vnmtf31fcmhccf6k0gsg0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgqegmep4q1maeo0l9afh05eb14k71s5sq3n8q0o_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaajddrq7192l576ujl364qmcber328cglajttp0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**
| | **[DONATE $15](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze96ufhpl927cm7ia2vrshn6k55nvot8buapohrg_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
---
**[DONATE $25](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6ksl54s9n3hf4rd7pbd3va5vglr6p7snddfsihg_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
**[DONATE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7hsnihp6nmspn4q2f7rqf0eibfpqlspts0ccpio_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
**[DONATE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkasva4lgetcvpurnt75ekp8p19ek6ho20ri1ph0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
**[DONATE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbpc6m42n8nk5d1t13h4b33e9jtfjkotm6bu7nb0_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
**[DONATE $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zakicr754577tjckat5g2rl5ts60l5j05fg3tjgo_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
**[DONATE $1,000 or more](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcn9kgek0p6d4gmgevr0b6ioorbrun9dbbc4mk7g_rp22sh2s8i66p77chi69oj6c3h2bs)**
| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---

Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=17fc0ca692574b5b92d6de7f9c32d335&_e=ve2w7dYZgND98Pzq_7kg85bef9JjwZ0gbqxg_5VAOu0w8CiAVusFjWtKVe-ujD3zM6_NwNz5sGThzdCedQmAYERHHeIAFmCVR_SvrgVU7FwKby-np-E95UunX6j-LX3OBKVQetinp-ACmI62TqRgh0OASf3pVXBfHP462NNA-4Cyp5KrmWdMdTKB4nc3mEDpgtPhsWx1KCme9ggr9HzxDAK6lg7-r_wjAzaLhhJZQe7AHZGpF_nYEfrHzHziKKHOwfIJD4cUvZSaulT6yZ8bPteu_AGdprLmNVezbYlz82bzxFpL6TMbQpllx7KlqDlsZfx5QOMB3cyQSMV8nwkfWqVP0tnmJU4yzi0c2wfoCl4tmc3p2Sj1FfBdN0znxU6TQNyjWEJa5GH0QBZ3EahW5w%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

THE RON DESANTIS PRIORITY LIST:

- Stop runaway spending,reduce the national debt, and curb inflation to ensure the American Dream is back within everyone's reach.
- Stop the invasionof our southern border,build the wall, declare war on the Mexican drug cartels, and stop the flow of fentanyl and human trafficking into our country.
- Prevent China from spying on our citizens and stealing our technology, and revitalize domestic energy productionso that America can provide for itself.
- Restore our nation's sanity, protect children from being sexualized in the classroom, and shift our military's priorities back to the mission he fought for when he served.

This is the plan. And Ron DeSantis has the record to show that it will get done if we back him up.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=68a784d1252c64d4536bb8126b306555221bcd47b869eec9ff6973ca4fa6031c1a379ebaa3d6eacac0e5374d28696243778b5ebe60cebcc2be123eddd2e74831

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=68a784d1252c64d4536bb8126b306555221bcd47b869eec9ff6973ca4fa6031c1a379ebaa3d6eacac0e5374d28696243778b5ebe60cebcc2be123eddd2e74831

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=91dab0bbd06444078470be4efb0128e7&_e=8XpCOfFogIBnLFVL6Mi8CeYWFxg_IaT-_wGirm3_Wa98gy7B7yV-FCEubYiSqR0BbFwgHUQ7Noeceh0aOimONomIcZWz3XkZMsnls9w6qGq_2ZBJ55QNCLMdF5DSrUlkp_XhM1rcyVmJf2Sm6shY0-gxmfCjNRvRV6iiZLy79ZnmdDp7LACnXfnriLrSCIidWN4XakeWWaLNGqc6jcqKU52jaNY5gfbOeV13F0sfjDqR8qSXq332H_5bPgCrqMZ8fmHadRshqd_8mLhjrqhtcN02T6QM9eiPu0Xe4Nrxjgx4STBBEeaWt7LUDuL_E6szcA8xerBxv6Pu8nP09CW3r9Dmh1oRNpfDqmk9UiX1JM0e74rbIDen9y19bdRcvkVWaIC9N3Veud5oZ_ERiYTGqw%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=91dab0bbd06444078470be4efb0128e7&_e=8XpCOfFogIBnLFVL6Mi8CeYWFxg_IaT-_wGirm3_Wa98gy7B7yV-FCEubYiSqR0BbFwgHUQ7Noeceh0aOimONomIcZWz3XkZMsnls9w6qGq_2ZBJ55QNCLMdF5DSrUlkp_XhM1rcyVmJf2Sm6shY0-gxmfCjNRvRV6iiZLy79ZnmdDp7LACnXfnriLrSCIidWN4XakeWWaLNGqc6jcqKU52jaNY5gfbOeV13F0sfjDqrFXz_L20YuqN_wGj3cduNmoP4YHgKU_wJp-oA8s9TpqESaihmkmiYQzyMdzVyJnzeApMiX83OcpsHuM5GvkRV07XLPVX-ll0KzEx_Z-Gc0cR8OWvKpYbhfgtngXZRQRwPa0WVadqwcVBnii0YoN8B2jX5rCEZ6dls2cAGaztvgg%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=91dab0bbd06444078470be4efb0128e7&_e=8XpCOfFogIBnLFVL6Mi8CeYWFxg_IaT-_wGirm3_Wa98gy7B7yV-FCEubYiSqR0BbFwgHUQ7Noeceh0aOimONomIcZWz3XkZMsnls9w6qGq_2ZBJ55QNCLMdF5DSrUlkp_XhM1rcyVmJf2Sm6shY0-gxmfCjNRvRV6iiZLy79ZnmdDp7LACnXfnriLrSCIidWN4XakeWWaLNGqc6jcqKU52jaNY5gfbOeV13F0sfjDq5js7FBVfujIApJg3F8SPWpbDvdE5r2m4SsmK-WYE-cmRpGB71iIWIQ4FGwHkyKSpvn6RCFYdJzw1r0qxJVS586413SS8ZwBgWwzAQQfshRtHOUJCow-IV3PQ6NKOrn8zpclJbeBNqtWwcLe2d0MlugpKPtN046tFxnbOGpez9NQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=91dab0bbd06444078470be4efb0128e7&_e=8XpCOfFogIBnLFVL6Mi8CeYWFxg_IaT-_wGirm3_Wa98gy7B7yV-FCEubYiSqR0BbFwgHUQ7Noeceh0aOimONomIcZWz3XkZMsnls9w6qGq_2ZBJ55QNCLMdF5DSrUlkp_XhM1rcyVmJf2Sm6shY0-gxmfCjNRvRV6iiZLy79ZnmdDp7LACnXfnriLrSCIidWN4XakeWWaLNGqc6jcqKU52jaNY5gfbOeV13F0sfjDpGfFcHVjVnZdOHal6AJ8kS_jCQD3s4OGMq6zSW80DyW2xfEXkssXk5HFVdLRdUzbcWpr21cxxILLsYPeq0LhfEGc1rRKq3OMsejUlBO8tYxWQFtDQse5mHiIELSY2qmlK6tHwlS7H7PUzOa6Lk4ipZIuco101aTr_BEXhHvGGPTQ%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

| | Dear Friend,
---
| | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer.
---
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65de6c2e733411fa839a4dcb9946e73&_e=v17i9191yj6tn44mVD57OLaqLS5cvEg_vqq1YmSzQ9qP0NAGGzjZl05It2q8cLlN3OPkDr9ZRZi_qKE1wvRLLMwTZEwFYLSs8WUZoMzEXEfE9FJjMAuorUVG2eW0JFCfkSWqX-sWOu1GdKva1yncCxrRlsrtpdCqGNoPp_XfhsJrptxS-Yxhn6aySI7F-jOV1wN7NgNcNJJFhny6Uldarr7OxoUpJKSoiJcOq-bEA4yRUbO46ufLZfeZ-ZsiZ28eCNa4NjuMP50xpl6fKuLRu52cLMWThWDB2eqISraO0B2pjdqI5oZkSHbD9k8-dRHLFKebZQyvRL4B8dKOThtYrw%3D%3D)
This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the **John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC.**

| | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65de6c2e733411fa839a4dcb9946e73&_e=v17i9191yj6tn44mVD57OLaqLS5cvEg_vqq1YmSzQ9qP0NAGGzjZl05It2q8cLlN3OPkDr9ZRZi_qKE1wvRLLMwTZEwFYLSs8WUZoMzEXEfE9FJjMAuorUVG2eW0JFCfkSWqX-sWOu1GdKva1yncCxrRlsrtpdCqGNoPp_XfhsJrptxS-Yxhn6aySI7F-jOVwPTIndL-rodHx1qzvRhIow3u1cj6RKDugITbNDPk8osdBPDbyGsLpHc0kTpDeAHVx9Zsz4jXzg4cofVMv60yF9UXJTKYYKkv1wH0bKnzJ4Jt10HjEjH-1y3f-usdSiDzkU9UjRNTEdcKg3qJ1jV_VA%3D%3D)
These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia.
[Help Me Fight These False Charges](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65de6c2e733411fa839a4dcb9946e73&_e=v17i9191yj6tn44mVD57OLaqLS5cvEg_vqq1YmSzQ9qP0NAGGzjZl05It2q8cLlN3OPkDr9ZRZi_qKE1wvRLLMwTZEwFYLSs8WUZoMzEXEfE9FJjMAuorUVG2eW0JFCfkSWqX-sWOu1GdKva1yncCxrRlsrtpdCqGNoPp_XfhsJrptxS-Yxhn6aySI7F-jOVxjnReaeAqjkuGd7bOfwHqbGfqpGde-5t6YQAOdcKhxEtlQ_d_Clb46wmRg61_id_j-p30wjMRLI5JGoxKlw2dbZG3Rvh6cm5-I1FbBvklYPd1wvB-_aIry5mEF4BL1xHCGQrIXSNSVJILLgAe_vOHw%3D%3D)
So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family.
[Support The John Eastman Legal Defense Fund](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65de6c2e733411fa839a4dcb9946e73&_e=v17i9191yj6tn44mVD57OLaqLS5cvEg_vqq1YmSzQ9qP0NAGGzjZl05It2q8cLlN3OPkDr9ZRZi_qKE1wvRLLMwTZEwFYLSs8WUZoMzEXEfE9FJjMAuorUVG2eW0JFCfkSWqX-sWOu1GdKva1yncCxrRlsrtpdCqGNoPp_XfhsJrptxS-Yxhn6aySI7F-jOVQBldAdAG8AoOpYAtYhoBhjG8oLlAXIjg-40ciHxhTIqre72Gxxs0GSCqbkaIbcH6FLpfjmwDlKD-A40QZH6e9klAF8mZGPiOsGKR86BHpchObIQwDCKb2NOQb_euPUER4dhuodMnHKe1CVPBeC_Lcg%3D%3D)
As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will **[have my back](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e65de6c2e733411fa839a4dcb9946e73&_e=v17i9191yj6tn44mVD57OLaqLS5cvEg_vqq1YmSzQ9qP0NAGGzjZl05It2q8cLlN3OPkDr9ZRZi_qKE1wvRLLMwTZEwFYLSs8WUZoMzEXEfE9FJjMAuorUVG2eW0JFCfkSWqX-sWOu1GdKva1yncCxrRlsrtpdCqGNoPp_XfhsJrptxS-Yxhn6aySI7F-jOVnzbtG7UgKX_dok6a_axrvuxz2nU5hP-HuZHFViHMc1DKd4FoAE5vPbOTFnYvt2MotwSWRqpxQlXg3GQ-__JT-Rkd1NY0yfbvDVBZ02coTlQ27FTIsIuTA2kMVQ3QojuS3tW0zxQgBzgF5WpdL2XvBA%3D%3D)**. The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help.

clean_body: The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, | | | The outrageous prosecution of me by California state bar officials has entered its sixth long week. The term prosecution is really not apt. It's more like persecution by activist lawyers determined to Get President Trump and every lawyer like me who had the temerity to defend his right to lawfully challenge illegalities in the 2020 election. The crux of the State Bar's case against me is its claim that there was no evidence of significant fraud in the 2020 presidential elections and my legal filings on behalf of President Trump and my public statements to the contrary show that I am unfit to be a lawyer. This is the outrageous and false position that State Bar prosecutors have staked out in court for week after week. But now, FINALLY, I have been able to begin to present my defense. Through the efforts of my legal team and the blockbuster testimony of my amazing witnesses, the American people are FINALLY seeing all of the election illegality and fraud that we all saw with our own eyes back in 2020 get its day in court. This attack against me by the California State Bar mirrors the charges of a partisan lawfare group that is determined to put me, President Trump and all of his defenders in prison. I have spent hundreds of thousands of dollars defending against these outrageously false charges, and I am looking at over $1 million in additional costs. All of this is happening because I agreed with President Trump that the 2020 election involved massive irregularities and illegalities, and I agreed to help him present his case in the courts and Congress. Please help me defend against these false charges and ensure I have the resources needed to take on these leftwing lawfare radicals by donating to the John Eastman Legal Defense Fund, LLC. | | | | Here's a quick run down on how my legal team has demolished the State Bar prosecutors' case against me: Berkeley Law School Professor John Yoo who, like me, is an expert in constitutional law and particularly in the original meaning of the Constitution, explained in great detail, despite efforts by the Bar's lawyers to block his testimony, that based on his extensive research the majority of the scholarship on this subject agreed with my position as presented in court filings and public statements, that the Vice President had the ultimate decision-making authority to resolve disputes about contested electoral votes. Justice Michael Gabelman, former Justice of the Wisconsin Supreme Court and the individual appointed by the Wisconsin legislature to serve as Special Counsel investigating the Wisconsin elections, testified at length about the widespread illegalities in Wisconsin in 2020. These included Democrat counties accepting millions in funding from a Mark Zuckerberg group to help them conduct the election, including efforts to boost Democrat turnout, as well as the illegal use of drop boxes, illegal processing of absentee ballots and illegal balloting in nursing homes and similar facilities. One Democrat operative even took over running the Green Bay elections office! Then my team brought forth an election integrity expert from Georgia, Garland Favorito, who offered extensive testimony about irregularities and illegalities in that state. These included the destruction of 1.7 million ballot images, the deletion of video surveillance for 181,000 ballots cast at drop boxes, and clearly fraudulent ballots that were counted. For example, Favorito said there was flat-out fraud where he found 7 falsified tally sheets with 850 Biden votes to 0 Trump votes as well as mail-in ballots in Fulton County that weren't folded even though they must be mailed to voters. Along with other problems, including ballots that were filled out electronically instead of with a regular pen and other ballots that did not have the correct paper stock, Mr. Favorito testified that the total of counterfeit ballots substantially exceeded Joe Biden's margin of victory in Georgia. So much for the ridiculous claim that there was no evidence of election illegalities. I look forward to continuing to present my defense this week, which hopefully will include testimony from officials in Arizona concerning irregularities and illegalities there. In addition to the inordinate amount of my time I have had to devote to this trial, all while preparing for the upcoming Georgia prosecution by leftwing DA Fani Willis, the financial burden imposed on me by having full trial teams in place for what will end up being 7 or 8 weeks of trial has also been immense. It weighs heavily on me and my family. As you know, aside from this disbarment proceeding in California and the upcoming Georgia trial, I have also been named an unindicted co-conspirator in Jack Smith's prosecution of President Trump in Washington, DC over the election challenges. The only way that I can even comprehend being able to manage the over $1 million in additional legal expenses I am facing is knowing that there are patriotic American like you who will . The leftwing lawfare Democrats want to destroy me, bankrupt my family, and throw me in prison. My family and I can't do this alone, which is why I am asking if you will step forward with a generous donation to my legal defense fund. I urgently need your help. | | | | Let me end by thanking you for your friendship and support, and with one more request: please keep me and my family in your prayers. This is a spiritual battle as much as it is a legal battle. We need your ongoing prayers. | | | Sincerely, John Eastman Constitutional Scholar Attorney for President Donald Trump P.S. | | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d173d8e1cae14076a4a8890a9a5eb5af&_e=wZSWtCdQX_tYP7nYTZT1c4MBEqSSLFPw74auraAzX3-A6-NLbHOuVuwaEx_KnsWNMoJpL1q6xTVUQ0lk1e8yZzoDFAiztL3ZlSxygy8WrTBgssZSP-uoOlRrvyxFnYGsix39FLOhznSvr5wlypYDMg_J_WtaOeRvpoM-7vcJYzCfHJlTC5pQDXZP0LD4GRat6rzbjtCYmAQd0dJ-pPTg6kFT4E1orYISXnpz8CUglcfepPrb76OwgcAXL7h184UxfyU_VQqQmB3xGynvxxfKxAyCf617dxEs-e_taPOUETnMRZHSOlNCMRPgNebBUR6S7hoi4OKBTrYzwcTyMnMIAbHEAioKHYpf1G7a1gldIlmyHGZ0th4Vfxx2TpjG7POL6rYV1p0gM3uz7ZcWPSQrfw%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

This is NOT what we wanted to be telling you today - but it is absolutely critical. These are all the left-wing radical groups that are currently mobilizing to pack and destroy the conservative court: Above All Action Fund Alliance for Justice America's Voice American Atheists American Constitution Society American Humanist Association Black Voters Matter Center for Popular Democracy Action Color of Change Community Justice Action Fund Demand Justice Demos End Citizens United Freedom From Religion Foundation Greenpeace USA Guns Down America Indivisible Justice Democrats Latino Victory Project League of Conservation Voters March for Our Lives Action Fund MoveOn NARAL Pro-Choice America National Asian Pacific American Women's Forum Newtown Action Alliance People for the American Way People's Parity Project Public Justice Reproaction Rise Stand Up America Take Back the Court Action Fund Teachers Unify This Is Our Lane Ultraviolet Action Voto We Testify Women's March Planned Parenthood Federation of America Public Citizen Sunrise Movement Every single one of these Democrat organizations is bankrolled by deep-pocketed liberals and have been mobilizing non-stop. "We’re outraised & out organized. It’s this simple: If there’s not a historic turnaround, it’s all over with." This is an immediate plea for your help: History will remember how we respond to this plot to pack the Court and end the career of Clarence Thomas. name: Morning Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: For the price of one morning coffee:
body:
Hi there! We wanted to catch you as you sip your morning coffee... | | |
---
| |
---|---
☕Good morning! ☕ There’s only one thing more festive than sipping a warm pumpkin spice latte this fall. Can you guess what it is? **If you guessed supporting Democrats ahead of November’s elections, you’d be right!** We only have 26 days until the polls close, and **every single seat in the Virginia House and Senate is up for grabs. If Republicans win, they’re threatening to enact an extreme agenda, with Gov. Youngkin’s dangerous abortion ban at the center.** Our team has been working hard to defeat GOP extremists and secure Democratic victories. But just like you need your morning coffee to jumpstart your day, **we need the support of incredible grassroots Democrats like you to power our work in the states.** [For the price of just one pumpkin spice latte _(or whatever your coffee order is)_ – $5 – you can make a genuine difference in electing state Democrats nationwide. name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob
body:
Will you help my son?

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02G14vG7FHzq3kryAegcso_45MxUQl8UAe5QcQDHNce5ZsyFwYfpXj_ZNQBCWJmv3z5_ImxV45iKmXRRiQ7QH6WRPkJWwo2_DviEFVCRHV516uUC-2bb0eLQnwvkXmaWjSME9jaCl0s6UQ6_6y26TkExF2h66-7bgxVsPMW7DtTJv4%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02Geyve5dQ8btDLtXzagiEwvF0LccPWh48J9xFL7I7qUhmLGED77PCYJ15b-iamgDychuY4NQf0qB_B4OViteiFqNExNHKtAXUu_LzRRpM9PGeOy74ywDBZ5xuaLkVVUcb0hcZboLEhGfH0THkaquDaVKy7t1NJ2mfn8IdJzBE02LQ%3D) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02GzRljmPlaxArAQYqQEiBETmsHSYj4y4mDu_Z2TgWvUzHv1gb8mG457d0hyCsb7ajnc7Gww7ebv5yafZJZetZv75KRNzQ3B3tgEmWOD3Mk6kSiQWA6aePc8qv2wwyhG8Ro8CXjDJkQ4tgqKQEzzDf95v1iVNkWW1VW52qbrvlzlRQ%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02GLkz9cVt9p663rtukjyFpSGEeXDMwMvGVi4IWYU1qRvyqukKVNdAnDvDqD528yu6oK2SelOdWOL5kGRQWqcQrW1uAIsYHwyX6-W5BXefiGZ7744ufzSqqCm5B9OF2E6DXfo5T7yeYjiTfrddGaGAZXofUWb8IabkJdbaEHJ1fM_s%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02GWfw97fRAY2yCnJLtw6ZVY1fmuj4cnz2CP03y7YdgutnbQ8kiP2PZoJqC9CChNYIyZoQUJsXhJWmbgFbF2XW9egzdIKtkDH0W5uwxOh5Q1n8uOiw30p0RnAhB2c82vUMA7LYPiQCMMI3Kbow_D2QtM_e-j3gvlT8sXiLmxRg6vVA%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02G3ygQJUrcTFmNomOclFSUvYa0IXlm7ZkkmkUy5yJEvNPbbdy-hXOX1Q7s8IDMZEfPBIMasdwViCLefGgzm4ouiG9rjT_KmMUvmDDnitpWRA0F5iaACJV9xNsTvkDRmkV5mW3pJD5wsLAyLQLw9BJ63Z1igqTkGCAjio0RWbHrXA0%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02GsOiBgJbMEkUMVoMMqJaC4jjDUo1Zhp4XE8k60aoYKc3DCWiDf2Lt2k4YLRk3H6Z8BJh8_DYDrDTUqJCqXwn4j7sO7ureWk8K6C3Y_HJMWpMIOW5DnE_spDjlKPoobnUj2Be7N1QYj0QHUnTRbcsTFByZkCkwuMORk1XltIsY71c%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02GkDEoKdQg1ID0PV2sLVfntNjoTbaGfdZmYRLmHHI8WkpIZy_aXDpweMY97vanoXL-Wsi74GUErygrBjfkJl8dCM2fGgNE7kWQWxC_5XDBHlYoCYjhVm5pfu0Z-vTkJbCR7r0amj4NYvpq5bmQzzVAiQ4sj7YtAkyC6RSAKm0mdJI%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d1499c9a21a49d398017c8dbc5d5609&_e=RWxJNnrhDVlFePKU4fc4yNl_LvueQYDDEoXSM2UV62Uu5CIV5WVlKR9Q_HTLQw4XAy4wENLDZhm3_cdSSiir5J4cbPFkoLiR1xlOdHqbTi56u-vlQHwV39BKY8D3tPUDynkYupYPbbW6VjKqDjUjcbciqjTmB2ber7A9suuQh-D-hDK9lX_4YDXFJBOQU02GBt9NXu3PZvpNkA45a1HVHsMT2GslON6RJ83aE2wTG7weqTlBebCemDxGpFRsOl3cz1OQGUd7AOOa9ljr1FcQrkHL-jJoQMqMS73iWU3Pb9egms6yyZzWmkLkc7kYKkMWhGdpaHIONOKsw5TfHoQAJs_seGfc0CIF52ysfRJNwfw%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. clean_body: Will you help my son? I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
There's still time
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_34kSsRradTqNeKUI1PHt3nINnSE9w6J4Hmcpumn31ZeW4hj340s9FHWAOH8mq-dsUTZFV1oZhQztv7DA22GSevyyaw9bAfD-8OfGXkk5vm-YGx-1-NLGKjFliyizbr3PlvUKDqfRhGzzifXEcxQYongcSv-b8q72DK7db3ejmo=&c=enDvQaGQ1g96JOgSsg_5GLqYIlkguynlw0dBya4xlOsM59xlkCHBkQ==&ch=sAgTbk32nWYQRlnul0kBwk00EEYhN_ZV7zcIG2y53NuO08uTvp3WVg==)

| Support Rep. Jordan for Speaker
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

The Republican Conference will meet again to discuss the upcoming floor vote for Speaker of the House. Rep. Steve Scalise won yesterday's conference vote 113 to 99, which leaves him short of the 217 needed to be Speaker.

We can still help Rep. Jim Jordan become the next Speaker of the House. This is our opportunity to have a true conservative for Speaker.

I believe Rep. Jordan will do a better job. He is a Freedom Caucus member who is serving our country well as Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee. Before that, Rep. Jordan showed his ability to stand up to Democrats as Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee. Rep. Jordan has proved to be a true conservative and a careful manager of important congressional committees. I believe he is the best candidate for Speaker.

Rep. Bob Good went on WRVA to discuss this with John Reid. He's still supporting Rep. Jordan, and so am I. Here's the link to the interview- [Bob Good (audacy.com)](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_34kSsRradTqNeKUI1PHt3nINnSE9w6J4Hmcpumn31ZeW4hj340s9LnjM8pBIi8h_CqijCnPMu2dnwC98u_BLEpU0LxtqXZ0ioPSXZhCwDPk2oCaYOi4Amc2Hq3W3MWYOx1whwUqyFMOgk7sVTUe_0-CgbgpHjn7GDyDFxy-r3wlmwM56qka73Jhi_d77qizoC5RYv7wxG6a36WZkT3aXpqVg96UW1B5hrghIWEyy_n_HNtpbGLtkAtuG4JAB36a&c=enDvQaGQ1g96JOgSsg_5GLqYIlkguynlw0dBya4xlOsM59xlkCHBkQ==&ch=sAgTbk32nWYQRlnul0kBwk00EEYhN_ZV7zcIG2y53NuO08uTvp3WVg==)

Thank you to Rep. Good and Rep. Ben Cline for voting for Rep. Jordan in conference yesterday. Rep. Wittman supported Rep. Scalise. Reps. Kiggans and Griffith did not commit publicly to either candidate, and by-the-way it should not be a secret ballot, but I'll save that for a later discussion on transparency and accountability.

Please call the offices of Reps. Wittman, Kiggans, and Griffith and press them to vote for Rep. Jim Jordan of Ohio for Speaker of the House.

body:
| | | Peter, we are DEEPLY concerned.

The Left-wing establishment and their far-reaching donor network has amassed a MAJOR campaign war chest growing ahead of 2024, and right now, we’re falling behind. **If we continue at this rate, we’ll _never_ be able to take back control of the Senate. **

We REFUSE to lose, so we’re setting an ambitious **_$15K goal_ **before our mid-month deadline in just a few days.

**We can’t meet this goal without you.** This election will be decided by grassroots patriots like you, and without your support, we can kiss any chance at our Majority goodbye.

Don’t give up now. We have a REAL CHANCE at taking back the Senate and starting to undo all the harm Joe Biden did to our country. But first, we have to meet our mid-month goal.

Meeting this goal is absolutely _essential_. It helps us gain momentum to ensure that we can win close races and defeat Democrats’ razor-thin margin in the Senate. **Now, we’re counting on you to step up.**

from attending drag shows from going into effect, claiming that it may
be “overbroad” and violate the First Amendment, according to the
Orlando Sentinel. Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis signed the “Protection
of Children Act” in May, which barred venues from admitting minors to

The Democratic Socialists of America (DSA) are publicly feuding after
a New York City Democratic Socialist (NYC DSA) rally Sunday in support
of Palestine led to condemnation from within the group and from many
federal, state and local officials.

public health order banning firearms from being carried in public
parks and playgrounds from taking effect, according to the court
document.

Peter,

We’ve been outraised by more than $2 million. **[[link to donate, help me catch up]](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f12ddd706c0243808e9db7298df8e6cd&_e=dHkZsLFdlXQbQrJN20uADNq_zc4SaI-C9Mgpeo_kvzRBjdaD2Pqt1F7RTYnfWwT3aaEEmtS-3mXK2220kOXtR3MlwyVhoH661PsyJXw69CswsQGO9Zs1lMcUbiBASxTzoZPyshIU61AnWzFOZFWCwbErareOpSEeK1qqbzmYlcxwbIwQSnOdgU6N1O7ZyDMtD04j7Qj_cviNtngJ0iEDvRzaWXIh612WHZufQ4me5rwqK8RJ_TZ8ENKNPj39VYUkHXMjS87aw4k0DGuN82607Je5gBqOP9jI34D5IXraUjjqtuWNDkeGXbnyjn3ytx-tEF6Ljn-fOPC8oTJQPE1TWviODUlmTQZ8KbKXqZBfjEhdmf7wtdl5yHWyLLy1ElenmkwwoMyxlvwyM3L0ows3ww%3D%3D) **

President Biden’s poll numbers are TERRIBLE, and my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, is the epitome of what happens when career politicians stay in Washington too long. **Yet, for the second quarter in a row, Tester has managed to rake in more than $5 million.**

**Let me be clear:** My campaign wasn’t outraised due to a lack of effort on our end. We’ve been working around the clock, seven days a week since I announced my candidacy back in June.

Still, we were outraised by more than $2 million. How? **Democrats in states like New York and California know Jon Tester is a reliable vote for their far-left agenda.** Tester is not the moderate he claims to be, and with such a closely divided Senate, liberal donors know they cannot afford to lose one of “their guys,” so they’re working together to pour millions into his reelection fund.

**Right now, Jon Tester has more than $13 million to spend on viciously attacking me ahead of next year’s showdown, and with time, that number will only grow.**

**[I need your help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f12ddd706c0243808e9db7298df8e6cd&_e=dHkZsLFdlXQbQrJN20uADNq_zc4SaI-C9Mgpeo_kvzRBjdaD2Pqt1F7RTYnfWwT3aaEEmtS-3mXK2220kOXtR3MlwyVhoH661PsyJXw69CswsQGO9Zs1lMcUbiBASxTzoZPyshIU61AnWzFOZFWCwbErareOpSEeK1qqbzmYlcxwbIwQSnOdgU6N1O7ZyDMtD04j7Qj_cviNtngJ0iEDvRzaWXIh612WHZufQ4me5rwqK8RJ_TZ8ENKNPj39VYUk9tr4Qf-j-p9re-aw1DXy5ui5D-Z8EYwZHGGXE0Ne0micToquE1YB5vi9b8IOiy5kO5KBAuKHFsYZY3ANUMV34Dj-cvXXM8vpEvTJ-n2wp3WmGQBteMjc1qUVceaqy81xwTqRX83ueO3xKYYAVUSHHw%3D%3D)** Unlike my opponent, I don’t have a 20-year-old donor network to call on to fund my campaign.

clean_body: Right now, Jon Tester has more than $13 million to spend on viciously attacking me ahead of next year’s showdown, and with time, that number will only grow. | | Peter, We’ve been outraised by more than $2 million. [[link to donate, help me catch up]]() President Biden’s poll numbers are TERRIBLE, and my Democrat opponent, Jon Tester, is the epitome of what happens when career politicians stay in Washington too long. Yet, for the second quarter in a row, Tester has managed to rake in more than $5 million. Let me be clear: My campaign wasn’t outraised due to a lack of effort on our end. We’ve been working around the clock, seven days a week since I announced my candidacy back in June. Still, we were outraised by more than $2 million. How? Democrats in states like New York and California know Jon Tester is a reliable vote for their far-left agenda. Tester is not the moderate he claims to be, and with such a closely divided Senate, liberal donors know they cannot afford to lose one of “their guys,” so they’re working together to pour millions into his reelection fund. Right now, Jon Tester has more than $13 million to spend on viciously attacking me ahead of next year’s showdown, and with time, that number will only grow. Unlike my opponent, I don’t have a 20-year-old donor network to call on to fund my campaign. Can I count on you to Montana is where the Senate will be won and lost - let’s make sure we’re on the winning side. For America’s Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. body:
Running for U.S. Senate in Arizona

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dca8fbb0383f4373b31c6d8223d675ea&_e=VMgA0z9e_M6cXXkthFT2Dvp91e5bIByPDzS6uy0lbqKVxL9MgmxLXWJ_NJbIsnq3hey5Gg0OEvCXGnKM5pQYJxwymuIsyPPF3n1SS3sGuvMu6eP4Qy096QJj4ttvRUud12lZLhzYshbRYbmHG7164RHVVz4Lwx64VA4Ul8NSEH7mhTYlF61o9Ttkfc93yZyC35GsV8qivwKwLUVVYGZ5V6-_Rxp4rQr6WvUhYp0vX9PmdSqk3b4lA2ycWkd8cDzgJtPdCHHDiOoZaCkXhvjz96RZRR8AuaG8h337wSIe6uDSsk8kTZMUfK87rcahdgEigX6pOf4SiGOMUJ9KuI_9ipNwxpPGu1lwPW7Z6-R9-Uw%3D)

Hey! I wanted to take a moment and personally introduce myself. My name is Kari Lake, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Arizona.

Although I grew up in Iowa, my home AND my heart lies in Arizona. Reflecting on my childhood, I am astounded by my parent's resilience. They raised nine kids on two paychecks.

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dca8fbb0383f4373b31c6d8223d675ea&_e=VMgA0z9e_M6cXXkthFT2Dvp91e5bIByPDzS6uy0lbqKVxL9MgmxLXWJ_NJbIsnq3hey5Gg0OEvCXGnKM5pQYJxwymuIsyPPF3n1SS3sGuvMu6eP4Qy096QJj4ttvRUud12lZLhzYshbRYbmHG7164RHVVz4Lwx64VA4Ul8NSEH7mhTYlF61o9Ttkfc93yZyC35GsV8qivwKwLUVVYGZ5V1gwyrAo_Fpe7rdrGgVI24K962ITe3rARFqC_d80WqwSugXiwJxCgBggRqvJljCVZZR81EtB9dqymMlwUHWB9tHcNqOjAtAZHuNjvtlYE_4jfoZ5NyGnwW2dqO0vL2ckQp6i9pqzOONNLLcJxoGHuF8%3D)
| [**JOIN THE MOVEMENT -- MAKE HISTORY** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dca8fbb0383f4373b31c6d8223d675ea&_e=VMgA0z9e_M6cXXkthFT2Dvp91e5bIByPDzS6uy0lbqKVxL9MgmxLXWJ_NJbIsnq3hey5Gg0OEvCXGnKM5pQYJxwymuIsyPPF3n1SS3sGuvMu6eP4Qy096QJj4ttvRUud12lZLhzYshbRYbmHG7164RHVVz4Lwx64VA4Ul8NSEH7mhTYlF61o9Ttkfc93yZyC35GsV8qivwKwLUVVYGZ5V5496-80UPMLe47qGU9Bf9KhShF-SoamTMoI3x3it3YX_haTX2LIQ8ARuCfDJwCCbdTcQEo_BuxAlioxgXmiwhT3yWVADUq51M3ROh7eRF1zDKAAUt3JxaHvMS8o1jfgs0r_bYG_Q5qR4Kk8F--DNXQ%3D)
---

Today that would be impossible. The cost of living has never been higher. American families have never suffered as much as they are right now. [**It 's time for some change.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=dca8fbb0383f4373b31c6d8223d675ea&_e=VMgA0z9e_M6cXXkthFT2Dvp91e5bIByPDzS6uy0lbqKVxL9MgmxLXWJ_NJbIsnq3hey5Gg0OEvCXGnKM5pQYJxwymuIsyPPF3n1SS3sGuvMu6eP4Qy096QJj4ttvRUud12lZLhzYshbRYbmHG7164RHVVz4Lwx64VA4Ul8NSEH7mhTYlF61o9Ttkfc93yZyCrm3_S2KKt5OsxYEm-30bLNYNqBum5wmRsYzUPUYUD-G0OuvQR0pGc8jDgnXm3R1cg8d8_cbK1s4fJzzKr6eibsfupgoYbZ2cUKziS-QZy997k1YjBhyvRPmRSp4PuGvVN5xJ1N4VMC5RmSIoDDR5CnOIDAzep0XrEsSwmdxaAvY%3D)

I have two kids of my own now, and I refuse to leave them in a country where THE American Dream is out of reach.

I've tried my best to be a Mama Bear: I've worked hard and raised my family, all while remaining ignorant of the grand illusion that this country has been building around us.

clean_body: Running for U.S. Senate in Arizona | Hey! I wanted to take a moment and personally introduce myself. My name is Kari Lake, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Arizona. Although I grew up in Iowa, my home AND my heart lies in Arizona. Reflecting on my childhood, I am astounded by my parent's resilience. They raised nine kids on two paychecks. | Today that would be impossible. The cost of living has never been higher. American families have never suffered as much as they are right now. I have two kids of my own now, and I refuse to leave them in a country where THE American Dream is out of reach. I've tried my best to be a Mama Bear: I've worked hard and raised my family, all while remaining ignorant of the grand illusion that this country has been building around us. In reality -- we've lost control of the destiny of this nation. At some point, the American voters got sidelined in favor of Washington's agenda, which doesn't include the best interest of everyday Americans like you and me. THIS COUNTRY IS ABOUT TO CHANGE. ONCE AND FOR ALL! In Arizona, I built the largest grassroots movement in the history of this nation, and I want to make sure every Arizonan and American gets the opportunity to let their voice be heard. I spent years in the newsroom, looking at the BS & Propaganda the media masters wanted the American people to hear. Now -- I'm kicking this campaign into full gear; we will FIGHT and WIN. At all costs! I have just as much stake in this election as you do; I have two beautiful children and a loving husband. The only thing I want more in the world is for my family to live a life FREE of the government's control and the opportunity to live the American Dream. I've been a fighter all my life. I don't intend to stop now. I'm on a mission for all of US, and I'm fighting for the forgotten people of this nation who've been left behind Washington's narrow-minded agenda. I 'm in this fight for US. We will fight, and we will WIN, by ANY MEANS NECESSARY. Unfortunately, I can't do this alone, I need your help! RUSH YOUR SUPPORT BELOW! And don’t worry, in the meantime, I’m holding her feet to the fire constantly. Just the other day, when she made these absolutely insane claims, I confronted her face to face – and the Daily Mail even reported on it. name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: Kari Lake is running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
She’s Trump’s biggest cheerleader. People call her the MAGA Queen.
#

Peter, it’s Aquilino Gonell, former Staff Sergeant with the U.S. Capitol Police.
I’m writing because Kari Lake just announced her campaign for Senate in Arizona.
She’s Trump’s biggest cheerleader. People call her the MAGA Queen.
And she has never stopped spreading the Big Lie. She defends the people who injured hundreds of police on January 6th, who injured my hand and my foot, tore my shield from me, and beat me with the American flag. She’s even called for more political violence in the years since.
These people are not patriots. They don't love this country. Their only loyalty is to Trump — and to power.
Kari Lake isn’t a joke — she’s dangerous. She must be stopped. Ruben Gallego fought for our country in Iraq, and he was ready to fight on the House floor on January 6th. Ruben is the only one who can stop Kari Lake.
I’m doing everything I can to support him.
So please, for our country, for our democracy, I’m asking you to join me.
[**Can you make a $3 donation to help Ruben Gallego beat Kari Lake today?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231012-1&t=1&akid=1322%2E734936%2E2B7k81)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
As November approaches, I wanted to take a moment to emphasize the importance of voting in this year's election, particularly in the school board ... | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=f93714d781&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# The Importance of Local Elections

Peter, let's face it: our children's education is at stake.

[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=f653ba54ff&e=a2a46ff12c)

As November approaches, I wanted to take a moment to emphasize the importance of voting in this year's election, particularly in the school board races.
Whether or not you have children in school, your vote holds tremendous power in shaping the future of Texas.
The quality of our public schools directly impacts our communities, our economy, and the overall well-being of our state. By participating in the electoral process, you have the opportunity to contribute to a better future for all Texans.
Let's come together and work towards strengthening our public schools. Our children's education is at stake, but with your vote, we can make a positive impact.
Mark your calendars this November and let your voice be heard. Together, we can secure a better future for everyone.**
**[**Peter - Let’s work to strengthen our public schools**.](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=8b6e4eddd7&e=a2a46ff12c)
*If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: As November approaches, I wanted to take a moment to emphasize the importance of voting in this year's election, particularly in the school board ... | | | | | The Importance of Local Elections Peter, let's face it: our children's education is at stake. As November approaches, I wanted to take a moment to emphasize the importance of voting in this year's election, particularly in the school board races. Whether or not you have children in school, your vote holds tremendous power in shaping the future of Texas. The quality of our public schools directly impacts our communities, our economy, and the overall well-being of our state. By participating in the electoral process, you have the opportunity to contribute to a better future for all Texans. Let's come together and work towards strengthening our public schools. Our children's education is at stake, but with your vote, we can make a positive impact. Mark your calendars this November and let your voice be heard. Together, we can secure a better future for everyone. *If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | \- Laura JonesCandidate for U.S. House of RepresentativesTexas’s 8th Congressional District | | | | Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress P.O. name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Jim Jordan should NOT be Speaker of the House >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Jim Jordan should NOT be Speaker of the House >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14054c1e-55b1-4306-bcf6-1de50c42fa1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef1f8cea-b7cb-4a4d-ab5f-4f8afe442286/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Ohio Rep. Jim Jordan, one of Trump's closest allies, is among Republicans' top choices for Speaker of the House, neck and neck with Steve Scalise. **[But there is no way that Jordan should be elected Speaker](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccd4e894-d27d-4a9e-8eab-c79a4c45007c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). ** Jim Jordan is an election denier who tried to help Trump steal the 2020 election. He was involved in meetings that led up to the events on January 6th, he spoke at a "Stop the Steal" rally, he spread conspiracy theories about voting machines, and then he refused to cooperate in the January 6th Committee's investigation. And now that Trump is finally being held accountable for trying to steal the election, Jim Jordan decided to lead an investigation into Georgia DA Fani Willis, claiming her prosecution of Trump was "politically motivated." **And then there's [this](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49d5be76-6904-4f79-9a13-cd411828de1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9):** _Four of the former Ohio State University wrestlers who have accused Rep. Jim Jordan of [failing to protect them from a sexual predator](https://default.salsalabs.org/T495a3670-80cf-48aa-8fed-d5bd2013a2c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) when he was the team's assistant coach in the 1980s and '90s said Tuesday he has no business being the next speaker of the House._ _" Do you really want a guy in that job who chose not to stand up for his guys?" said former OSU wrestler Mike Schyck, one of the hundreds of former athletes and students who say they were sexually abused by school doctor Richard Strauss and have sued the university. "Is that the kind of character trait you want for a House speaker?"_ For these and many other reasons, Jim Jordan can NOT be elected Speaker of the House. We can't afford to have an election denier, abuse enabler, and top Trump ally in this position of power. [**Sign your name to tell Congress: Jim Jordan should NOT be Speaker of the House!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ed3b040-77ff-41cf-a143-46693f50136d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd710542-662a-4891-a180-6270697300fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T46997c95-d3da-401f-8e73-e00e6612c64c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90bf130c-2fc7-4630-a9bd-a09364254785/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
Kari Lake made it official: she is running for U.S. Senate in Arizona.
#
Friend -

**Kari Lake made it official: she is running for the United States Senate in Arizona.**

She launched with the likely support of Donald Trump, Steve Bannon, Roger Stone and more. MAGA-money will flow into her campaign from all over the country.

And she will undoubtedly use that money immediately to attack Ruben.

[_So we need your help. Today. If this is all you need to hear, please split a contribution between Zak Malamed for Congress and Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate using this link:_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?source=em231012-rg-split&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3)

[https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/124?t=1&akid;=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?source=em231012-rg-split&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3)

But here's a few more reasons to contribute $5 to Zak Malamed for Congress and Ruben Gallego today:

[_Contribute $5_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?source=em231012-rg-split&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3) because Kari Lake is an election denier who works overtime to divide our country with conspiracy theories that undermine our democracy and even tear families apart.

[_Contribute $5_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?source=em231012-rg-split&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3) because if Kari Lake wins Arizona, that means Trump probably does as well -- which means a Republican Senate and Trump back in the White House.

[_Contribute $5_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?source=em231012-rg-split&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3) because we are short of our October fundraising goals and can't afford to come up short with this news.

This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, Ruben needs you. Arizona needs you. America needs you. So please:

[_Use this link to split a contribution between Zak Malamed for Congress and directly to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate today. It will all add up when we are all chipping in. Today is the day._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?source=em231012-rg-split&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Split $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em20231011-rg-split-el&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3) [Split $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20231011-rg-split-el&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3) [Split $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em20231011-rg-split-el&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3) [Other Amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-lake?amount=5&amount=30&refcode=em20231011-rg-split-el&refcode2=502_8507_l2T_e3&akid=502%2E8507%2El2T_e3)

Hi Peter**,** Mark your calendar for Tuesday, October 24th! I'll be traveling back to our state capital for a campaign fundraiser with my Nashville community, and **[I hope you will join me there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71436098/432118718/-983566723?refcode=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjcwYzRhMy0wNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0-Mqf9gc878VgIQwotCwZWiBv-uaiLCN3LqWbM8YWY=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71436099/432118719/921448041?refcode=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjcwYzRhMy0wNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0-Mqf9gc878VgIQwotCwZWiBv-uaiLCN3LqWbM8YWY=) Meet me at AB in Hillsboro Village at 5:30 PM! Tennessee’s music has always been so important to me, and I’m excited to gather together with my friends in the music industry in support of my campaign for US Senate. I am so grateful to have such a strong community of supporters in Nashville, and I need everyone to stand with me in this fight for Tennessee. **[Will you invest in my campaign today by joining the host committee for this event? Join here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71436100/432118720/-983566723?refcode=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjcwYzRhMy0wNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0-Mqf9gc878VgIQwotCwZWiBv-uaiLCN3LqWbM8YWY=)** I am so looking forward to this very special event in Music City, and I hope to see you there on October 24th! | [**RSVP NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71436101/432118721/921448041?refcode=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb70c4a3-0769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjcwYzRhMy0wNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0-Mqf9gc878VgIQwotCwZWiBv-uaiLCN3LqWbM8YWY=)
---
Rep. Gloria Johnson

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: 3 TRUE STATEMENTS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT okay

| |
---
| | | **1.** Since Joe Biden has taken office reports show we’ve encountered:
* 6,400 Afghanistan Nationals
* 3,200 from Egypt
* 1,200 from Iran & Syria
* 60,000 from Uzbekistan, Turkey, Pakistan, and Lebanon

**2.** **151 of them were on the FBI terror watchlist **

**3.** **1.5 million** “gotaways” have crossed the border **illegally** without being caught.

This is dangerous and wildly not acceptable!

How many of the 1.5 million seek to inflict damage on America?
How many seek to attack American values?

**TOO MANY!**

This is why I’ve reached out today. _**[I need your support.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24949%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4rtUk8EQqpXgQl6nrh9q1g&sysid=1 "I need your support.")**_

A SECURE border is desperately needed.

_**[I need YOUR support to make it happen. Will you stand on the side of law& order?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24940%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GQYRjc0H5rpvweTQzNUDMg&sysid=1 "I need YOUR support to
make it happen. Will you stand on the side of law & order?")**_

Thank you for taking time out of your day to read this. I hope that I have your continued support as we tackle the most important issues facing our nation.

Thank you,

Kevin McCarthy

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark?=
subject: Anti-Human Climate Agenda
body:
They're looking for control - NEW EPISODE of No Doubt About It | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=40f10b1634&e=567664f14c)

We're thrilled to share the latest episode of the [**No Doubt About It Podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=24bab65e65&e=567664f14c) featuring a fascinating discussion with special guest, Alex Epstein!
In this episode, Mark and Krysty Ronchetti are joined by Alex Epstein, the author of two must read books on energy, "Fossil Future" and "The Moral Case For Fossil Fuels." **Alex shares insights into the current climate change movement, shedding light on its often overlooked implications which are proving to be devastating.**
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d6a6714bf2&e=567664f14c)

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d61974b108&e=567664f14c)
* [Apple Podcasts](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=77c035cc43&e=567664f14c)
* [Spotify](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=f138a6c9db&e=567664f14c)
* [YouTube](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0f96b9fd17&e=567664f14c)

One of the key takeaways from this episode is Alex's perspective on how the modern climate change movement is anti-human, potentially leading to significant suffering if we were to halt the production of critical fossil fuels like oil and gas. This topic is especially crucial to our audience in New Mexico, given that we are the second-largest producer of oil and gas in the country. The revenue generated from these industries plays a vital role in funding education in our state.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ff02eeed79&e=567664f14c)
Furthermore, Mark, Krysty, and Alex delve into the ways in which the contemporary climate movement is leveraging the urgency of climate change to gain more power over citizens. This discussion highlights the potential threats to our rights as Americans, making it a must-listen episode for anyone concerned about our society's direction.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3b3215ac65&e=567664f14c)
|
---
We encourage you to listen to this eye-opening episode on your preferred podcast platform. If you enjoy the content, please like and subscribe to stay updated on our latest discussions. You can also find us on YouTube, where you'll discover more engaging content.
Additionally, if you'd like to support the podcast and show your appreciation, you can make donations and purchase exclusive merchandise on our website at [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cfede25c2b&e=567664f14c).
Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to sharing more enlightening conversations with you in the future.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=347acc454c&e=567664f14c)
|
---

| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4726657e28&e=567664f14c)
---
| _P.S. We saw a lot of conversation online after our Monday episode all about the unimaginable terrorist attacks on Israel. If you missed the episode, we hope you’ll add it to your queue, and let us know your thoughts!_
