body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8d5dcA36IWxBLKXoj-67GG68ysdlEEZ2OiqdP2qQVkuSjb19ZciLJjD-aZXA_HIeb1KUGbGUzvE0Rt2KG5QYw80cmuN-0EukcoeFr4XSOyhn9VmDGxPHx9J4dVaPOo7cwFI_tOsYtYDMtyOMMwWFViMTpFtZ6eRY44a2ymng7lPgGniZpuwGxfPy9uE6fs2DILHKzU-IyjKUobNrX86YaKWoIlkRF2gerW9eC6z97EL7a1PdR44Pj2GgqOf6TyDB4YnXV4-z2JJQbzmotbqqd0_qYfR5qQLNyPl_YjPLH4Baw54gUKQPXSiQIm3coyZqzAQPUrSGk9W2qqaYxP4m10APZb4aZ8_7nddd85F5jXcY/40d/q7R36AAWQMCRLvpWIqL5Uw/h0/0gsPf-e1RRHIrViAxh2rOsN5jR7yboPT4fauUt-n0e8)
| | | Peter — THIS IS RIDICULOUS...

The Republican Party has nominated _STEVE SCALISE_ — the very same man that compared himself to the _Grand Wizard of the KKK_ — for Speaker of the House.

The idea that a white supremacist is fit to lead in Congress is absurd, and we could not be more appalled. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKUTo15zPnZULmtBaCWrytyJX5xTJzQGt3cLykxajG4HF1Bmh0uh65oeqY-gen-u3lbQcXsyOgp7Ald8WDb79ijGjo4YAN9NcG2SPAoIJQpvj_l0bhhVD7k4wWZMF8ImZumJeQ-UMQ8t6evld0HHeGVGwglmdkSscvPqPYzhey-RbmMQ9wCqUowjt-hkHJ9lRtPSngCtMP5vr4rAdbI3HCr-Iroc4HWU8qnSW3yTUuRmlPz7BXZgwvQFhvkWhkTvVFUjitvE5DspKOVP3FAS2DquL-fsP_g9UFzNEz7BG6C7la8xe4WRyaYHppAartbEyVOVsIf85oUrCYsSeQx2opXogt9jAtVwPLWGBcowM_7mEU63wj2h0wrtTggMn0HZHoORZSg4fsmeu5ecXOjaq0b6pPrXXs9N_bo4NiDkhOVg/40d/q7R36AAWQMCRLvpWIqL5Uw/h1/BZqMbK6hoYqh-Ww3Rf5JHGCttqkNCAUERYMqwgFlmJk) What’s worse: a win for Steve Scalise means a win for the most _extreme_ MAGA Republicans in Congress.

Scalise himself still refuses to admit that the 2020 election was legitimate, Peter.

[The American people deserve better than a white supremacist and election denier holding the gavel in the US House. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Israel – how should we respond?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571227?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**The scenes are gruesome.** Two hundred and fifty young people at a music festival murdered. Women and children abducted at gun point, and carried off to a grisly captivity at the hands of Hamas.

**Hamas’ attack on Israel could not conceivably serve any conventional military purpose.** The aim of the attack was to kill and abduct as many civilians as possible. Indeed, the Israelis suspect that the ‘Tribe of Nova’ music festival, apparently advertised all over social media, was specifically targeted by Hamas.

**How should the United States respond?**
---
|
---
| First, Americans should remember why they support Israel. **A tiny slither of land less than a fifth the size of Louisiana, Israel is the only democracy in the Middle East.** In Israel, as in America, government comes from the people and by the people.

The only example of an open society in the Middle East, Israel is a social and economic success story. So much so, in fact,** Israel’s very existence is a rebuke to the theocrats and thugocracies that surround her. This is why those theocrats and thugs seek her destruction.**

**It is easy to support Israel today when the images of the latest atrocities are fresh in our minds. But we need to brace ourselves to give Israel moral support in the bleak months ahead.**

**Even now, as Hamas paraded their helpless hostages in Gaza, there are no shortage of Western ‘intellectuals’ quick to come out in support of such savagery.** Those anti-Israel voices will only grow louder as Israel undertakes the grim task of neutralising further threats from Hamas in Gaza, and possibly even Hezbollah in the north.

One immediate consequence of Hamas’ attack has been to put Israel’s peace talks with Saudi Arabia on hold. Indeed, that might have been Iran’s intention in helping encourage and orchestrate the terror attacks, as some reports now suggest seems likely.

**The atrocities in Israel should be a wakeup call for America’s foreign policy establishment.** For two decades, Western countries have tried various initiatives to reach out to Iran. Doing so, we were told, would encourage ‘the moderates’ in Tehran. Handing over billions of dollars, according to many ‘experts’, would bring about a rapprochement.

Today, there is not much sign of any moderation by Iran. Nor have we seen a softening of Tehran’s position. What we have seen are a lot of dead young Israelis at a music festival, killed by Iranian-backed terrorists.

We must no longer pretend that we can deal with Iran as a normal nation.

**For as long as I can remember, all the sensible foreign policy people in Washington and London talked about the need for a two state solution in the Middle East. Today we can see what Hamas are really like, and I wonder if there is anything sensible about giving such people sovereignty over anyone. **

My greatest concern in the aftermath of these attacks in not with the Middle East, but with America.

**As news of the atrocities was being reported, several mainstream broadcasters insisted on calling the perpetrators ‘militants’, rather than ‘terrorists’.** In several cities in Europe and north America, we saw pro-Palestinian protesters chanting for the destruction of Israel.

**At Harvard, 31 student groups, including the ****Muslim Student Association and** **Students for Health Equity and Justice in Palestine, issued a statement blaming Israel for what happened.**

Maybe years of ‘woke’ teaching and recruitment at elite institutions comes with consequences?

**_After decades of promoting cultural relativism, the absurd idea that all cultures are of equal worth, we end up with an intellectual ‘elite’ unable to differentiate between an imperfect democracy, Israel, and a gang of savages, Hamas._**

It is this that really ought to concern us. Would you be happy having people that think this way running the State Department in 30 year’s time?

Israel, like America, has the munitions and the manpower she needs to defend herself against those intent on undermining her way of life. For now. **What we must fear instead is the moral disarmament of the West that has been happening one campus at a time.** We need to intellectually rearm.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, The scenes are gruesome. Two hundred and fifty young people at a music festival murdered. Women and children abducted at gun point, and carried off to a grisly captivity at the hands of Hamas. Hamas’ attack on Israel could not conceivably serve any conventional military purpose. The aim of the attack was to kill and abduct as many civilians as possible. Indeed, the Israelis suspect that the ‘Tribe of Nova’ music festival, apparently advertised all over social media, was specifically targeted by Hamas. How should the United States respond? | | First, Americans should remember why they support Israel. A tiny slither of land less than a fifth the size of Louisiana, Israel is the only democracy in the Middle East. In Israel, as in America, government comes from the people and by the people. The only example of an open society in the Middle East, Israel is a social and economic success story. So much so, in fact, Israel’s very existence is a rebuke to the theocrats and thugocracies that surround her. This is why those theocrats and thugs seek her destruction. It is easy to support Israel today when the images of the latest atrocities are fresh in our minds. But we need to brace ourselves to give Israel moral support in the bleak months ahead. Even now, as Hamas paraded their helpless hostages in Gaza, there are no shortage of Western ‘intellectuals’ quick to come out in support of such savagery. Those anti-Israel voices will only grow louder as Israel undertakes the grim task of neutralising further threats from Hamas in Gaza, and possibly even Hezbollah in the north. One immediate consequence of Hamas’ attack has been to put Israel’s peace talks with Saudi Arabia on hold. Indeed, that might have been Iran’s intention in helping encourage and orchestrate the terror attacks, as some reports now suggest seems likely. The atrocities in Israel should be a wakeup call for America’s foreign policy establishment. For two decades, Western countries have tried various initiatives to reach out to Iran. Doing so, we were told, would encourage ‘the moderates’ in Tehran. Handing over billions of dollars, according to many ‘experts’, would bring about a rapprochement. Today, there is not much sign of any moderation by Iran. Nor have we seen a softening of Tehran’s position. What we have seen are a lot of dead young Israelis at a music festival, killed by Iranian-backed terrorists. We must no longer pretend that we can deal with Iran as a normal nation. For as long as I can remember, all the sensible foreign policy people in Washington and London talked about the need for a two state solution in the Middle East. Today we can see what Hamas are really like, and I wonder if there is anything sensible about giving such people sovereignty over anyone. My greatest concern in the aftermath of these attacks in not with the Middle East, but with America. As news of the atrocities was being reported, several mainstream broadcasters insisted on calling the perpetrators ‘militants’, rather than ‘terrorists’. In several cities in Europe and north America, we saw pro-Palestinian protesters chanting for the destruction of Israel. At Harvard, 31 student groups, including the Muslim Student Association and Students for Health Equity and Justice in Palestine, issued a statement blaming Israel for what happened. Maybe years of ‘woke’ teaching and recruitment at elite institutions comes with consequences? After decades of promoting cultural relativism, the absurd idea that all cultures are of equal worth, we end up with an intellectual ‘elite’ unable to differentiate between an imperfect democracy, Israel, and a gang of savages, Hamas. It is this that really ought to concern us. Would you be happy having people that think this way running the State Department in 30 year’s time? Israel, like America, has the munitions and the manpower she needs to defend herself against those intent on undermining her way of life. For now. What we must fear instead is the moral disarmament of the West that has been happening one campus at a time. We need to intellectually rearm. | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | Proud to be a friend of Israel. | | |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: I can’t say it often enough…
body:
As I’m sure you know, battling the organized Left and the corrupt Biden administration’s endless assaults on our election laws in order to keep our elections fair and honest ranks at the very top of our action agenda...

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Thank you for your commitment to our conservative beliefs and values!**
Patriotic Americans give Judicial Watch the help we needed to successfully battle corrupt politicians and stand firm for the rule of law and our "right to know."
And today, I hope you will decide to join them by [making a tax-deductible contribution.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The wonderful support we receive from our members means that in 2024 we will celebrate our 30th year helping preserve the rule of law. Many non-profit organizations never reach that many years of effective work... _it is a fantastic achievement_.

But we are carrying a demanding legal caseload right now, and that’s why I am counting on you to join the Judicial Watch team today!

Backed by members’ donations, and because we strive to budget our expenses and revenue carefully and in advance, we are able to _respond quickly and decisively_ to meet the challenges posed by corrupt politicians and unlawfully secretive bureaucrats.

And on fronts ranging from our investigations and lawsuits related to honest elections, Biden family corruption, and chronic improper government secrecy, it is vital for Judicial Watch to be able to turn on a dime, and respond rapidly and effectively to events!

That’s why all of us are so counting on you to support us today, in this critically important last quarter of the year. [Your special gift now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) is really essential to helping us stay on track with our work.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

_And we pledge to honor your trust every day_ , as we are working on multiple fronts important to you, me and all commonsense conservatives these days...

* We continue to lead in fighting to keep our elections honest by enforcing existing federal election law and defending traditional electoral safeguards. In just the past two years, we have successfully settled our all-important National Voter Registration Act lawsuits against Colorado, New York City, North Carolina and Pennsylvania after they all undertook to clean their voter rolls of ineligible voters...meaning less opportunities for voter fraud, and more honest elections, in those four jurisdictions!

* _We continue to use the legal system and the courts to get to the facts about Biden family corruption_. We are pursuing (at last count) 10 federal lawsuits to help the American people determine the scope of the Biden influence peddling scheme...and to determine if President Joe Biden is a crook. Whatever actions Congress does or does not take related to impeachment, you can count on Judicial Watch to persevere in forcing the release of documents that the American people have a right to see!

* And as America's leading open-records litigator, we continue to _lead in the constant battle for the American people 's "right to know_." Every week we release to the media and the public (often as a result of our lawsuits) documents that government bureaucrats want to keep hidden...like our revelations about US government funding of programs at Communist Chinese controlled labs that have been identified as a probable source of the COVID pandemic. _Our lawsuits continue, too_ ...like those we filed against three federal agencies last month over their decision to expand asset protection to large depositors in the Silicon Valley and Signature Bank government takeovers, which smack of political favoritism and government overreach by the Biden administration!

We're currently pursuing _thousands_ of open Freedom of Information Act requests and _dozens_ of lawsuits against several branches of the federal government on multiple, important policy fronts. And all of them carry real costs, which is why a [special contribution from you](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) at this time is so important... _we just can 't do it without you_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Thank you, again, for your commitment to our nation and conservative values. I deeply hope you will decide to actively help us advance our mission on behalf of the rule of law and the American people’s right to know what their government is doing.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65373&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

Patriotic Americans give Judicial Watch the help we needed to successfully battle corrupt politicians and stand firm for the rule of law and our "right to know." And today, I hope you will decide to join them by | The wonderful support we receive from our members means that in 2024 we will celebrate our 30th year helping preserve the rule of law. Many non-profit organizations never reach that many years of effective work... it is a fantastic achievement. But we are carrying a demanding legal caseload right now, and that’s why I am counting on you to join the Judicial Watch team today! Backed by members’ donations, and because we strive to budget our expenses and revenue carefully and in advance, we are able to respond quickly and decisively to meet the challenges posed by corrupt politicians and unlawfully secretive bureaucrats. And on fronts ranging from our investigations and lawsuits related to honest elections, Biden family corruption, and chronic improper government secrecy, it is vital for Judicial Watch to be able to turn on a dime, and respond rapidly and effectively to events! That’s why all of us are so counting on you to support us today, in this critically important last quarter of the year. is really essential to helping us stay on track with our work. And we pledge to honor your trust every day , as we are working on multiple fronts important to you, me and all commonsense conservatives these days... We continue to lead in fighting to keep our elections honest by enforcing existing federal election law and defending traditional electoral safeguards. In just the past two years, we have successfully settled our all-important National Voter Registration Act lawsuits against Colorado, New York City, North Carolina and Pennsylvania after they all undertook to clean their voter rolls of ineligible voters...meaning less opportunities for voter fraud, and more honest elections, in those four jurisdictions! We continue to use the legal system and the courts to get to the facts about Biden family corruption. We are pursuing (at last count) 10 federal lawsuits to help the American people determine the scope of the Biden influence peddling scheme...and to determine if President Joe Biden is a crook. Whatever actions Congress does or does not take related to impeachment, you can count on Judicial Watch to persevere in forcing the release of documents that the American people have a right to see! * And as America's leading open-records litigator, we continue to lead in the constant battle for the American people 's "right to know." Every week we release to the media and the public (often as a result of our lawsuits) documents that government bureaucrats want to keep hidden...like our revelations about US government funding of programs at Communist Chinese controlled labs that have been identified as a probable source of the COVID pandemic. Our lawsuits continue, too ...like those we filed against three federal agencies last month over their decision to expand asset protection to large depositors in the Silicon Valley and Signature Bank government takeovers, which smack of political favoritism and government overreach by the Biden administration! We're currently pursuing thousands of open Freedom of Information Act requests and dozens of lawsuits against several branches of the federal government on multiple, important policy fronts. And all of them carry real costs, which is why a at this time is so important... we just can 't do it without you! Thank you, again, for your commitment to our nation and conservative values. I deeply hope you will decide to actively help us advance our mission on behalf of the rule of law and the American people’s right to know what their government is doing. Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2023, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

name: NextGen America
subject: We can’t let this keep happening
body:
Join the fight for climate action.

| | Friend, the climate crisis is real, it’s here, and it’s disproportionately affecting Latino communities across the country. States with the highest populations of Latinos have continually been devastated by natural disasters, from hurricanes and flooding to wildfires and earthquakes. Air pollution and our country’s continued dependence on fossil fuels have also had a severe impact on Latino Americans’ mental and physical health. One thing’s certain, friend: Taking action against the climate crisis is more necessary than ever. Congress has a responsibility to protect all Americans from the dangers of our current climate crisis. [Write to Congress today and urge them to continue the fight for climate action.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71439562/432130638/647858766?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM1ODkxZS0wYjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kXN6fqNbW7l3hTNw0ZXatXMdUMHGKfd0WZopZJJM1Q=&emci=08b332ff-545d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5c35891e-0b69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) Latino communities should not bear the brunt of the climate crisis. But the devastation caused by climate change will continue to disproportionately affect them unless Congress acts swiftly. Write to your representative now and urge them to take bold, transformative action on climate. | [Write to Congress](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71439563/432130639/-1274455535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzM1ODkxZS0wYjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kXN6fqNbW7l3hTNw0ZXatXMdUMHGKfd0WZopZJJM1Q=&emci=08b332ff-545d-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5c35891e-0b69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

clean_body: Join the fight for climate action. | | Friend, the climate crisis is real, it’s here, and it’s disproportionately affecting Latino communities across the country. States with the highest populations of Latinos have continually been devastated by natural disasters, from hurricanes and flooding to wildfires and earthquakes. Air pollution and our country’s continued dependence on fossil fuels have also had a severe impact on Latino Americans’ mental and physical health. One thing’s certain, friend: Taking action against the climate crisis is more necessary than ever. Congress has a responsibility to protect all Americans from the dangers of our current climate crisis. Latino communities should not bear the brunt of the climate crisis. But the devastation caused by climate change will continue to disproportionately affect them unless Congress acts swiftly. Write to your representative now and urge them to take bold, transformative action on climate. | "CTA Button" Thank you, NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

Today’s survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **we won’t have a complete dataset without your response! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now:

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Update on Ron DeSantis' Support of Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ba0588cda8adfcbbf41d18b8b71ec83e6e809b27346286169a69215089dfb13e7c50d584704e5695a49ea870a12c89105930deb17807438a1adbe4af246047294f56c203b9601a81296cfc2c54615c42

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2b5d06d073b2d9a54223f6ba81f47c7a27583ad9b45785b7c7a9befb81840bd4c1dc442847c0f346ccda0a3df57d7218978a5ab7e55c519a

Friend,

As Israel faces the barbaric attacks of the Iran-backed Hamas terrorists, Ron DeSantis is taking executive action in the State of Florida to stand firm in support of Israel and its people.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2b5d06d073b2d9a54223f6ba81f47c7a27583ad9b45785b7c7a9befb81840bd4c1dc442847c0f346ccda0a3df57d7218978a5ab7e55c519a

As of now, Ron DeSantis has directed the flags of the United States and the State of Florida to be flown at half-staff as a mark of respect for the victims of the Hamas terrorist attacks in Israel.

In solidarity with our ally Israel, he has also directed the Florida Capitol to be lit in blue and white, symbolic of the Israeli flag.

In further support of Israel, Ron DeSantis has proposed legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and called on other states to follow Florida's lead and make it clear that they will not be complicit in Iranian-backed terrorism.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2b5d06d073b2d9a54223f6ba81f47c7a27583ad9b45785b7c7a9befb81840bd4c1dc442847c0f346ccda0a3df57d7218978a5ab7e55c519a

Governor DeSantis is TAKING ACTION to ensure that the Iranian regime will not be filling its coffers with money from Florida. And as President, he will ensure that we refuse to do business with countries of concern.

After serving in Iraq and witnessing the atrocities of terrorism firsthand, this mission is personal to Ron DeSantis.

We must focus on what matters and condemn the antisemitism that is mobilizing this appalling horror. Joe Biden isn’t getting the job done. We need a President who will be disciplined, focused, and put the mission first. Joe Biden is not that guy, but Ron DeSantis is.

If you’d like to support his campaign, please consider chipping in at the link below. But please don’t feel pressured. This is a difficult time, and we understand if you do not want to provide resources to a political campaign during this crisis. No matter what form it takes, please know that we will always appreciate your support.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2b5d06d073b2d9a54223f6ba81f47c7a27583ad9b45785b7c7a9befb81840bd4c1dc442847c0f346ccda0a3df57d7218978a5ab7e55c519a
Support Ron DeSantis for President

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b864b82395e7a65c46a6e532506d6f9c5ffefa01db7459b01aaa3be4ab023536bfb36ab8b781f49387edbef491f96dbdb37e19914d73d621f

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2946367630a923ec689852caa3ca277a823dd2905413a5a76c638db521ad96552cbdb00171126b0ed7d6b38c31924f86b28f83577cff446d
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1bd81b9c75b01512e6e193918162e633f1644b1b2720dadb50a7c5939ddb9e43721329ce5d9914cb3822332a1bbbd6f043cf1fdd8b6d5ad049
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2b5d06d073b2d9a54223f6ba81f47c7a27583ad9b45785b7c7a9befb81840bd4c1dc442847c0f346ccda0a3df57d7218978a5ab7e55c519a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=bd7689db1b428f1b2b5d06d073b2d9a54223f6ba81f47c7a27583ad9b45785b7c7a9befb81840bd4c1dc442847c0f346ccda0a3df57d7218978a5ab7e55c519a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Join Us in Shaping Our Future
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/alfonsoforcongressmi4 | | | | |
---
|
---
# In order for the House to be in order we need Rep. Jeffries as Speaker, with our vote.
|
---

In the quest to make a real difference and ensure that our community's voice is heard, there's a pivotal step we must take together. It's clear that to get the house in order, we need Rep. Hakeem Jeffries as Speaker of the House. As we strive for a brighter future, it's crucial to recognize the opportunity before us. Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has consistently shown dedication to our shared values, and by supporting his candidacy for Speaker, we can stand united in our pursuit of meaningful change.We understand that we are the only race with the chance to make this historic moment happen. Our collective strength and determination can shape the future we envision, one where our concerns and aspirations are at the forefront. Let's come together, make our voices heard, and support Rep. Hakeem Jeffries for Speaker. Together, we can bring about the change we so deeply desire.
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=2431ffda8b&e=16d812e81c)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Growing crime calls for swift, tough prosecution.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/thank-you-12651540?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| The 2023 murder and homicide map for Memphis reveals an unsettling reality of our neighbor to the north. It also provides an unquestionable perspective to the challenges we, as a county, face due to our geographical location.

The dotted map is a result of what we have known for quite some time — that weak bail, light (sometimes non-existent) punishment, and the calls to defund the police in 2020 by Democrats are fueling the rise in crime and recidivism across America.

Crime is off the charts and criminals are undeterred and running wild due to weak district attorneys and progressive prosecutors.

And the Mid-South is not immune.

If the dotted map is not cause enough for concern, the wide-open southern border, in today’s unpredictable and dangerous world, should be. It is all exacerbated by an open border - from fentanyl to gangs to the evil that preys on our most vulnerable, our children.

According to the House Judiciary Committee, more than 99% of illegal immigrants who crossed the border between Jan 2021 and March 2023 remain here in the United States. And they are not confined to the border states.

At the same time, major violent crime has increased 60% in Memphis so far for 2023 according to The University of Memphis and the Memphis and Shelby County Crime Commission. And other stats for other crimes do not look much better. Major property crimes increased 43% in Memphis and 42% in Shelby County compared to last year.

If that’s not enough, businesses of all sizes feel the effects of record-level crime. The failure to punish looters and other crimes are leaving business no choice but to close up shop or move elsewhere.

We witnessed this with the Mall of Memphis in 2003. We witnessed this with Hard Rock Cafe just last year. And we are seeing it with some of America’s oldest department stores, like Macy’s. And if we are not proactive, it will happen here.

Our proximity to Memphis calls for an offensive approach if we are going to keep our high property values, safe communities, and good schools here in DeSoto County.

It is one of the reasons why I ran for District Attorney, and on the premise to stop Memphis and save DeSoto County. That means, to be prepared for the challenges of tomorrow, we need swift justice and tough prosecutorial standards for any and all crimes in DeSoto County. As your Chief Prosecutor, I will deliver instant consequences for lawlessness, advocate for robust staffing that will allow us to meet the demands of a growing county, and send a clear message to dangerous criminals that DeSoto County is not your playground.

I will do all of this because nothing is of more importance than advocating for our victims and protecting our future generations.
---
| [Follow Matthew on Twitter (X)](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=076c0c511f&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=1887998723&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=02c61e3fc1&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Peter, we need to have Rashida and Cori’s backs.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib are under attack from the White House for
calling for a ceasefire from both Palestine and Israel to prevent the
further loss of innocent Palestinian and Israeli life, instead of beating
the drums of war and pledging unwavering support for further escalation by
the Israeli military.

“The White House said Tuesday that statements from members of Congress
calling for a ceasefire in Israel instead of issuing their full support
for the country, following the surprise attack by Hamas, are ‘wrong’ and
disgraceful.’” — The Hill

Cori and Rashida are both showing political courage by calling for an
immediate ceasefire and being some of the few leaders truthful enough to
call out Israel–alongside Hamas–for its war crimes against civilians. But
we are seeing them face severe attacks from both fellow Democrats and
Republicans for taking this stance.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138909?refcode=em20231012-31283&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s ]It is crucial that we have the resources to support and re-elect both
Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush this cycle. Peter,
will you rush a $3
contribution right now to help us prepare for these attacks?

The White House and Congress have already begun warning us of their
intention to escalate this violence with further funding for the Israeli
military. If we continue to send unconditional funding to the Israeli
military, we are greenlighting the far-right Israeli government’s calls
for the ethnic cleansing of two million Palestinians in Gaza.

Our government’s complicity with decades of human rights abuses and
international law violations cannot be understated. There is blood on the
hands of the American government.

We know that a path towards peace does not begin with funding further
military violence and occupation that provoked this crisis. Congresswomen
Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib know this too and aren’t afraid to speak truth
to power.

In 2024, it is so important that we re-elect unwavering pro-peace leaders
who are committed to defending the human rights of all people equally like
Rashida, Cori, and the entire Squad. We have to protect the progress we
have made to elect progressive champions who aren’t afraid of taking
politically difficult stances.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138909?refcode=em20231012-31283&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s ]Please contribute $3 right now to ensure we have the
resources to protect and support Rashida and Cori while they endure
attacks from every part of the political establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138909?refcode=em20231012-31283&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231012-31283-footer&t=1024&refcode2=31283_1203867_l-4a2s&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=31283%2E1203867%2El-4a2s

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Giffords.org
subject: Guns have no place in our children’s schools
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Washington Post found that more than 1,150 guns were seized at K-12 schools last year. The real number is likely much, much higher.
#

Our children’s classrooms should be safe places to learn and grow. But a new investigation from The Washington Post shows that guns are infiltrating our nation’s schools:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231012-1-30&t=1&akid=6716%2E3935704%2EvdW8bi)
_The Washington Post_ ’s analysis found that more than 1,150 guns were seized in U.S. K-12 schools last year—and the real number is most likely much higher. According to their investigations, these guns were found in “bookbags, lockers, trash cans, bathrooms, cars, pockets, purses, bulging behind waistbands and hidden above bathroom ceiling tiles.”
Gun violence is a national public safety crisis, and it’s the number one cause of death for children in our nation. It’s up to us to keep the pressure on our elected officials and demand that they pass more commonsense gun safety legislation to protect children.
Solutions such as safe storage laws, universal background checks, and extreme risk protection orders are all measures that can help protect our kids. We need real solutions, not dangerous efforts like arming teachers.
[**We need you with us in the fight to keep children safe from gun violence. Please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help fuel this important work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231012-1-30&t=2&akid=6716%2E3935704%2EvdW8bi)

name: Emuni
subject: Ron DeSantis thinks that he can play by any rules, and he couldn’t be more wrong.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team, look at the headlines we’ve seen recently:
**The Tributary
Florida redistricting trial: Expert claims DeSantis' role broke norms**
➡️ A federal court challenge to Florida's congressional map featured expert testimony, alleging Gov. DeSantis intervened with racial bias in the Legislature's mapmaking.
**WTSP
Federal trial set to resume in Florida congressional redistricting case**
➡️ The lawsuit says the maps that were drawn in 2022 and were used in the midterm elections helped Republicans.
**Newsweek
Ron DeSantis poised for huge blow if Florida election map redrawn**
➡️ In a federal trial, DeSantis is accused of intentionally racially discriminating against Black voters by endorsing a congressional map last year which helped the GOP win four seats.
* * *
[**Governor DeSantis thinks that he can undermine Black voters and not be held accountable, but we know that won’t be the case. When people like DeSantis try to undermine Black opportunity districts, we must let our voices be here. As we watch this unfold, your continued efforts to support grassroots organizations like All On The Line truly matter.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71443388/432144288/-1935232227?refcode=20231012_AOTL_F_FLRules_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTk1ZjAxLTEwNjktZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8gixuxltOTarUcuexlvWWM2IPa5q9OmxIkXmI6XApkE=)
**First, **
Ron DeSantis didn’t approve of maps that fairly gave Black voters representation in their districts.
**Then,**
He split a congressional district with a Black lawmaker into two, an even more extreme move as a denial of fair representation. This took away a district that previously gave Black voters an opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice, and instead split their voices across two districts in an effort to drown out their voices.
**Now, **
DeSantis is being accused in court, and legal experts, judges, and constituents will take a closer look at his racial bias.
As we see similar situations happening in not only Florida but also states like Louisiana and Alabama, we see why we must continue to fight for our democracy. When we see politicians continuously trying to undermine Black voters, we won’t turn a blind eye. Fair maps are for all, and under-representation isn’t an answer we will take.
**[Will you donate to All On The Line today to help us keep taking on the fight for fair maps and fair representation?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71443389/432144291/-1935232227?refcode=20231012_AOTL_F_FLRules_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ZTk1ZjAxLTEwNjktZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8gixuxltOTarUcuexlvWWM2IPa5q9OmxIkXmI6XApkE=)**

Subject: the Supreme Court could END Social Security
| | |

**_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court agrees to hear a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**
**Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security?**

Mitch and his super PAC buddies have raised BONKERS amounts of money in the past year to stop Jon by any means necessary. And if they’re successful, Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye. BOOM: national abortion ban, lower wages, your health care gutted.
Jon needs your help like, yesterday. Hell, even if you already gave yesterday, he needs you to give again.
Because here’s the deal about this MASSIVE fundraising deadline, Peter — we ain’t there yet. And guess what?! ALL donations will help protect the Dem majority. Isn’t that worthwhile?
We need an extra push to get us across that finish line, and I know we can do it together. Rush an urgent split contribution of $10 (or more if you’re feeling spicy!) to help reelect Jon and double your impact: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-tester2023?amount=15]

Here’s the deal. If we lose Montana, it’s GAME OVER. Mitch McConnell and his far-right cronies would snatch back Senate control and wreck our country with their extremist agenda. That’s why he’s so focused on beating Jon, and why tonight’s deadline means EVERYTHING for the campaign.
Jon Tester is Democrats' only chance to hold this seat and protect our Senate majority. But ONLY with your support.
So click that donate button, put the pedal to the metal, and let’s win this thing for our future, our families, and our country. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baa-tester2023?amount=15]

About BlueAmp Action:
We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world.
We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits.
And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t.
When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.
Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.
So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia.

body:
An update on what’s going on

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71445963/432152725/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2IyMWFhYS0xMzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VW3HNgv_QQwG1OxZkKkZozWEu6LgDsTW23TTSl3WG7Y=&emci=6070964d-0e69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=9cb21aaa-1369-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, It’s been a hard few weeks in Washington. The hypocrisy shown by the Republican Party in the aftermath of Kevin McCarthy losing the speakership is not surprising, but still incredibly disappointing. Instead of taking stock of their party’s dysfunction and extremism, “moderate” Republicans are pointing fingers at Democrats for their own chaos. Then yesterday, **Republicans nominated Steve Scalise — the guy who refers to himself as "David Duke without the baggage” — to be the next speaker.** Scalise clearly doesn’t have the support yet in his conference to win a vote on the House floor, because we were called to the floor yesterday, then quickly adjourned. Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries made it clear that we are absolutely prepared to work with anyone who seeks the speakership who is not in the throes of MAGA extremism. Rep. Scalise voted to overturn the presidential election on January 6th and refused to admit that the election wasn’t stolen for _months._ We still don’t have a speaker, Peter, which means the House is essentially at a standstill. And "David Duke without the baggage” is the GOP’s first choice for the position? What keeps me going in these very scary times are my colleagues who, like me, ran towards the fire to rebuild after the insurrection. I’m not at all alone in this work. There are people in Washington who believe in democracy and are fighting to protect it — and there are supporters like you who make this work possible.
I’m incredibly grateful for your support, Peter.
— Becca

clean_body: An update on what’s going on | | Peter, It’s been a hard few weeks in Washington. The hypocrisy shown by the Republican Party in the aftermath of Kevin McCarthy losing the speakership is not surprising, but still incredibly disappointing. Instead of taking stock of their party’s dysfunction and extremism, “moderate” Republicans are pointing fingers at Democrats for their own chaos. Then yesterday, Republicans nominated Steve Scalise — the guy who refers to himself as "David Duke without the baggage” — to be the next speaker. Scalise clearly doesn’t have the support yet in his conference to win a vote on the House floor, because we were called to the floor yesterday, then quickly adjourned. Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries made it clear that we are absolutely prepared to work with anyone who seeks the speakership who is not in the throes of MAGA extremism. Rep. Scalise voted to overturn the presidential election on January 6th and refused to admit that the election wasn’t stolen for months. We still don’t have a speaker, Peter, which means the House is essentially at a standstill. And "David Duke without the baggage” is the GOP’s first choice for the position? Give me a break. The only sustainable solution to ending this chaos in the people’s house is to ensure that we take back the House of Representatives next year.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = What keeps me going in these very scary times are my colleagues who, like me, ran towards the fire to rebuild after the insurrection. I’m not at all alone in this work. There are people in Washington who believe in democracy and are fighting to protect it — and there are supporters like you who make this work possible. I’m incredibly grateful for your support, Peter. — Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

| We wanted to give you an update, fellow activist.

Last week, we let you know that Senate Bill 224, a bill to set the Pennsylvania 2024 presidential Primary date, passed out of the PA House State Government Committee, allowing it to be brought up for a full House Floor vote.

This bill included an amendment requiring voters to show proof of identification every time they cast a ballot in person. Creating a BARRIER to voting – something NPP actively fights against every single day.

**However, thanks to your support, the House voted down SB 224 with the attached Voter ID amendment. The House then PASSED HB 1634, which would move the Primary date from April 23 as it stands now to April 2. This is a clean bill with no amendments and was passed along party lines. It will now go to the Senate to be considered.**

We are absolutely thrilled that the clean version of this bill is moving forward. The proposed anti-voter amendment would have been devastating for our democracy, and thanks to you, it was defeated.

[**As we near Election Day and the critical 2024 elections, attacks on our democracy will only increase. This bill included an amendment requiring voters to show proof of identification every time they cast a ballot in person. Creating a BARRIER to voting – something NPP actively fights against every single day. However, thanks to your support, the House voted down SB 224 with the attached Voter ID amendment. The House then PASSED HB 1634, which would move the Primary date from April 23 as it stands now to April 2. This is a clean bill with no amendments and was passed along party lines. It will now go to the Senate to be considered. We are absolutely thrilled that the clean version of this bill is moving forward. The proposed anti-voter amendment would have been devastating for our democracy, and thanks to you, it was defeated. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. **= = = = Onward, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. **=** ****PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023**** Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 **** ** || || || ** New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project ************ ******

name: Prescott for Congress
subject: Russell Prescott Continues to Build Out a Top-Notch Team in Race for NH-01
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: October 12, 2023
---
| Contact: Derek Dufresne derek@ascent-strategic.com; 202-809-6013
---
| Russell Prescott Continues to Build Out a Top-Notch Team in Race for NH-01
---
| Exeter, NH \- Russell Prescott is continuing to build out his campaign with industry-leading professionals coming aboard the team in NH-01.
As previously announced, nationally awarded [Ascent Strategic](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PbuK66o3cBbTzR7ym7UpYaqSwz4qGGygrUEoYfGwFNPvwCarO11sAWdDjE-XLJlwXvA8jxnQfnSs4PgSgZqCq2ELmDfYh-8hSA==&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==) serves as Russell Prescott's General Consultants, with partners Michael Biundo and Derek Dufresne leading the operation. [Biundo](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PbuK66o3cBbTdX1hqkJKB-O6dlzxYfxmihWQBU7RnP3y3ZCAwi1VHoxqmYoxnfb-1qmJ1PhaZIoh0Ut6weDeBpcnLbJ3E-peCL8ii_b40ZmK3pHd27BQUMJpEyID1ohkzw==&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==), who lives in Manchester, is a veteran of New Hampshire politics and has run and won races up and down the ballot around the country. [Dufresne](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PbuK66o3cBbTZNEerynKoL4TkUQn7bj4YDpyIQY6jRQNkJe4YNEQy1ojEiAAvx2XBDC3z5Tgro9upP-iAFf3x3z3JiuBSVxjFzB_n_tLRViGqkOLRaaf-awoy16fcmxi-Q==&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==), who lives in Washington, DC, is originally from Manchester and a veteran of many New Hampshire campaigns. Ascent Strategic is one of the very few teams in the country who have a track record of running and winning multiple primary and general election campaigns in NH-01.
Handling paid media for Prescott's campaign will be [The Strategy Group Company](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PbuK66o3cBbT498xEt4iFF3pU2JVCIr11ZBmJFJCE9Hk0Ut2P3VHTxrlEbamoDckx4Fp_e-Lxo0u4zbkpUg-RWZIwMfmcitkDQ==&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==). Known for their creative advertising, they have been recognized for creative excellence throughout their almost 30 years in political advertising. They have achieved a win record of over 80%, and their accomplishments include over 100 congressional election wins.
Running polling for the team will be [Cygnal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PbuK66o3cBbTH6SLvARXimT0N72QS08fBi2-TTSFrT1XyjKdJWh-53Q-fSXFG9iTdiDhztVIrtpuoLvG46QW2YI=&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==), who has been noted as the "number one most accurate polling firm by FiveThirtyEight" from 2018 - 2022. They were also recognized as the "Republican Firm of the Year" by Campaigns & Elections in 2022 and the "Fastest Growing Private Research Company."
PAC fundraising consulting services will be handled by New Hampshire native Andrew Theodore of the Theodore Company. Consulting for more than 100 House races in over 15 years, Theodore has a strong track record of success and has premier industry relationships that span the country.
[Politicoin](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PbuK66o3cBbTR2kQ7YdeDZkCa3l7Zk2pqKY7JtVl_AvIuzaFRBn-yHkXMpeKiKFroZDj1O9sKL69zZ0MXdrDuM1GRPT8oGecsQ==&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==) will be taking on the role of digital and text message fundraising. The industry-leading firm has raised over a billion dollars and helped multiple members of Congress defeat Democrats in close races.
In response to the announcement, Russell Prescott said:
"Winning this seat next year is crucial to our ability to change direction in Washington. As a successful small business owner myself, I understand the importance of assembling a strong team to ensure success. All of these individuals and firms are leaders in their fields. I look forward to working with them to ensure we defeat Congressman Chris Pappas and restore fiscally responsible leadership to NH-01."
---
|
---
| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---
| ###
---
| [PrescottforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00150C1tHhSEKkda_hGXOtp0413u92GfcFF9a7-thjaHcJimhhFkRm2PZkt-x3lINCkC5BnRxoiw4ntGAoN8EMhxmMMa6jYn0gKw8XXE1NaI4tJqWpI9IuP2BGuCPXRmBb8sjTcOhuDtxGPKGotPtQGp_c0j09vcJkQ&c=D7J0i-W5rkU5aVMm1A5deeDTLhXcC8S3sDh-7nmE7YABjnRKW3eWfg==&ch=esdgLWoeE_RV2EuJTzUQF5VKgW7_Rr6YvcwD1uTbqRowRcw-qVyL-w==)
---
|
---

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Voter ID Law Defeated in Pennsylvania; NPP enters home stretch of 2023 election season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, career opportunities, and other updates.
National Voter Registration Day
Graphic highlighting voter registration efforts as part of National Voter Registration Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0165.jpg]
As part of National Voter Registration Day, the affiliated organization, New PA Project Education Fund was active in each of their centered communities across the Commonwealth. From helping newly-turned [https://www.instagram.com/p/CxYrToGyy0h/?&emci=6a439a52-975c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] 18-year-olds get registered to vote to guiding new citizens [https://www.instagram.com/p/CxY667JhWHZ/?&emci=6a439a52-975c-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] through the registration process, it was an amazing experience for their team and registrants.
We're thankful for the thousands of people both organizations interacted with as part of National Voter Registration Day activities, and encouraged by the enthusiasm we saw in every corner of Pennsylvania.
To see additional highlights of our work, check out a video montage here [https://youtu.be/M6S_LVCCauI?feature=shared] .
NPP in the News
Registering To Vote In Pennsylvania Has Never Been Easier, Thanks To Governor Josh Shapiro [https://buckscountybeacon.com/2023/09/registering-to-vote-in-pennsylvania-has-never-been-easier-thanks-to-governor-josh-shapiro/]
(The Bucks County Beacon)
“With more than 1.2 million people eligible to vote but unregistered in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, [Tuesday’s] announcement will undoubtedly help to close the voter registration gap, especially in communities of color where the gap is the most pronounced,” said New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner.
Pennsylvania to enact automatic voter registration at DMV [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/policy/2023/09/pennsylvania-enact-automatic-voter-registration-dmv/390408/]
(City & State)
The New Pennsylvania Project, a voting rights organization modeled after the New Georgia Project founded by Stacey Abrams in 2014, praised Shapiro’s move. “The New Pennsylvania Project is grateful that Gov. Shapiro has taken these steps to increase Pennsylvanian’s access to the ballot box,” New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner said in a statement. “With more than 1.2 million people eligible to vote but unregistered in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, today’s announcement will undoubtedly help to close the voter registration gap, especially in communities of color where the gap is the most pronounced.”
Pennsylvania's Automatic Voter Registration Applauded as 'Antidote' to MAGA Election Denial [https://www.commondreams.org/news/pennsylvania-automatic-voter-registration]
(Common Dreams)
Kadida Kenner, CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project (NPP), celebrated Shapiro's announcement as a step that "will undoubtedly help to close the voter registration gap, especially in communities of color where the gap is most pronounced."
Tweet of the Week
Twitter screenshot celebrating National Hispanic Heritage Month [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0172.jpg]
News You Can Use
A complete guide to the candidates for state Supreme Court [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/09/pennsylvania-election-2023-supreme-court-candidates/]
(Spotlight PA)
During Pennsylvania’s general election on Nov. 7, voters will select the newest state Supreme Court justice. The winner of the election — Democrat Daniel McCaffery or Republican Carolyn Carluccio — will have considerable power over the interpretation of laws in the commonwealth, and will help determine the balance of the court in coming years.
A complete guide to the candidates for Commonwealth and Superior Courts [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/09/pennsylvania-election-2023-commonwealth-superior-court-candidates/]
(Spotlight PA)
On Nov. 7, Pennsylvanians will select a new judge for Commonwealth Court and two for Superior Court — and all of these new judges will immediately wield the power to referee legal disputes over state law and decide major criminal cases. The commonwealth’s two intermediate appellate courts can affirm or reverse decisions made in lower courts. Their rulings can be appealed to the state Supreme Court, Pennsylvania’s court of last resort.
How a Moms for Liberty-aligned attack on library content is upending politics in Philly burbs [https://www.inquirer.com/news/telford-library-funding-book-bans-lgbt-obscenity-montgomery-county-20230928.html]
(Philadelphia Inquirer)
The situation exemplifies how culture-war battles previously playing out across the country in school board meetings have found a new front line: the public library.
Pa. lawmakers are still trying to finish the budget 3 months after the deadline [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/09/pennsylvania-legislature-budget-unfinished-josh-shapiro/]
(Spotlight PA)
Pennsylvania lawmakers are no closer to finalizing the state’s spending plan nearly three months after the deadline, leaving hundreds of millions of dollars for the poorest schools, student mental health grants, and more in limbo. State House lawmakers returned to Harrisburg this week for the first time since passing the main $45.5 billion budget bill in July. The Democratic majority agreed to support the legislation after securing a commitment from Gov. Josh Shapiro, a Democrat, to line-item veto a $100 million private school voucher program championed by Republicans who control the state Senate.
The City & State Election 2023 Preview [https://www.cityandstatepa.com/politics/2023/09/city-state-election-2023-preview/390683/]
(City & State)
Here are some of this year’s biggest races to watch – and what the results could mean long after November.

The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.

Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP

We're thankful for the thousands of people both organizations interacted with as part of National Voter Registration Day activities, and encouraged by the enthusiasm we saw in every corner of Pennsylvania. To see additional highlights of our work, check out a video montage here [] . NPP in the News Registering To Vote In Pennsylvania Has Never Been Easier, Thanks To Governor Josh Shapiro [] (The Bucks County Beacon) “With more than 1.2 million people eligible to vote but unregistered in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, [Tuesday’s] announcement will undoubtedly help to close the voter registration gap, especially in communities of color where the gap is the most pronounced,” said New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner. Pennsylvania to enact automatic voter registration at DMV [] (City & State) The New Pennsylvania Project, a voting rights organization modeled after the New Georgia Project founded by Stacey Abrams in 2014, praised Shapiro’s move. “The New Pennsylvania Project is grateful that Gov. Shapiro has taken these steps to increase Pennsylvanian’s access to the ballot box,” New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner said in a statement. “With more than 1.2 million people eligible to vote but unregistered in the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania, today’s announcement will undoubtedly help to close the voter registration gap, especially in communities of color where the gap is the most pronounced.” Pennsylvania's Automatic Voter Registration Applauded as 'Antidote' to MAGA Election Denial [] (Common Dreams) Kadida Kenner, CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project (NPP), celebrated Shapiro's announcement as a step that "will undoubtedly help to close the voter registration gap, especially in communities of color where the gap is most pronounced." Tweet of the Week Twitter screenshot celebrating National Hispanic Heritage Month [] News You Can Use A complete guide to the candidates for state Supreme Court [] (Spotlight PA) During Pennsylvania’s general election on Nov. 7, voters will select the newest state Supreme Court justice. The winner of the election — Democrat Daniel McCaffery or Republican Carolyn Carluccio — will have considerable power over the interpretation of laws in the commonwealth, and will help determine the balance of the court in coming years. A complete guide to the candidates for Commonwealth and Superior Courts [] (Spotlight PA) On Nov. 7, Pennsylvanians will select a new judge for Commonwealth Court and two for Superior Court — and all of these new judges will immediately wield the power to referee legal disputes over state law and decide major criminal cases. The commonwealth’s two intermediate appellate courts can affirm or reverse decisions made in lower courts. Their rulings can be appealed to the state Supreme Court, Pennsylvania’s court of last resort. How a Moms for Liberty-aligned attack on library content is upending politics in Philly burbs [] (Philadelphia Inquirer) The situation exemplifies how culture-war battles previously playing out across the country in school board meetings have found a new front line: the public library. Pa. lawmakers are still trying to finish the budget 3 months after the deadline [] (Spotlight PA) Pennsylvania lawmakers are no closer to finalizing the state’s spending plan nearly three months after the deadline, leaving hundreds of millions of dollars for the poorest schools, student mental health grants, and more in limbo. State House lawmakers returned to Harrisburg this week for the first time since passing the main $45.5 billion budget bill in July. The Democratic majority agreed to support the legislation after securing a commitment from Gov. Josh Shapiro, a Democrat, to line-item veto a $100 million private school voucher program championed by Republicans who control the state Senate. The City & State Election 2023 Preview [] (City & State) Here are some of this year’s biggest races to watch – and what the results could mean long after November. We're Hiring! The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate. Democracy Project Coordinator (Climate Justice Focused) Community Engagement Associate (Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties) Bookkeeper (Part Time) Part-Time: Education & Engagement Associate in Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties ( via c3 organization New PA Project Education Fund ) [] To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [] . Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition. In solidarity, #TeamNPP PA ELECTION DATES: Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023 Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023 We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate. Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023! Invest in our democracy [] The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible. [] [] [] [] Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Fellow Conservative, I won’t sugarcoat it. **_National Democrats will spend $100 MILLION to flip Texas blue next year._** If they succeed, we’re finished. It’s just that simple. **Don’t bother staying up late to see what happens in Georgia or Arizona. If Texas goes blue, we’ll lose everything...** And that would be an unmitigated disaster for America, with at least two more years of high inflation, open borders, and the woke indoctrination of our kids. Make no mistake. Texas is the most crucial battleground state in America in 2024 – and it’s a **MUST-WIN** for Republicans. That’s why I am ramping up my campaign into full gear early. **[Please rush your best gift today to keep Texas red and save America next year.](http://trk.tedcruz.-IYVeg1MYezxstvAY0A)**
