| | Peter, it's strange to think that a little more than a year ago, we launched our ESGhurts campaign, and virtually _NO ONE_ had heard about the threat of ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) funds infiltrating retirement savings. _Americans knew the threat of the Left’s agenda, but they had yet to learn about the radical Left’s newest “ESG” branding for their globalist agenda._**Heritage Action, with the help of you — our supporters — sounded the alarm.** **Since then, we've scored win after win against the ESG agenda:**
* Helped pass anti-ESG legislation in numerous states
* Supported a legislative resolution to overturn Biden’s Pro-ESG rules
* Forced Biden to defend his ESG agenda with his **FIRST-EVER VETO**
* And many more to come.

_**[>>> ENERGIZE OUR EFFORTS <<<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bf09e5249f05479786a81d263b1e3872&_e=UT8w9We9UfKmBs2D9ZuaW1xXODmpQDW8cgB1TkxHp3bv-ASWN4Asv1jXGfiGiuX_uovxmMKv92c3s43zEuSBvzKuVRMSC1PyCt4PaVkGJ2ojRSJLjfcSmVdAXY6lC8WNjSPfjFc_KdttOnB_URBSg8jQCrXjXQ-p3_3G1e79OkUGclUHDMFFaDRBf5RAhZZQ8yBaIbcW45PcLMiyo76jRPoEYuGziOBRl9XYVh0cVEZummBVXlHXrtqEDDN9q2s3BNcre3UOpj3-4iPAFkBiLxsF0jOJ4OWcpU_jEHzsNnWDerKnaijacJadi3wUoS3l59gPz0Oyso_Pxqxf9fag7OwlORZxBGWWm8P4zoKhunXc_Yx1Mc1fyu-sClbnaNNbAWB65X_ol4-UH3t_pwqkZ5iNV6ZnakoImfTHU6kjiskxh5x3EZuwHdP5ouCaMPOXTObxT_V7XJC_1Qjr95hwTg%3D%3D)**___ That is the power of the grassroots united and channeled through Heritage Action. Your support helped shine a light to the public on the dangers of ESG, and that public pressure alerted state and federal lawmakers to take action against ESG. **But the fight is not over. ** Our opponents will not so easily abandon their radical ESG agenda – they will change tactics and rebrand themselves. And when they do, _**Heritage Action will be ready.**_ **We're asking for your support to continue this fight and hopefully end the ESG agenda for good._[Can we count on your support?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bf09e5249f05479786a81d263b1e3872&_e=UT8w9We9UfKmBs2D9ZuaW1xXODmpQDW8cgB1TkxHp3bv-ASWN4Asv1jXGfiGiuX_uovxmMKv92c3s43zEuSBvzKuVRMSC1PyCt4PaVkGJ2ojRSJLjfcSmVdAXY6lC8WNjSPfjFc_KdttOnB_URBSg8jQCrXjXQ-p3_3G1e79OkUGclUHDMFFaDRBf5RAhZZQ8yBaIbcW45PcLMiyo76jRPoEYuGziOBRl9XYVh0cVEZummBVXlHXrtqEDDN9q2s3BNcre3UOpj3-4iPAFkBiLxsF0jOJ4OWcpU_jEHzsNnW3VaXU2vEiPPS1S_6XVyUa3oNhq9iVyAB9WmEAip3jod-an3Z9Xb_cZKM9z968IPKQiuQrIYJw8A_mh5_DsU6wnCzputruZ8dJJntBQ5c6EZgMY7WfXrMmTn5gOpXjs0M5xHn0Mcpci0xvQ7pQIjP4drRR-oOMiw0ymVUgOfVouw%3D%3D)_** _**[>> YES, I’M IN! <<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=bf09e5249f05479786a81d263b1e3872&_e=UT8w9We9UfKmBs2D9ZuaW1xXODmpQDW8cgB1TkxHp3bv-ASWN4Asv1jXGfiGiuX_uovxmMKv92c3s43zEuSBvzKuVRMSC1PyCt4PaVkGJ2ojRSJLjfcSmVdAXY6lC8WNjSPfjFc_KdttOnB_URBSg8jQCrXjXQ-p3_3G1e79OkUGclUHDMFFaDRBf5RAhZZQ8yBaIbcW45PcLMiyo76jRPoEYuGziOBRl9XYVh0cVEZummBVXlHXrtqEDDN9q2s3BNcre3UOpj3-4iPAFkBiLxsF0jOJ4OWcpU_jEHzsNnUEYVoN8AVOaqP6FIwp_HKmSwJ0vI7HW8zwor2BnY1qMkkkV_1uUkf4xJs9bQcU2rBrDEJ-t5MqKozBZ7lkIMn7IyJu6wYQlD0HvEFPLWNsf8QPRDERg3Kmyu3aY7LaQY7RurC_Bna9WATYI2e95XyMtpW6UnEHKnMOF3RQJ7nFvw%3D%3D)**_ Thank you,Ryan Walker Executive Vice PresidentHeritage Action

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: She's going to lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cfb506d9d6524ed6af7948ecef1a8fa5&_e=IX9GsWapZGW6DX9-kyRVvpTIZV4fbjat8uPf7UlxHl3vffSykVfpQ48kf-0peEjPFIyApLuEGX21EVZu4aaHEo9aGC3PHHGmMwoXqiu5jfS_BuLJogwSifDFaPyzXxi2tM2UXAbD14DA4Ck70KnzWExcC9zsdH8StjQZlEE1XlePBdKd-neaGcnrUCZ11suln0WnhraaguaNQoowsvFCpIJI3rDcA0vzrw5UDiuwqghACi7vHlUIOESTPgRU-ynG4gcEtpdjZUSu0pVaL_k7ZmbqkPmhn_bt3RchhjyjsD4jQhz-zwfQB8X-BFe8L4qHBnBLOrrWbUoD4NEqOzqoOHqDOj3i_ukAuKKsRDpIpKw%3D)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cfb506d9d6524ed6af7948ecef1a8fa5&_e=IX9GsWapZGW6DX9-kyRVvpTIZV4fbjat8uPf7UlxHl3vffSykVfpQ48kf-0peEjPFIyApLuEGX21EVZu4aaHEo9aGC3PHHGmMwoXqiu5jfS_BuLJogwSifDFaPyzXxi2tM2UXAbD14DA4Ck70KnzWExcC9zsdH8StjQZlEE1XlePBdKd-neaGcnrUCZ11suln0WnhraaguaNQoowsvFCpPI84tTmkDrjyNbRguTJiALZhe78Vmiie5VZKapkuJmwXKIvtZQiLxPogpVBtQwYj-lsW258X6J8O6pW-vPIPhBCy504Hhh7eu756AxJ7pclowwM3hWz5d6dN_NnBJhWDT6sFATD7VyxR8vJZmThtes%3D "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>")
---
| Let's just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he's **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she's in danger of falling too far behind.

Pizza and Postcarding
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580405/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580405/]
Friday 10/13 :
Join Freedom Virginia and Together We Will Loudoun for a family-friendly pizza and postcarding event! These postcards will help encourage voters who don't often come out for off-year elections to get out and VOTE!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580405/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/586520/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/586520/] Saturday 10/14:
Meet us at 10am to knock doors for Travis Nembhard. Travis is a passionate advocate for working families and issues like universal healthcare, affordable healthcare, and improving local infrastructure.
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/586520/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/] Saturday 10/14:
Meet us at 10am to knock doors for the fantastic affordability advocate we have in Kannan Srinivasan for VA House District 26! This Freedom Virginia-endorsed Affordability Ally is running to bring greater economic stability to families across the Commonwealth.
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/580994/]
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/585403/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/585403/] Tuesday 10/17:
Please join us along with New Virginia Majority, Virginia LCV Education Fund, and NextGen for a discussion surrounding the issues that are affecting the Norfolk community. All are welcome to attend, please spread the word!
Click here to sign up via Mobilize
Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/585403/]
https://fb.me/e/7gZbUFkgW [https://fb.me/e/7gZbUFkgW] Saturday 10/21:

Click here to sign up
Sign up here [https://fb.me/e/7gZbUFkgW]

Visit our site [https://freedomva.org/]

Norfolk, VA 23513

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018

Canvass for Sam and Trish!

Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.

Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.

Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Mary Steady and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS DECIDED TO SHARE ALL OF HIS CONTENT VIA [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IIKXI_eEdCVl7NTKsMoclEK7vB20fzw7ywzh06lldAb-8_ZlgYByYs03KUokOh67uc0IuA045En1uOQ3BrPRX1WoiBUybwTxWcfHTmsnI2kzekwfPSsbF9O1jTAXLH9PObLJ3DKpN5gJGh4uftGTMXqlVk490Ywz&c=PdYESAqEkaP2YcEByMzsbRpM5-dkb61a_AcUQhAQp3jsTs3TakUzPg==&ch=-wGnbAr8js0yaGUynVSZKuHDioEUVaEus8xy9N3lgWYHWCPMQzsTnQ==). PLEASE SUBSCRIBE (FOR FREE) AND FORWARD THIS EMAIL TO OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
# Mary Steady
# Director of Pupil Services,
# LinWood Public Schools
---
In this episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Mary Steady, Director of Pupil Services at LinWood Public Schools. Mary shares her story of growing up as the youngest of four through the pursuit of a degree in nutrition from the University of New Hampshire and on to becoming on of the most accomplished education administrators in the state. She leaves us with fabulous advice for navigating uncertainty: take risk, learn from failure, get support from people around you, and be true to yourself!

Tune in to the conversation via the links below! There is also a video of the conversation available at [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IIKXI_eEdCVl7NTKsMoclEK7vB20fzw7ywzh06lldAb-8_ZlgYByYs03KUokOh67uc0IuA045En1uOQ3BrPRX1WoiBUybwTxWcfHTmsnI2kzekwfPSsbF9O1jTAXLH9PObLJ3DKpN5gJGh4uftGTMXqlVk490Ywz&c=PdYESAqEkaP2YcEByMzsbRpM5-dkb61a_AcUQhAQp3jsTs3TakUzPg==&ch=-wGnbAr8js0yaGUynVSZKuHDioEUVaEus8xy9N3lgWYHWCPMQzsTnQ==).
---
---
|
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Mike Dennehy, Public and Political Affairs Consultant, Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IIKXI_eEdCVl7NTKsMoclEK7vB20fzw7ywzh06lldAb-8_ZlgYByYtR1RXhIPuqFJG5MmqSkttji-iSwVM34pQ6OfRXYVgMl5qxB9cLxDgsvvAnJ4Zw_6NZTkYwpNjsSDYgYpNhHZllZrM4JkHZIdg==&c=PdYESAqEkaP2YcEByMzsbRpM5-dkb61a_AcUQhAQp3jsTs3TakUzPg==&ch=-wGnbAr8js0yaGUynVSZKuHDioEUVaEus8xy9N3lgWYHWCPMQzsTnQ==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IIKXI_eEdCVl7NTKsMoclEK7vB20fzw7ywzh06lldAb-8_ZlgYByYp7M-nG6pxFOHhrPJxI1Vi3PhqAZfB58vtpSTJuIlvnBhoVortHHuFX0bLAD16HmV3f6_PEPMd2ANhYSWko4nPcw47jkdVvDjlHFXFXqGMul&c=PdYESAqEkaP2YcEByMzsbRpM5-dkb61a_AcUQhAQp3jsTs3TakUzPg==&ch=-wGnbAr8js0yaGUynVSZKuHDioEUVaEus8xy9N3lgWYHWCPMQzsTnQ==)

subject: Bill Clinton, Barack Obama, and Joe Biden just announced:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
**[_Peter, this is stunning. Three of our Democratic Presidents just spoke out and called on ALL of us to thwart Republicans’ attacks on our democracy. And when Presidents Clinton, Obama, and Biden speak out -- we wouldn’t dare let them down. subject: Chairman's Video + Plan to Fight Crime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WAGOP Plan to Fight Crime is the topic discussed by Chairman Jim Walsh in his most recent weekly video... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fecf02fdfc&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Following the successful launch of our Plan to Save Basic Education, we are excited to share with you the release of our next plan.
**WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime** Below is a video from Chairman Walsh highlighting the key principles of our plan to fight crime. Our full written release of the plan is copied below.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c4da4be5bd&e=6a281f566d)
---
WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh's weekly video (10/11/2023)
Highlighting WAGOP's Plan to Fight Crime
| **WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime**
WAGOP HQ - This week, Chairman Jim Walsh unveiled Republicans’ plan to fight crime in Washington. “The citizens of Washington state should always feel safe in their homes, their communities, and at work,” said Chairman Walsh. “Olympia and D.C. have failed the people of Washington on public safety.”

The WAGOP principles to fighting crime in Washington State:
* Protect Citizens
* Get Back to Prosecuting Criminals
* Support Practical Rehabilitation
* Champion Law Enforcement
* Restore Safe Neighborhoods

The top priority of government is to protect its citizens. From Seattle to Spokane, Washington citizens are less safe in their communities, at work, and even at home. The headlines on violent crime in our state have become part of our daily lives. Here are some of the facts.
* According to a report from Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs (WASPC), murders in Washington increased by 96% between 2019 and 2022.
* Washington has the fewest police officers and deputies per capita of any state in the country.
* Washington is ranked third highest for total car thefts—and that number is rising.
* Between 2015 and 2021, rape increased by 51%—and that number is also rising.

The data points go on and on and on....

“Soft on crime” and “defunding the police” rhetoric and policies promoted by Democrat lawmakers and liberal judges are to blame. Our criminal justice system is empowering criminals, not protecting citizens.

As Republican state legislator Rep. Dan Griffey stated recently: “People that would do harm to society know the rules now, and they’re playing by it.”

In Olympia, GOP lawmakers were able to help restore some measure of common sense by making fixes to recent anti-cop and drug-possession laws. They are committed to protecting WA citizens and fighting crime to make our neighborhoods safe again. But there’s more work to do.

WAGOP’s Plan to Fight Crime includes the following policy proposals:
* **Hire more law enforcement officers** —not community safety officers, not social workers. And provide those officers ample support. The anti-police rhetoric needs to stop. According to _War on Cops_ author [Heather Mac Donald](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5ca2bfa2f7&e=6a281f566d), there is **_no_** epidemic of fatal police shootings against unarmed Americans. And yet, that’s all we hear from the media and Democrat politicians.
* **Allow police officers to pursue criminals and defend themselves**. WAGOP has endorsed [I-2113](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=efe0efa339&e=6a281f566d), which would allow reasonable vehicular police pursuits. Having more police officers establishes a visible community presence to create positive relationships. This prevents crimes from occurring.
* **Celebrate law enforcement professionals** , don’t denigrate them. For the past several legislative terms, Democrats in Olympia and D.C. have disparaged sheriff’s deputies and police. This affects how the media—and even some impressionable young people—treat law enforcement officers. And it isn’t good. We need to restore positive interactions between the public and police.
* **Get back to prosecuting criminals.** We need to fix our criminal justice system. Too many local prosecutors have become politicians first. Their focus needs to be on protecting their communities. We cannot afford criminals roaming free in our streets creating more crime and chaos. We need to prosecute crime and get criminals off the street.
* **Enforce strong bail** **and parole processes.** When felons are released without bail and/or strong parole accountability, they quickly re-offend. It is critical to call out bail funds, like [Northwest Community Bail Fund](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b0c6fb6165&e=6a281f566d). Michael Sendejo, 51, was found guilty by a jury in a King County court of second-degree murder with a deadly weapon— after NCBF bailed him out of jail, following his arraignment in 2021.

Left-wing policies that started in Seattle have spread across Washington through radicalized city councils, activist legislators in Olympia, and prosecutors who refuse to prosecute. The WAGOP and Republican lawmakers in Olympia are committed to restoring safety in our streets and stopping repeat offenders.

Victims of violent crime do not have peace of mind that their attackers will be brought to justice. Police officers are now the ones “handcuffed” as radical lawmakers curtail their ability to pursue criminals. At the same time, the prospects for our youth decline as they fall into drugs, gangs, and homelessness.

“The time for cheap rhetoric is over,” concludes Chairman Walsh. “These problems can be fixed. Troubles caused by bad policies can be cured by better policies. All it takes is telling the truth about crime and being courageous enough to enforce our laws. We’ve been timid for too long. Now we need to be brave.”
###

subject: Join me in supporting state Democrats
body:
We’ve got 26 days until Election Day, so I’m personally reaching out to you on behalf of my friends at the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee. | | |

| |

The DLCC is fighting year after year to move states like Virginia forward. In fact, they’re the only party committee devoted to electing Democrats to statehouses nationwide. But they can’t do any of that without grassroots supporters like you investing in this work, one donation at a time, so I’m asking: [Will you join me in supporting the DLCC by making a $7 donation ahead of their mid-month fundraising deadline? I may be biased, but really, here’s why we need your help right now:
**Reason #1:** With all 140 seats in the General Assembly on the ballot, we have a chance to flip the Virginia House of Delegates and end the GOP’s stranglehold on the chamber.
**Reason #2:** Republicans named Virginia a top target early in the year – and we’re seeing far-right megadonors dumping millions into vicious attack ads against our candidates.
**Reason #3:** If the GOP keeps control of the House of Delegates, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Glenn Youngkin said it himself – he would _“happily and gleefully”_ sign a ban if it reaches his desk.
We can’t waste a single moment.
[I’m asking one last time: Can you join me in supporting my friends at the DLCC by chipping in $7 or $100 to help us win in Virginia and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpaX6AbORulJXAkDw9PgQS2xu8HGYLp-E2qY2Y_53B93KKWUdhYm0TZF4n6AUQ39Pjpju4TMKFse2bQ3bPztsQi7hZOc6hNyvWDCvnIeetU3KW0w7JblesuchgVgWVxJGgR7wTL36FMTIXvzOic7YZ2KvkO26C9qsrHfIZGkKyFPreZ3cbdZV_6jTcepc7ixzWeK493I5kXHVgBShRs2JeFqHhf83u-R7hEESfWR711nqys5ITes6jLbRDozv5tozmiaAUo0siEHtw6HhtUXVBwadWuckRwtK6o7YJAYyOjxcROUXUxWzg8REnYbXlXlrOJezfwqVZhkNALPqtQuyWdvUpPHpSwtxnfNFjenvPGa0qBWoYqNsjhQCkV6dgcV6Y0G1X0B7n-FUi6CP4uO7kZc3mZA18UG-VLjvseMhIP2FTX9AfH6ZLCxA07t4xvIMc/40d/4sWxZCvdTsa_uEq5cqXdtg/h6/CGwHAF9nKnPjjbMWOYyPmdJxoxgBTtiVQvOqmW8_nKU)

The DLCC is fighting year after year to move states like Virginia forward. In fact, they’re the only party committee devoted to electing Democrats to statehouses nationwide. Reason #2: Republicans named Virginia a top target early in the year – and we’re seeing far-right megadonors dumping millions into vicious attack ads against our candidates. name: Bill Spadea
subject: [STARTING] A successful future
body:
Peter, With Bill still out on the trail, working hard to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond, we will be airing an
| [](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/7bd5269b243e7a4d3129e17c8d269f48/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVZzQ7eRCQWzUPUOTYdaknXZR0lE_97a0VdCrrOfO97vBEIlVDESwjhSjfP88EBg4XUEhXFjSJRPL5esGQ-c6CS6rI2TachHL-G38B8ZsHKc4AGjRbZbaM45fn6kPE8taQWxnb85_HZx5NsIp7BNP0UYy0p6a27hZBMh_OiUtpVtDeV5c9Eug1dt2jqulEnW6LKRVF1R7eSPVqB0BpV-Vqf4vDUTHcWxGLZ)
---
| Peter, With Bill still out on the trail, working hard to restore common sense to New Jersey and beyond, we will be airing an empowering encore episode of the Common Ground Podcast today at 4:30PM ET.
Today's episode is about **personal empowerment for a successful future.**
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO WATCH AN ENCORE SHOWING OF THE COMMON GROUND PODCAST (STARTS AT 4:30PM ET)](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/0fde76a61f339df5cb8e7c5c1e0195c5/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVTs4M3ERHRPESdY3OHWtJ1WUfJxP_eWuGpoOvM977HG4FQMkkphwDu9HBdDyzQWAolUFLUSGLl6-v6G8dzLKiEvCW66RQE49fwAsxnx9-uLaBBoUEO-zDK0iI55WmRGVIxbTr-83iOu3jiXZjmME0_xVgLinvjbiEg3eG8iAuzio66MvyVSLWBbZdNXTfyYkokX5VVd7Yr0aMRMKVQ8s_6DIe3ZnoCFS5i1w==)
---
|
---
| If you feel like the government is increasingly dipping into your hard-earned savings year after year, this episode is for you. I'll introduce you to my good friend and Financial Expert, Rob Gill of EPIC Financial Strategies, who is on a mission to set the financial record straight and teach you strategies that the government doesn't want you to know.

# Come prepared to learn proven strategies for success that have worked for so many people, including me.
There's a DANGEROUS lack of financial literacy in our nation, and it is by design. It is meant to hinder your success so that the government can keep you under its control. DO NOT MISS this opportunity to learn some new ideas that may be the difference between success and failure. Make sure you **[click here to join us now](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/5d96ed3a453236700e958c81ad4fb9ba/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVZTQ_eRERE8xB1DluHWtJ1WUfJxP_eWuGpoOvM977Hm4BQlpLSCgK408NxXLBAIxdKoKSolVTy19fxtsxlFtRC3hLd9gqC6Wt4BZYz83zfAhoVGuSwD6MsLZJTnhaZIVWpTcd_Hpc5qyfehWkO8_xTjI2geDDuDgLSPS6LKmFW0VHXhr8SqS6wbd42TSsvpkRWG173Z7sWAxpBqRTK6rM-w_GtmZ8Z8GLd) (our encore stream will go live right at 4:30PM EDT),**
Common Sense Action Team PS - If you like the idea of becoming more financially educated, you can [click here to save your spot for a free training that Rob is hosting LIVE next week.](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/9964551631a944308a5fb900ccaf2163/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62Lpy0V3IiKltQvRtYzTqMHpdJimYi39d8cHrhTcJifncjMAoxaaswpSuPItDCPwwKIkQ6h53mgW8rkNkziIAg8U6fPSNp2BdPh6_AEe4yCZxh5wb9Ahm_VsnmflcldkZe5II6zL-M8TBeHHs1jNsgLG8acYa-LFxblbSNl2-GhUkWvFW6scf2I2ber7x2aChuSBXLokoVq2gvFI2E5kU_t7UsrZhDGoq_crcuxfzvEOQ2Fn1A==)
---
|
---
| It’s time for Common Sense ideas and policies to dominate the landscape instead of the vicious and totally counter-productive partisan attacks that only serve to embolden the elite power brokers.You’re a part of the Common Sense Club because you know that we need RESULTS from our government, NOT RHETORIC. Many arrogant, elitist elected officials crushed our way of life during the misguided, unnecessary and deadly lockdowns. Now it’s time to hold them accountable for their actions, ignorance and negligence. The tide is turning, and today is only STEP ONE!

This year’s elections provide a can’t-miss opportunity to support small businesses and families with fiscally responsible policies, restore an education system that puts students and parents over the radical agenda of the NJEA elites, and protect and preserve our civil, economic, and medical liberty.
We believe that our government should serve the people and provide the expected services that we’re paying for! It’s time for government to function as a public service, not a propaganda tool for radicals.
We believe in REDUCING tax burdens on working families AND empowering the skilled trades and small businesses.
We believe our schools should reject Critical Race Theory and the sexualized curricula. It’s time to empower parents and stop the NJEA once and for all.
I hope you’ll join me TODAY as we discuss the results of this year’s critical elections.
If you want to stand with me against the out-of-touch career politicians who are taking New Jersey down the wrong path and help restore Common Sense, you’re in the right place!Please join me during my show tonight, call in to share your thoughts, and watch the results of this year’s elections live as they come in!
Together, we can keep working to restore Common Sense and save New Jersey and America.
Thank you,Bill Spadea
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/13967604/7b2d4c31ac88d897) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

Peter, There are a lot of candidates I could work for, but I’m all-in for Hung Cao’s race for U.S. Senate.

Here are **[five key reasons](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8977bf396e4f4018ac6f393abda7e258&_e=4iXUwK1bePvTwqEIoxVcsOwkbIcwGU10ohoVkmwUzZ_oC4ViUYqLF3fp2PFfNmiZNSbvJoIqdCbb_RNX3Q_H_4bIAkRs5VwQ2iwNIR_abWViggJKZUHeHNsoPMyNhsUynvAe8kxj3JAKN2Ygwj9nzWfGFMgW4mKFcsydGKqNXag_qnPzjYhnb-Mn_9xikrBEMHRAbPx_ZXohRrQB6ZqSRf3Awdoiya8mv9eZoxDG8fVSg5nJPBlaWkCiVI23aiWnRoXd2uVhRKZN0NZHzkFY9BBaMETmQwp5zMl8lYlewTPyVzVULZfGgB2Iq_DYTIwKvYQO57hFi3FtiwAQcyNT-X5-XCpMXihdjhRzSeffwL_YQYvJ5Oytgz3VBU2TmKTd) **why Hung is the ONLY candidate who can defeat Tim Kaine.

_But before I tell you about who Hung Cao is, let me give you five things he’s NOT:_
1. He’s **NOT** a career politician who’s completely lost touch with the people of Virginia.
2. He’s **NOT** going to prioritize foreign wars over the American people.
3. He’s **NOT** going to forget the duty he brought on the front lines of our military when he gets to Washington.
4. He’s **NOT** going to let Liberals take away parents’ voices in their children's lives and education.
5. He’s **NOT** the kind of pushover who will put aside his promises for one-sided “compromises.”

**[Now that you know who Hung Cao isn’t, we want you to learn who he IS. See five reasons we’re all in for Hung now>>](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=8977bf396e4f4018ac6f393abda7e258&_e=4iXUwK1bePvTwqEIoxVcsOwkbIcwGU10ohoVkmwUzZ_oC4ViUYqLF3fp2PFfNmiZNSbvJoIqdCbb_RNX3Q_H_4bIAkRs5VwQ2iwNIR_abWViggJKZUHeHNsoPMyNhsUynvAe8kxj3JAKN2Ygwj9nzWfGFMgW4mKFcsydGKqNXag_qnPzjYhnb-Mn_9xikrBEMHRAbPx_ZXohRrQB6ZqSRf3Awdoiya8mv9eZoxDG8fWVMmzm_A3FmG3Czg9JnQjVefCj_G8sQEKz1WNZ6HuZ0uigGZtrSoPfbeTOSmXTeoFThMjuWbqs8P0PCrubB9buzseHLRt4nFufZK3KiaqSmIHFIZs8rofc8kQ7BZJoxUnqy4qyzlR4SBpwuXPo4IVi)**

name: Sen. Chris Murphy
subject: re: the Office of Gun Violence Prevention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We must reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to keep leading our country forward. | | |
---
Peter, Last month, President Biden announced the creation of the first-ever Office of Gun Violence Prevention to combat the epidemic that is tearing our families, our communities, and our country apart. **This is a huge step forward, Peter -- one that is a testament to Joe Biden’s leadership.** Let me tell you: Joe Biden cares about this issue in his bones. He has been a leader on fighting gun violence his entire career because he knows how devastating it is to the families who have experienced the worst loss. And he knows what families like yours and mine are going through. Our kids are forced to perversely practice for protecting themselves during mass shootings -- a trauma in and of itself. This is something we don’t have to accept in our daily lives. That’s why Joe Biden worked relentlessly to help us pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , the most significant gun violence reduction legislation to pass Congress in nearly 30 years. This law funds red flag laws, narrows the “boyfriend loophole,” requires young people under 21 to undergo enhanced background checks, makes gun trafficking and straw purchasing federal crimes, _and_ provides funding to address the youth mental health crisis. The Office of Gun Violence Prevention will be key to carrying out this historic piece of legislation. _But Peter, our work is just getting started._ **To continue building on the progress we’ve made, we must reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to keep leading our country forward.** [**Will you make a $25 donation to Joe’s reelection campaign now? Together, we can build a future we’re proud of.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZMfJjR1YRsu2onYECWuIPGERAqR1hIndceQ2ng9uEZ0hriCjWXgYrdC12HsW4MjKgM24-IRNbAjWizjBSxWn6kKNAFN0vksljpILyOp2rx_Xi1J_rCzgkDVRXHyh62XcNQkOlBUJY50i1TT8fr1ZUA89ejea4efIZhvKJYZWLuMEen964y5TpYIzJHNKTLdGenYvNxBe4w-D_fsGc9P2Ti6KIoxh9J1Zx1E9Ro7WlWVBihUfWdjl2VfKj_jtAlQGx-uhw9xrrdGZEUq56rejt7We7DizA_3OrB_AwBOQ3lv53cQd8E8nIqyNfyw1kzC8CzxZ5AmE-ed8uHFKYc7-RwZkMh9ybwmplZPmvhNmvnFOmx1Frvby0HHVzVSwYMLa0mZZJo10LMfUY3Nxqnar3IA/40d/U6b2bFJ8TpyNZEspCjYszw/h0/2ijJb2q69Hyydduz-GiBKChMG415_jogO0EA4Sc0lgY) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: We must reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to keep leading our country forward. | | | Peter, Last month, President Biden announced the creation of the first-ever Office of Gun Violence Prevention to combat the epidemic that is tearing our families, our communities, and our country apart. This is a huge step forward, Peter -- one that is a testament to Joe Biden’s leadership. Let me tell you: Joe Biden cares about this issue in his bones. He has been a leader on fighting gun violence his entire career because he knows how devastating it is to the families who have experienced the worst loss. And he knows what families like yours and mine are going through. Our kids are forced to perversely practice for protecting themselves during mass shootings -- a trauma in and of itself. This is something we don’t have to accept in our daily lives. That’s why Joe Biden worked relentlessly to help us pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act , the most significant gun violence reduction legislation to pass Congress in nearly 30 years. This law funds red flag laws, narrows the “boyfriend loophole,” requires young people under 21 to undergo enhanced background checks, makes gun trafficking and straw purchasing federal crimes, and provides funding to address the youth mental health crisis. The Office of Gun Violence Prevention will be key to carrying out this historic piece of legislation. But Peter, our work is just getting started. To continue building on the progress we’ve made, we must reelect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to keep leading our country forward. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Peter. Chris Chris Murphy U.S. Senator, Connecticut

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=875a439fc8e840088339e847f2a95849&_e=OASITj-17wou6AXNZbMVZjX0C1HnuOBmE--TdDoU327_MtajE-ZrwY0xB4HL6WgdqizphhZH_41xPzQFBpSnFMbnvlrJLwqSIbjJNTGc15LtPy006vbMxooXIqtcJ6WHnbzwewtHQmjLC-EZUtMDAZOQmsa5XqQV2rzzhyEK6stsWdFGfTJdUXq7eMhnRJYcHd1vFWuRsEEt0yUyZix38rful6klZqtD5fKDdd857WMSJc3qS7zvokgQDgbwogRCR9k0b21w5GAUgaYEkPpLxr0GNsObrlCMStUeyeVeWzraL-1wUAAoIrf8cDW3bqq96CfF_3BnqpOOX_xNTSxbkoMyZxSHWY6WWBbVTqaaRZeZZ11qc6vyvCzYuowCbidtiQ8KA-X9Sd4pEnuHzU88hw%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

body:
Brett Favre is set to testify on Mississippi’s corruption scandal. The state doesn’t want voters to see it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71451647/432170974/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_231012RE_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNmYzJkNzYtMWQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Adg3Wq3w_vhJD6BGoYShLHcCkX4s_1zKQ8nhXd5VX5Q=) Peter,

We’re sure you’ve heard by now that retired NFL celebrity Brett Favre was involved in the misuse of millions of taxpayer dollars intended to help needy families. And we know you’ve heard that our current Attorney General has pursued zero consequences for the theft of those funds.

Now, Favre is set to provide sworn testimony on the matter on October 26th. And of course, _Greta’s opponent is asking that his testimony be kept sealed from the public until after the November election._

[Greta knows transparency and accountability are cornerstones of public service, and those values are nowhere to be found in our current AG’s office. Chip in any amount now to help Greta restore Mississippi’s AG office to the people:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71451650/432170979/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_231012RE_b1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNmYzJkNzYtMWQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Adg3Wq3w_vhJD6BGoYShLHcCkX4s_1zKQ8nhXd5VX5Q=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71451654/432171036/-456841951?refcode=BEB_EM_FR_231012RE_b1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzNDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNmYzJkNzYtMWQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Adg3Wq3w_vhJD6BGoYShLHcCkX4s_1zKQ8nhXd5VX5Q=) Peter, public accountability hasn’t been a pillar of our current AG’s practice. But this recent move to keep information on one of the biggest corruption scandals our state has ever seen hidden from voters shows exactly why we can’t afford any four more years of this AG.

Greta isn’t afraid of her track record and will act with honesty and integrity as our Attorney General. And when celebrities and politicians try to skirt our laws, Greta won’t hesitate to prosecute and recoup lost state funds.

The difference between Greta and her opponent is night and day, Peter. Mississippi deserves an Attorney General who will represent them, not special interests, and our current AG has shown she’s not up to the task. So it’s up to us to give her the boot.

clean_body: Brett Favre is set to testify on Mississippi’s corruption scandal. The state doesn’t want voters to see it. = Peter, We’re sure you’ve heard by now that retired NFL celebrity Brett Favre was involved in the misuse of millions of taxpayer dollars intended to help needy families. And we know you’ve heard that our current Attorney General has pursued zero consequences for the theft of those funds. Now, Favre is set to provide sworn testimony on the matter on October 26th. And of course, Greta’s opponent is asking that his testimony be kept sealed from the public until after the November election. = = Peter, public accountability hasn’t been a pillar of our current AG’s practice. But this recent move to keep information on one of the biggest corruption scandals our state has ever seen hidden from voters shows exactly why we can’t afford any four more years of this AG. Greta isn’t afraid of her track record and will act with honesty and integrity as our Attorney General. And when celebrities and politicians try to skirt our laws, Greta won’t hesitate to prosecute and recoup lost state funds. The difference between Greta and her opponent is night and day, Peter. Mississippi deserves an Attorney General who will represent them, not special interests, and our current AG has shown she’s not up to the task. So it’s up to us to give her the boot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for standing with us, Team Greta Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state. = Paid for by Greta Martin for AG Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General PO BOX 16402 Jackson, MS 39236 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Bob (Personal)
subject: An important rant!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
,
I'm not afraid of the trite name-calling. They can call me a "socialist". They can say we can't afford Medicare for All, but they're lying to you... [Read on!]
https://actblue.com/donate/bobfest [https://actblue.com/donate/bobfest]
I'm having a rally next week in support of Medicare for All, and whether you attend or not (I hope you do!), today I'm asking for your support [https://actblue.com/donate/bobfest] to advocate for reform. Anything helps. Thank you, Friend.
CONTRIBUTE [https://actblue.com/donate/bobfest]
,
Take it from me. I have over 40 years of experience in the medical field — on the administrative and provider side — working with patients, billing, doctors, and nurses. I've taught thousands of doctors nationwide, traveling internationally and working with the VA. I've read every study on the costs...
Anyone who says we can't afford Medicare for All or calls it socialism is just full of it.
Of course, it isn't free! It's a wise investment in the American people. Imagine never worrying about going broke over a medical bill, and if not for you, your children or grandchildren.
Every other developed country in the world has figured this out, and I know damn well we have the capability and grit to get it done.
Let's be real on this — 42% of cancer patients go bankrupt within two years of treatment. Forty-two percent! It's a national disgrace.
You should be mad about this. If universal healthcare is good enough for our Congress and Senate, why the hell isn't it good enough for every American?
Don't believe the lies. We can do this. We must do this! We can cover every single American and save billions doing it. Join me in this fight. [https://actblue.com/donate/bobfest]
With deep gratitude,
v/r
Bob
Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Endorsed by the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
Peter, Derek was just endorsed by the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, IBEW Local 47 and IBEW Local 477!
The working people of IBEW are powering California life. Like all workers, they deserve good wages, robust benefits, and a voice in their workplace.
Derek believes that workers in this country shouldn’t have to struggle to keep a roof over their heads, feed their families, or pay for necessary health care. He fights for economic justice for workers while his opponent, funded by big corporate PACs, votes against the interests of the people that keep this country running.
**Our movement for livable wages, healthcare for all and robust workers’ rights needs your help to keep up with the deep pockets of the anti-worker agenda.**
[**Stand with working people who are powering the nation and help flip the House blue. Pitch in $27 or more to my campaign for Congress today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrpkefthXTA5uyXZfaumbkz0B8jEz1StRWiqkkXyNrD7BtYfzByuYNdq6Ok-LFsFPY0ektp_hlXlMYoFcwoXd1rfA6TMtSQAiuxmdUAZMLtxP__veiv337JPcdKckWhrhB7N0sz4hIbgoUaW00JGSAKmy_qIRroIG9lzoSe2T9l9kiyetN0xZWxm4k_F34fweN9Ufchws5bOzTe6z0AHi37SFLvC5XqsJWkGilv_KFjTyp4zfsl7IRlbZPY4KYdjRJLRH6-1_t8C3ce3GsIzb3XAairivTYpH5ZKC7fUbE_lyAKf-Rra5ldB1xod88riTrldgTs7-G0omYl6xLIY1H8ghKuTfjSESep_WMBTjAmgdDOGvJo_B-rqsPrtwr7naC/40d/-DDK3CndT26MWRj3Rer54w/h0/f1MvJGkvGFuDyiU94K1Fy56aDiSrxw5oMHKiqk65C7U) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Peter, Derek was just endorsed by the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, IBEW Local 47 and IBEW Local 477! The working people of IBEW are powering California life. Like all workers, they deserve good wages, robust benefits, and a voice in their workplace. Derek believes that workers in this country shouldn’t have to struggle to keep a roof over their heads, feed their families, or pay for necessary health care. He fights for economic justice for workers while his opponent, funded by big corporate PACs, votes against the interests of the people that keep this country running. Our movement for livable wages, healthcare for all and robust workers’ rights needs your help to keep up with the deep pockets of the anti-worker agenda. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. People power is what powers the future and positive change. Working people who are moving us forward deserve their fair share. Derek stands with the IBEW, and he works to strengthen and expand unions as well as fights for livable wages, benefits, and rights. We are running a grassroots campaign that requires your help to keep us in the fight. Since we’re not taking corporate PAC money, we depend on generous donors like you. unity there is strength, Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. name: Angela (iPhone)
subject: tough call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
I just got off the phone with my campaign team,
Peter, and I had to make a tough
call.

Here’s the problem: Our multi-millionaire opponent has committed to
spending tens of millions of dollars of his own money in this race, and
his massive spending advantage means he’s already running ads to voters.

Here’s the solution: To counter his ad spending, I told my team we’re
going to ramp up our digital program ahead of schedule — even though that
means burning through our budget faster than we’d initially planned.

It was a tough call,
Peter, but I’m confident that it’s
the right one. I honestly believe that this grassroots team is up to the
challenge, and it’s our not-so-secret weapon that can outmaneuver the tens
of millions he’s got to burn.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7124?t=1007&amount=25&akid=559%2E52803%2E8lXBz3 ]Can I count on you to have my back by chipping in a grassroots donation
of whatever you can afford to help us boost our digital program so our
Maryland-first message can cut through all the noise?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7124?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=559%2E52803%2E8lXBz3 ]Chip in $25

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7124?t=1013&amount=35&akid=559%2E52803%2E8lXBz3 ]Other Amount

Thanks, Peter —
I know I can count on you!

—Angela

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This atrocity is personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3cffbba70a85702e720e0b1a237f1dc705ba50c4324589b8f60d705a1f33bc2659dd6b017daa0d1405df3cc3add7e13624efbbb05d9730e22f7e1cb4158c8956f8d5b1d2bbceee6b3353a43862ffa28f

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade915171566b027cd00fa4291ab74c5f688a19776a60168d8e375a29a4c8e2d2c9326556e868b6497565788735eb1cfc8ed66127ab2b0db88c42

Friend,

The atrocity we’re seeing unfold in Israel is personal to me.

I served in Iraq starting in 2007 and the casualties our troops suffered were at the hands of Iranian-backed Shia militias. American troops were killed, and Iran was responsible. In 1983, through Hezbollah, American Marines were bombed in their barracks in Beirut, and Iran was responsible.

The Iranian regime has American blood on its hands, and it is their religious and ideological worldview to continue to fund terrorists. We should be turning every screw to make sure that they are not getting a penny of our resources flowing into their terrorist-backing coffers.

We should be standing with our ally Israel as they root out Hamas. Joe Biden should not be considering any sort of practical rapprochement with a regime who is funding barbarous murder, rape, kidnapping, and the beheading of babies. It's absolutely despicable.

Here in Florida, I am using every available resource to support Israelis and cut off every source of funding for the Iranians. We are strengthening our sanctions and reinforcing our commitment to do no business with state sponsors of terrorists.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade915171566b027cd00fa4291ab74c5f688a19776a60168d8e375a29a4c8e2d2c9326556e868b6497565788735eb1cfc8ed66127ab2b0db88c42

This is something that we should all agree on, unanimously. This is not a party issue. Our country should be drying up Iran’s ability to fund terrorism.

This is personal to me. This is personal to my state. With the second largest Israeli-American population in the country, the people across the communities I serve have friends and family members that have either gone missing or been brutally murdered in recent days. These emotions are raw.

As President, I would not be okay with the liberal institutions across this country siding with Hamas and leading pro-Hamas demonstrations. I would be reversing Biden’s disastrous open-border policies so that terrorists could not attack our vulnerabilities and enter our country armed with weapons, drugs, and intent to harm. And we would be expanding our sanctions so that American money never lines the pockets of the terrorist-backing Iranian regime.

We must focus on what matters and condemn the antisemitism mobilizing this appalling horror. Joe Biden isn’t getting the job done. We need a President who is going to be disciplined, focused, and put the mission first. Joe Biden is not that guy, but I am. When I am President, we will use every available resource to end the facilitation of these despicable acts.

If you’d like to support my campaign, please consider chipping in at the link below. Please, don't feel pressured. This time is difficult time and I understand if you do not want to provide resources to a political campaign during this crisis. Please know that I will always appreciate your support, no matter what form it takes.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade915171566b027cd00fa4291ab74c5f688a19776a60168d8e375a29a4c8e2d2c9326556e868b6497565788735eb1cfc8ed66127ab2b0db88c42
Support Ron DeSantis for President

I know this is personal, and we won’t sit idly by. We will stand with Israel; not just today, not just tomorrow, but always.

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade915171566b027cd00fa4291ab74c5f688a19776a60168d8e375a29a4c8e2d2c9326556e868b6497565788735eb1cfc8ed66127ab2b0db88c42

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade919e1e604c4d9b5f04615533f314c607bb9013850efce5c17c6114ed2749ea8587cde39c2291b64488583caf1923804c6ec0d5cac05a147a87

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade919c1439e9ac7197c8570d25f8de2e470df99bb087ace9ee700b5ecc7d30674823adb7e07d171b5d720c25b919816609bf14e5d3a8134b75ef
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade910b274fa3a33537cf0692a5fbf1aec00b7ad9385e7889cb0af6ec902e0a7fc29e634d3827fb857da6c0d5e8fdf02ba63135d482d783dea78d
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade915171566b027cd00fa4291ab74c5f688a19776a60168d8e375a29a4c8e2d2c9326556e868b6497565788735eb1cfc8ed66127ab2b0db88c42

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=08233345edeade915171566b027cd00fa4291ab74c5f688a19776a60168d8e375a29a4c8e2d2c9326556e868b6497565788735eb1cfc8ed66127ab2b0db88c42

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, The atrocity we’re seeing unfold in Israel is personal to me. I served in Iraq starting in 2007 and the casualties our troops suffered were at the hands of Iranian-backed Shia militias. American troops were killed, and Iran was responsible. In 1983, through Hezbollah, American Marines were bombed in their barracks in Beirut, and Iran was responsible. The Iranian regime has American blood on its hands, and it is their religious and ideological worldview to continue to fund terrorists. We should be turning every screw to make sure that they are not getting a penny of our resources flowing into their terrorist-backing coffers. We should be standing with our ally Israel as they root out Hamas. Joe Biden should not be considering any sort of practical rapprochement with a regime who is funding barbarous murder, rape, kidnapping, and the beheading of babies. It's absolutely despicable. Here in Florida, I am using every available resource to support Israelis and cut off every source of funding for the Iranians. We are strengthening our sanctions and reinforcing our commitment to do no business with state sponsors of terrorists. This is something that we should all agree on, unanimously. This is not a party issue. Our country should be drying up Iran’s ability to fund terrorism. This is personal to me. This is personal to my state. With the second largest Israeli-American population in the country, the people across the communities I serve have friends and family members that have either gone missing or been brutally murdered in recent days. These emotions are raw. As President, I would not be okay with the liberal institutions across this country siding with Hamas and leading pro-Hamas demonstrations. I would be reversing Biden’s disastrous open-border policies so that terrorists could not attack our vulnerabilities and enter our country armed with weapons, drugs, and intent to harm. And we would be expanding our sanctions so that American money never lines the pockets of the terrorist-backing Iranian regime. We must focus on what matters and condemn the antisemitism mobilizing this appalling horror. Joe Biden isn’t getting the job done. We need a President who is going to be disciplined, focused, and put the mission first. Joe Biden is not that guy, but I am. When I am President, we will use every available resource to end the facilitation of these despicable acts. If you’d like to support my campaign, please consider chipping in at the link below. Please, don't feel pressured. This time is difficult time and I understand if you do not want to provide resources to a political campaign during this crisis. Please know that I will always appreciate your support, no matter what form it takes. Support Ron DeSantis for President I know this is personal, and we won’t sit idly by. We will stand with Israel; not just today, not just tomorrow, but always. In Freedom, Ron DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Team Cooper
subject: Mark Robinson’s shameful political stunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It’s tragically ironic that someone with a long history of hate speech against Jewish people would take advantage of death and destruction in Israel for his own political purposes.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71459172/432182145/823540626?refcode=ea.8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZmOGIxNC0yMjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtOtTiPAh1GUit5oHKDtKs3WbSxiBEwS5FDnheIhINo=&emci=da1f6964-1569-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter, This is an important email about the political stunt Lt. Governor Mark Robinson just pulled. Today, with Governor Cooper out of the state on an economic development mission, Robinson called a press conference as “acting governor.” It’s tragically ironic that someone with a long history of hate speech against Jewish people would take advantage of death and destruction in Israel for his own political purposes. We cannot ignore his long history of dangerous antisemitic comments that have made Jewish communities in our state feel vulnerable in the first place. **Mark Robinson is unfit to lead North Carolina, and his dangerous views are a threat to all of us. We must stop him and extreme Republicans in their tracks.** **[Now more than ever, we must reject the anti-semitism and hateful rhetoric long-espoused by Mark Robinson. Please, join Governor Cooper in the important work of electing Democrats in NC by donating any amount.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71459183/432182147/435245919?refcode=ea.8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZmOGIxNC0yMjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtOtTiPAh1GUit5oHKDtKs3WbSxiBEwS5FDnheIhINo=)** | [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71459185/432182149/435245919?refcode=ea.8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8bff8b14-2269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmZmOGIxNC0yMjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FtOtTiPAh1GUit5oHKDtKs3WbSxiBEwS5FDnheIhINo=)

Governor Cooper believes that Israel needs both our prayers and our support. He stands steadfast in supporting Israel and their right to self-defense and has taken action to protect houses of worship and other religious organizations here that could be targeted. He has also been in communication with the Israeli government to reaffirm our partnership.
Robinson’s political stunt damages our state’s reputation while Governor Cooper is in Japan bringing back good-paying jobs for North Carolinians, and it’s yet another reason why he should never be elected to a position of real responsibility.
Thank you,
Team Cooper

name: Jon Tester
subject: Here’s the part where I ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hello—
I’m stressed. My finance team just called me to let me know we’re still $23,736 short of our October fundraising goal— this is especially bad news because national Republican groups are attacking me earlier than ever before.
Before I explain any more, I wanted to ask: Is there any way you can split a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal? It’s important. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
So, here’s the part where I ask: Can you make a split contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to Seth Moulton and my campaign meet our mid-month goal? Your donations keep me fighting for regular folks in Washington, and will help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
We’re close to the finish line, and your support right now really helps me out.
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=xvIcAtjwxWwWcT1UIWIKH7yO5KXJ9kbpMRxtp5s1bMG0GkaSyIzI9V1zyBUa2YBKokc37lVMfsVJQaDN8xZDnGKU%2BBymXRmuBCHoQabDKkKkJweFurZMkiZ3LiAxGX9vd6ZDi53duTgxFDzLCXEg882ZuERyOrjb%2B3CHhjFleLJddaUvd5NyhGgZOvCt2adjJiBWI8MjqvFWupx2dwzHVGhWdUx84p9FUZlN%2FkODXr4EgwB6HsP%2BCu5Aj60iYkLYtPa4HsVK9k2CM%2BFEV%2FtWoOBw2iyXLNz4TdNVINtklpdg8qa%2FxnY2ACi98KJiXZdvtfuyQ%2B%2BUb4RWu5wtLq77KXCI%2BbDc8Dt8fM4F6su7%2F%2BHtVfhuPzi9%2FkuhfHwzCDbCSpbjIvEN5EjOKZ0ma7TIG58pWqgI0Hxz%2FHbJhvK6CVk%3D .

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
Mississippians deserve to hear from their leaders. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71463618/432186704/17860314?refcode=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM4NmQ0ZjMtMjQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=POy43mAorNswaPQOHHaMFsPiyekEUgKadJR_B2FYTjw=)
---
Look, Peter: When the NAACP invited Brandon to a debate this week, he accepted — because Mississippians deserve to hear from their candidates for governor. But Tate Reeves refused to show up. He’s too scared to face questions from Mississippians about his record. And he should be afraid: Recent polling shows this race VIRTUALLY TIED. Voters know who Tate is, and they don’t like what they see. **But Brandon isn’t afraid. He spoke directly to voters and answered their questions — and left a chair ready, just for Tate.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71463619/432186705/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM4NmQ0ZjMtMjQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=POy43mAorNswaPQOHHaMFsPiyekEUgKadJR_B2FYTjw=) We aren’t letting Tate off the hook for a single thing. From his refusal to expand Medicaid to his role in the largest corruption scandal in state history, we are going to keep hounding Reeves every day from now until the Election. [But we can’t do it alone. We’re facing a $130,000 budget gap ahead of our final public filing deadline of the campaign. Can we count on your support to make sure we can keep holding Tate’s feet to the fire?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71463620/432186706/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM4NmQ0ZjMtMjQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=POy43mAorNswaPQOHHaMFsPiyekEUgKadJR_B2FYTjw=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71463621/432186707/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.4c86d4f3-2469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM4NmQ0ZjMtMjQ2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=POy43mAorNswaPQOHHaMFsPiyekEUgKadJR_B2FYTjw=)**

clean_body: Mississippians deserve to hear from their leaders. | = Look, Peter: When the NAACP invited Brandon to a debate this week, he accepted — because Mississippians deserve to hear from their candidates for governor. But Tate Reeves refused to show up. He’s too scared to face questions from Mississippians about his record. And he should be afraid: Recent polling shows this race VIRTUALLY TIED. Voters know who Tate is, and they don’t like what they see. But Brandon isn’t afraid. He spoke directly to voters and answered their questions — and left a chair ready, just for Tate. = We aren’t letting Tate off the hook for a single thing. From his refusal to expand Medicaid to his role in the largest corruption scandal in state history, we are going to keep hounding Reeves every day from now until the Election. = | = Thanks for being a part of this, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. name: Team Engel
subject: It's time to end Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Wealthy donors shouldn’t be able to buy themselves a seat in Congress. Our democracy is founded on the principle of we the people , not we the super PACs.
But legislative attacks and court decisions over the last decade have broken our campaign finance system.
Thirteen years ago, the Supreme Court ruled in Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission that corporations and other outside groups can spend unlimited amounts of money in elections. This decision ushered in a new era of political spending by the wealthiest Americans — and left the rest of us behind.
We’re calling on Congress to end Citizens United and put power back in the hands of regular Americans. Our politicians should work for us. Will you join us by signing on now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GgJ1p47igkaTokswpKv0Xg2]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GgJ1p47igkaTokswpKv0Xg2]
SIGN ON NOW [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GgJ1p47igkaTokswpKv0Xg2]
Last year, we were outspent 6:1. This was mainly due to outside spending by super PACs for our opponent — so we know firsthand how Citizens United has corrupted our elections.
Kirsten doesn’t accept a dime from corporate PACs. She’s been endorsed by End Citizens United and will fight hard in Congress to repair our broken campaign finance system.
But Kirsten can’t do this alone. Will you join her and call on Congress now to end Citizens United? Super PACs and wealthy donors don’t get to control our democracy >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GgJ1p47igkaTokswpKv0Xg2]

Thank you!
