name: Ilhan Omar
subject: I'm writing to ask you to split a $3 contribution between Rolling Sea Action Fund and my re-election campaign to Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)

Friends-
I’m the first Somali-American congresswoman, the first non-white woman to represent Minnesota, and one of the first two Muslim women to serve in Congress. That’s a lot of firsts — but making history hasn’t been easy.
My story is a product of the American Dream. My family and I escaped the Somali Civil War, and I arrived in the United States at the age of 12. Minnesota embraced us with open arms, and my love for politics began as I interpreted Democratic caucus meetings for my grandfather.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.qRjEDB&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=2&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)
It was a dream come true being elected to Congress in 2018. Minnesotans had my family’s back throughout my entire life, and I was determined to have theirs. But, this accomplishment was quickly met with the sting of racist insults and attacks made by some of my Republican colleagues.
Racism shouldn’t be acceptable _anywhere_ , let alone in our nation’s top governing body.
That’s why I’m asking for you to support Rolling Sea Action Fund, a new organization working to inform and mobilize Black voters of all backgrounds, as well as unseating racist Republicans from Congress and replacing them with leaders who will fight for progressive ideas that align with OUR values.
**[If you’re with us, and you’re ready to help elect more Black leaders that we can count on, then please chip in a split donation between our campaign and Rolling Sea Action Fund before the mid-month deadline to help them power this movement.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.qRjEDB&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=3&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution between Rolling Sea Action Fund and Ilhan Omar will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.6fwGPA&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=22&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.a5ILVS&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=23&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.w4F5F5&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=24&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.lmElQn&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=25&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.D7yGcD&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=26&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-oct23-RSAF-split.CtTe_Y&refcode=em231012-1-t4&t=27&akid=609%2E791427%2E0AHgB6)**
---
****
Every dollar they raise will go towards year-round political investment and organizing in Black communities. It’s time to fight to empower Black voters, because we are the backbone of the Democratic Party.
Thank you for your support.
– Ilhan

name: Fred Guttenberg via Blue Amp Action
subject: The truth is...
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T480f15fd-06c3-409e-be7d-cc79d567b471/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T646c2200-5313-4ea2-b078-0dd9a52859ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter – It’s always hard to say these words: On February 14, 2018, my beloved daughter Jaime was killed in her own high school in Parkland, Florida, at the hands of a mass shooter who never should have had access to a gun. That day, Jen, Jesse, and I lost a piece of our hearts that no amount of time, thoughts, or prayers will ever heal.

I was devastated. And enraged. I knew that I had to do something. No family should have to endure the loss that mine did but, unfortunately, far too many have and will.

**The truth is, the only way we’re going to prevent future mass shootings and save lives is by electing a historic wave of gun violence prevention candidates to office who will have the courage to enact common sense gun reforms.**

[**_That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’ll join Blue Amp Action and me in electing one of those leaders: Dr. Brian Williams. Brian is a first-time candidate and trauma surgeon who treats victims of gun violence who needs your help so he can win an open seat in Congress._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad41d078-24a0-4d28-a9c4-4d39dc691f9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td85fce7e-a6f0-45ae-962b-ae52e887526d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In the aftermath of the Parkland mass shooting, it immediately became clear that the politicians and institutions my community had trusted to protect us had failed us miserably. For the extremist state legislators and federal lawmakers supposedly “representing” us in Congress, our children’s lives had a price.

But through that anger and despair, I found a sense of hope.

**I remain hopeful because of the great people I have had the good fortune of meeting over the years who are dedicated to saving lives from senseless gun violence. Dr. Brian Williams is one of them.**

He never thought he would run for office – but after responding to a mass shooting in Dallas, he knew there was work to do beyond the operating room. He then advised Congress on what would become **the first major Federal gun reform bill signed into law in thirty years and is now running for an open House seat in Texas.**

He’s a person who is putting himself out there because of what he has seen and he’s exactly the kind of leader we need representing and fighting for us in Congress. Dr. Brian Williams has been a fearless leader on this issue and will be in Congress.

[**_For all the families who have lost someone to gun violence and for all those families who will soon experience this devastation without life-saving reforms, I’m asking if you’ll join me in electing Dr. Brian Williams and a wave of gun violence prevention champions like him at all levels of government._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec1838d9-8318-4c72-a796-7588eae5f38e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91da9300-6d72-4d49-b1c7-fc908b62700d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you,

Fred Guttenberg
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94671662-ab21-410e-9588-8bdb0f563ff8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Kevin Thomas for Congress
subject: It’s too close for comfort.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kevin Thomas
body:
Sitting on the sidelines could really hurt our chances of taking back the House. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71464808/432188899/1420976906?refcode=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQ1NTAxZS0yNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpUCEFHdX_s3d_pgiY1acQu-8IdFJaUgHD39JF105AE=&emci=c319319b-0d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=37077096)
---
Folks — our House race in NY-04 is one of the most anticipated of the 2024 election cycle. **A Democratic win here could shift the balance of power in the House. It could put a stop to the far-right agenda in Washington and show the GOP machine that their money CAN’T overpower a strong grassroots movement.** But it gets even better. The media and election experts are keeping a close watch on our race because Kevin is up against one of the nation’s most vulnerable House Republicans in a district that President Biden won by nearly 15 points. **Even the _Cook Political Report_ is calling this race a toss-up. It’s THAT close.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71464809/432188900/1307708269?refcode=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQ1NTAxZS0yNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpUCEFHdX_s3d_pgiY1acQu-8IdFJaUgHD39JF105AE=) But see our opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, and his GOP establishment donors are already pouring their cash into this race. We can't let Republicans out-hustle us — not when the outcome could come down to a handful of votes, and certainly not when the stakes are this high. That’s why Kevin Thomas needs you in his corner, team. **[_Here’s the situation: we have a make-or-break fundraising deadline on Monday, and we need 500 grassroots donors to chip in any amount before then, to keep this race competitive and flip this district blue. Can we count on your support? >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71464810/432188901/1307708269?refcode=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQ1NTAxZS0yNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpUCEFHdX_s3d_pgiY1acQu-8IdFJaUgHD39JF105AE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | _[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71464811/432188902/1307708269?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1645501e-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjQ1NTAxZS0yNzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HpUCEFHdX_s3d_pgiY1acQu-8IdFJaUgHD39JF105AE=)_

clean_body: Sitting on the sidelines could really hurt our chances of taking back the House. | Folks — our House race in NY-04 is one of the most anticipated of the 2024 election cycle. A Democratic win here could shift the balance of power in the House. It could put a stop to the far-right agenda in Washington and show the GOP machine that their money CAN’T overpower a strong grassroots movement. But it gets even better. The media and election experts are keeping a close watch on our race because Kevin is up against one of the nation’s most vulnerable House Republicans in a district that President Biden won by nearly 15 points. Even the Cook Political Report is calling this race a toss-up. It’s THAT close. = But see our opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, and his GOP establishment donors are already pouring their cash into this race. We can't let Republicans out-hustle us — not when the outcome could come down to a handful of votes, and certainly not when the stakes are this high. body:
We are asking you — humbly, and respectfully — to chip in to Andy Kim’s U.S. Senate campaign.
#
Derek:
Every American is afforded equal rights under law and is innocent until proven guilty.
We’ll be explicit: The charges against Senator Bob Menendez are just that — charges.
For now.
But if a buck Private in the U.S. Army or the Marines was charged and found guilty of being an unregistered agent of a foreign government, they would spend the rest of their life behind bars.
And Derek...
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23-kim.2GQwuL&refcode=em231012-1-30&t=1&akid=17413%2E3013755%2EGN89Cr)
This man was elevated to a position of trust. On the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, he was privy to untold intelligence. Critical information. Information that could cost people their lives.
He is charged with selling that position of trust to the highest bidder — a foreign nation.
It is a betrayal. It is nothing short of a betrayal of our country.
Bob Menendez should resign. But it seems like he won’t. So we have to make sure we fill his seat with an honorable man.
That is why we are asking you — humbly, and respectfully — to chip in to Andy Kim’s U.S. Senate campaign.
**[Every dollar you donate to this email — whether it is $5, $50, $500 — will be split between VoteVets and Andy Kim’s campaign. We will do whatever we can to support Andy. And if Menendez chooses to run again, we will do whatever we can to beat him.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23-kim.2GQwuL&refcode=em231012-1-30&t=2&akid=17413%2E3013755%2EGN89Cr)**

subject: A limited opportunity to Lose Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)
September marked the end of another FEC fundraising quarter for political candidates. So this week, our team was disappointed to see the following headline: 👇[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231012?refcode=em20231012&amount=&refcode2=58_623276_2R34cz&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)
Despite claims of being grassroots funded, **_the reality is clear._** Ted’s re-election has been bankrolled by the GOP sending millions of dollars to defend his seat.
But it's not all bad news.
While Ted outraised his leading Democratic opponent Colin Allred this past quarter, Allred _significantly outraised_ Cruz by nearly _$3 million_ in the second quarter.
And unlike Ted, Allred’s campaign — like ours — is powered by grassroots supporters just like you!
If there’s one thing we’ve learned since launching our movement to Lose Cruz, early money can be the difference between winning and losing. With Ted's popularity at an all-time low, we have a limited opportunity to send our part-time senator home for good, but we can’t do it without you.
**[If we're going to defeat Ted Cruz that means we have to amass the resources needed to keep our movement competitive against Ted's deep pockets. If you're ready to Lose Cruz with us, can you pitch in $5 or anything that works for you today!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231012?refcode=em20231012&amount=5&refcode2=58_623276_2R34cz&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231012?amount=5&refcode=em20231012&refcode2=58_623276_2R34cz&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)**
Thanks team!
In solidarity,
— LCHQ

* * *
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-footer?refcode=em-58&t=2&refcode2=58_623276_2R34cz&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.losecruzpac.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.losecruzpac.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.losecruzpac.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=58%2E623276%2E2R34cz)

To give by check:
Lose Cruz PAC
1835 7th St NW, Ste 203
Washington, DC 20001
Email us: [losecruz@e.losecruzpac.com](mailto:info@losecruzpac.com)

name: Tim Sanchez
subject: It’s hard to see my community like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Sanchez For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_logo]
Folks,
As a child growing up in East Oakland, our spare bedroom was often filled with people who were down on their luck. Today, I'm disheartened with our community’s lack of progression. People still struggle to make rent, afford their health care, and put food on the table. Homelessness and crime are at an all-time high, and I know that many of us are feeling unsafe and frustrated.
While this issue is deeply complex and there’s no one-fix solution, I do know that the status quo simply is not working.
I am not in favor of criminalizing people living on the street. But what about the small business owner who has poured their life savings into pursuing the American dream? Their storefront, their livelihood , deserves to be protected. We all deserve to feel safe walking around our neighborhood.
I’m running for Congress because I plan to fight for our local issues at the national level. When I am elected, I will work to...
*
Establish
supplemental
funding
from
the
federal
government
for
cities
like
Oakland
*
Change
the
federal
tax
code
to
make
it
easier
for
small
business
owners
to
hire
security
*
Fund
a
mental
health
responder
force
trained
to
deal
with
incidents
that
require
a
different
approach
*
Pass
long-stalled
criminal
justice
reform
that
removes
qualified
immunity
for
cops.
We
need
more
good
cops
on
the
street,
not
fewer!
*
End
cash
bail
for
non-violent
offenders
who
have
been
sitting
in
jails
for
years
awaiting
trial
*
Establish
a
federal
housing
program
I am committed to finding and initiating effective solutions to address these issues and ensure the safety and well-being of our communities. Are you with me, friend? Consider donating anything you can today to help get our campaign going so we can make a real difference in our district. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_101223_crime]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you for protecting our community,
Tim Sanchez
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footeroct [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footeroct] Tim Sanchez is running to represent California’s 12th Congressional District.
As a proud son of East Oakland, a dedicated father, and a veteran, he knows firsthand the challenges that working families in the East Bay face. He is ready to deliver progress for all of us and continue the tradition of progressive leadership of doing what’s right – even if that means being the lone voice.
...And he’s ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/timsanchez?refcode=X_footeroct]

Today, I'm disheartened with our community’s lack of progression. People still struggle to make rent, afford their health care, and put food on the table. Homelessness and crime are at an all-time high, and I know that many of us are feeling unsafe and frustrated. While this issue is deeply complex and there’s no one-fix solution, I do know that the status quo simply is not working. I am not in favor of criminalizing people living on the street. Establish supplemental funding from the federal government for cities like Oakland Change the federal tax code to make it easier for small business owners to hire security Fund a mental health responder force trained to deal with incidents that require a different approach Pass long-stalled criminal justice reform that removes qualified immunity for cops. We need more good cops on the street, not fewer! End cash bail for non-violent offenders who have been sitting in jails for years awaiting trial Establish a federal housing program I am committed to finding and initiating effective solutions to address these issues and ensure the safety and well-being of our communities. Are you with me, friend? Consider donating anything you can today to help get our campaign going so we can make a real difference in our district. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] Thank you for protecting our community, Tim Sanchez [] Tim Sanchez is running to represent California’s 12th Congressional District. As a proud son of East Oakland, a dedicated father, and a veteran, he knows firsthand the challenges that working families in the East Bay face. He is ready to deliver progress for all of us and continue the tradition of progressive leadership of doing what’s right – even if that means being the lone voice. ...And he’s ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [] [] [] [] Paid for by Tim Sanchez For Congress P.O. subject: Why you should care about the Virginia elections

body:
|

Peter, Abortion is on the ballot this year in Virginia. Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin tried — and failed — to ban abortion after 15 weeks in the state, but couldn’t get it through a Democratic-controlled Senate. Now, he’s vowed to try again if Republicans take back the state legislature in just a few weeks. Republicans are going all out to win in Virginia, even initiating a cyber attack against Susanna Gibson meant to shame and humiliate her by publicizing intimate details of her private life — not at all dissimilar from what happened to Katie. The 2023 elections promise to be a bellwether for 2024, and show whether reproductive rights still hold the political weight needed to flip elections for Democrats. We’re hoping to prove to Republicans and the rest of the country that we have what it takes to win big next year. That’s why we’re asking: [_**Can you pitch in any amount today to help us prove abortion rights are still a winning issue? We have less than a month to win big in Virginia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71467029/432197418/1794220520?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMwYTIyZGMtMmI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C8tGs8h9Nj3l2YF3CgmWtlBFoVbRhu-yxRSVCSMiqfI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71467030/432197419/1794220520?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMwYTIyZGMtMmI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C8tGs8h9Nj3l2YF3CgmWtlBFoVbRhu-yxRSVCSMiqfI=)

Given the severity of these charges, the US Senate should vote on expulsion." name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: URGENT: The environment is facing an urgent deadline -- Congress is in chaos, and we need your help.
body:
__Chip in to hold lawmakers accountable. Your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >> |
---

|
Peter -- you've seen the news. After a last-minute deal to keep the government open for another 45 days, MAGA extremists are _furious_ -- they've voted to remove their own Speaker of the House as punishment for allowing a temporary deal without deep cuts to environmental protections and other programs.

**Let me be clear: this could get really bad, really quickly.** A new shutdown is just weeks away, and every indication is that extreme legislators will try to mandate new oil and gas leases, gut the EPA, and claw back the biggest climate investment in history as a requirement for any deal to fund the government.

The environmental movement needs to pull out all the stops here, because we are truly in the fight of our lives right now. LCV is gearing up to run ads targeting vulnerable Republican lawmakers -- but the only way we'll be able to scale these up is with your support.

**We need these ads to dominate the airwaves -- and for that, we need _you_.** [Please, renew your membership now to power our campaigns -- right now, it only costs $5. Give today and your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

| | **
** **FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW:**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**MATCH STATUS:** [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**Deadline:** 11:59 pm, October 31, 2023
**Fundraising Goal:** $30,000

**STATUS:** [Renew now -- it only takes $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---|---|---

**I really hope we 'll hear from you today -- because this is a goal that matters.** Extremists and their enablers often can get away with these kinds of attacks because no one with a megaphone calls them out. _Not this time._

We need to make sure that their constituents hear about the real costs to our planet's future and to the health of our communities if MAGA Republicans in Congress get their way in budget negotiations.

**Everyone deserves to know when politicians put polluters before people -- _but they could successfully sweep this under the rug unless we escalate our campaign._**

We're calling upon every single LCV supporter right now. With your help, we can make more calls, send more messages, and get more ads on the air urging members of Congress to protect the environment and reject any anti-environmental provisions in budget negotiations.

[Are you with us, Peter? Renew your membership now while every gift will go 3x as far. Even $5 can have an impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10076884&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDI3MTc4MgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDI3MTc4MgS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10076884&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDI3MTc4MgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDI3MTc4MgS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/6Lg6B~) |

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Kim?=
subject: 🚨👋 Catch us in District 34!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/catch-us-in-ca-34?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=0662f84838&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=ed76ec3683&e=fee98d637f)
---
| Dear Friend:
**✨ THE PEOPLE OF CA-34 WITH DAVID KIM ✨** I am excited to announce the beginning of our new street interview series The People of CA-34 with David Kim! Starting this weekend, I will be hitting the streets of CA-34 and asking constituents questions about their lives in the district and the issues that matter to them most.

My lived experiences as a children’s court attorney, and one who used to work 3 jobs to make ends meet, have led me to an undeniable conclusion: people aren’t getting their basic needs met. I am running because our current representative, the incumbent, drowns out the voices of his constituents in CA-34, preferring to listen to the directions of the wealthy few. This is why it’s so important that we make sure the voices of those living and working in our community are heard, and I vow to bring their hopes and concerns to Congress. Catch us on the street and keep an eye out for my signature People Powered jersey!
**💥 VOLUNTEER 💥** We can’t do this without you! We’re looking for passionate and dedicated volunteers who want to make a difference and realize our shared dream for a better Los Angeles. We’re about to launch our field operations, hitting the streets to knock on doors and set up tables to speak with voters about the issues that keep them up at night. We don’t have the funds to hire a large staff or large team like the corporate-backed incumbent, so every single person who joins our team makes a huge difference. Contribute your time to our grassroots movement and let’s take power back for the people!

Sign up to volunteer by [clicking here](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=393f67dbb4&e=fee98d637f)!
---
| **💲 DONATE 💲** Your generous contributions can play a crucial role in advancing our campaign here in California's 34th District. Unlike some of our opponents, I firmly believe in the power of people-driven politics, which is why we steer clear of corporate PAC funding. We depend entirely on the incredible support we receive from folks like you. I know that together, we can make a real difference. It is the ONLY way we can make history and create a California's 34th District that we can all be proud of.

**We need 850 monthly donors to cross the finish line! Can we count on your help to take back power for the people? ****[Contribute here!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=c932c16136&e=fee98d637f)**

It’s time for us!
---
|
---
| [Become a monthly $34 donor today!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=adf7f5013d&e=fee98d637f "Become a monthly $34 donor today!")

David Kim for Congress - CA34609 Saint Paul Avenue#405Los Angeles, CA 90017

name: Jason Crow
subject: Asking on behalf of Adam
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m all-in to help send Adam’s fight straight to the U.S. Senate, but he can’t do it alone — which is why I’m reaching out:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
Hi Derek, my name is Jason Crow. I don’t believe we’ve met yet, but for the last few years, I’ve served as Congressman for Colorado’s 6th district. **I had the honor of serving alongside Adam Schiff as a Trump impeachment manager.**
I’ve spent my life serving this country in and out of uniform — and I would be hard-pressed to find somebody who is more committed to democracy, has more integrity, and is more devoted to the rule of law than Adam Schiff.
I’m all-in to help send Adam’s fight straight to the U.S. Senate, but he can’t do it alone — which is why I’m reaching out:
**[Adam is facing his mid-month deadline in a few days, and he’s falling short of his goal. Having him in the Senate will be crucial to defending our democracy for decades to come. Can you chip in $10 to help elect Adam to the U.S. Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)**
[DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
I don’t say this lightly, Derek: Donald Trump is a demagogue and remains one of the greatest dangers to our democracy that we have ever seen.
Demagogues don’t like people who call them out, speak the truth, and challenge them — which is exactly why Donald Trump has made Adam one of his top enemies.
Adam and I saw that toxicity up close during the impeachment trials. Instead of looking objectively at the facts, Republicans chose to launch a misinformation campaign to absolve Donald Trump.
Trump sent his MAGA allies to attack us.
Far-right TV hosts like Tucker Carlson spread lies.
The death threats piled on.
But through it all, Adam never wavered in his fight to protect our democracy — even if it meant standing up to the President of the United States.
**Unfortunately, those attacks have only worsened: Earlier this summer, House Republicans formally censured Adam — with the full support of Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy — for his work uncovering the truth on the January 6 Committee.**
And now with Adam running to be the next U.S. Senator from California, national Republicans are throwing out every dirty trick in the book to sabotage his campaign.
The only way Adam can fend off these MAGA attacks and become California’s next Senator is by building a grassroots campaign. That hard work starts today.
**[Before Sunday’s mid-month deadline, will you pitch in $10 to help Adam fight for truth and progress in the United States Senate? 100% of your donation will go toward building a grassroots coalition that can reach across California >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JYMaWc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=oct2023_abs_em.JN6O-P&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=oct2023_abs_em.WRlR3Y&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=oct2023_abs_em.PgaZxK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=oct2023_abs_em.RMwRmo&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=oct2023_abs_em.IFk4qX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=13&akid=4228%2E5257348%2EMMa3E6)
---
Democracy isn’t a spectator sport. The fight for our democracy is too important to give up. Thank you for joining Adam in this fight.
Standing with you,
— Jason
Rep. Jason Crow
Congressman, CO-06

clean_body: | I’m all-in to help send Adam’s fight straight to the U.S. Senate, but he can’t do it alone — which is why I’m reaching out: Hi Derek, my name is Jason Crow. I don’t believe we’ve met yet, but for the last few years, I’ve served as Congressman for Colorado’s 6th district. I had the honor of serving alongside Adam Schiff as a Trump impeachment manager. I’ve spent my life serving this country in and out of uniform — and I would be hard-pressed to find somebody who is more committed to democracy, has more integrity, and is more devoted to the rule of law than Adam Schiff. I’m all-in to help send Adam’s fight straight to the U.S. Senate, but he can’t do it alone — which is why I’m reaching out: I don’t say this lightly, Derek: Donald Trump is a demagogue and remains one of the greatest dangers to our democracy that we have ever seen. Demagogues don’t like people who call them out, speak the truth, and challenge them — which is exactly why Donald Trump has made Adam one of his top enemies. Adam and I saw that toxicity up close during the impeachment trials. Instead of looking objectively at the facts, Republicans chose to launch a misinformation campaign to absolve Donald Trump. Trump sent his MAGA allies to attack us. Far-right TV hosts like Tucker Carlson spread lies. The death threats piled on. But through it all, Adam never wavered in his fight to protect our democracy — even if it meant standing up to the President of the United States. Unfortunately, those attacks have only worsened: Earlier this summer, House Republicans formally censured Adam — with the full support of Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy — for his work uncovering the truth on the January 6 Committee. And now with Adam running to be the next U.S. Senator from California, national Republicans are throwing out every dirty trick in the book to sabotage his campaign. The only way Adam can fend off these MAGA attacks and become California’s next Senator is by building a grassroots campaign. That hard work starts today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Democracy isn’t a spectator sport. The fight for our democracy is too important to give up. Thank you for joining Adam in this fight. Standing with you, — Jason Rep. Jason Crow Congressman, CO-06 | | 135 E. Dear Friend,
---
Camp Elah is our Let Us Worship/Hold The Line Headquarters in the heart of Washington D.C. We want to be culture shapers and reflect the light of Jesus in a seemingly dark place. Through your generosity, we are investing in people who are shaping the course of our nation. We hold weekly Bible studies and worship nights where we have ministered to Capitol Hill staffers, policy-makers, and others connected to the political arena.

Something special is going on on Capitol Hill. You won't see it on the news, and you won't read about it in the newspaper, but we are seeing firsthand that God is on the move! If you would like to be a part of what God is doing in the hearts and lives of the political leaders in Washington, D.C., **[please consider helping fund Camp Elah>>> HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c0caa6dab7aa450188809c3612b9d3fd&_e=Ux9-U7fUUB-9Z-aGOkCjlFEhKRIFA-6jur9xTpMaSB5Mm8Fv96D0oRgWqeab1pM5wRL2sLqStw_LTx--q9_WhMtcqhD3r_TRwXrtUReCjOfp5DWPgaX_xDa_cvwaSyTgUi5b7wcfJx9A0DJ2JbuHXRtDdKaAfCAWssIDuzag_HGW8m3KvdQ_AkLsx1kbAZWzHQj-ox-1AgMGqU-_rrxNmmlBt0Thm0UMbWlOUiGRC6GAjTwAkrRtEHGFCbSjAK3cAxx7sYPfzsRKxWvVdbu--I5BgDowVeN-9vHTDbx1x_OFoF_OpqHYqAOnJKn7Sz5ADWRcZgo3ZHNsZPtjtKXQFQ%3D%3D)**. _**CHECK OUT THE CAMP ELAH UPDATE⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**_

Look, I know $5 seems like a small amount compared to the millions Republicans are spending to try to flip the Senate red.
But it will take _all_ of us to keep New Mexico and the Senate blue — and thousands of folks giving $5 at a time will make a real difference.
We can’t afford to lose our Democratic Senate Majority — but Republicans only need to flip **two seats** to hand the Senate gavel to Mitch McConnell.
If that happens, Republicans could roll back our hard-earned progress toward tackling climate change and strengthening our economy, _and_ move forward with extreme policies like a national abortion ban, cutting vital programs like Social Security and Medicare, and more.
**That’s why I’m asking this team to come together to help us build a strong grassroots foundation and protect our narrow majority.**
**[Will you pitch in $5 — or any amount — toward my campaign’s mid-month deadline to help keep New Mexico and the Senate Majority in Democratic hands?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71467832/432200652/1329421977?amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGMxZWI5Ni0yZjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GK-ryUKI3QzB_9-8fciSI24zrPjlXYdzNO0UFOavQyQ=)**

— Martin

| | Patriot,

---
The special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) — who’ve already pledged $370 MILLION to try and stop us — were caught behind closed doors saying that they had “60 days” to take me down.
---
And now, with their self-imposed **deadline of October 24** looming over them and our LEAD only growing larger by the day, they’re panicking like never before.

---
In fact, one of the biggest RINOs of them all (a not-so-great senator from the great state of Utah) just personally begged his megadonors to spend _millions more_ against us in this final stretch leading up to the _FIRST_ contest of the primary.

---
As _The Washington Post_ put it, these RINOs are **_“alarmed by the dominance of Donald Trump.”_**

---
Patriot, even the fake news has to be right once in a blue moon, and today’s their day, because we are indeed DOMINATING. We’re leading the Republican field by 62 points!

---
**But there is only one** _**_REAL_**_******_mission_****: firing Crooked Joe Biden and SAVING AMERICA!**
---
**_And every minute these foolish RINOs spend attacking OUR beautiful movement is precious time and resources NOT spent going after Crooked Joe._******
---
_Which is why I promised you that we’d WRAP UP this primary as fast as humanly possible so that we can shift 100% of our focus to that one true mission._
---
But with only DAYS to go until the RINOs’ self-imposed deadline, now is not the time to take our foot off the gas.
---

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=56cabd5aeb0240b39ee18b32b25e3a39&_t=kZyJC4Kpsi-r6UXnQuzcM1Pzq6JW2-xuztriYHlpefdU-F5V2_Gj9B8dtADsb_7YfnokwGetLAx46K4gTNqVLF2PbQQh1To_qgtb9Z9kIws%3D)

clean_body: The RINOs are making a last-ditch attempt to stop us... | | | | | Patriot, The special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) — who’ve already pledged $370 MILLION to try and stop us — were caught behind closed doors saying that they had “60 days” to take me down. And now, with their self-imposed deadline of October 24 looming over them and our LEAD only growing larger by the day, they’re panicking like never before. In fact, one of the biggest RINOs of them all (a not-so-great senator from the great state of Utah) just personally begged his megadonors to spend millions more against us in this final stretch leading up to the FIRST contest of the primary. As The Washington Post put it, these RINOs are “alarmed by the dominance of Donald Trump.” Patriot, even the fake news has to be right once in a blue moon, and today’s their day, because we are indeed DOMINATING. We’re leading the Republican field by 62 points! But there is only one REAL****mission: firing Crooked Joe Biden and SAVING AMERICA! And every minute these foolish RINOs spend attacking OUR beautiful movement is precious time and resources NOT spent going after Crooked Joe.** Which is why I promised you that we’d WRAP UP this primary as fast as humanly possible so that we can shift 100% of our focus to that one true mission. But with only DAYS to go until the RINOs’ self-imposed deadline, now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. - | | Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: The White House is blaming Republicans for their failed open-border policies. | Peter, There were more than 2.2 million illegal migrant encounters at the U.S.-Mexico border in the first 11 months of fiscal year 2023. Encounters surpassed 100,000 for the 31st STRAIGHT MONTH in August, and September saw an ALL-TIME RECORD of more than 260,000 border encounters. This border crisis is getting worse all because of the Biden Administration’s open-border agenda. But the White House is lying and accusing House Republicans of “sabotaging President Biden’s work” to SECURE the border. They are blatantly LYING to you to try to gain support as their poll numbers plummet and the border crisis worsens. As we face this new batch of lying attacks I am counting on my army of grassroots conservatives to help me FIGHT BACK so we can work on ENDING this crisis. Biden spent the first 100 days in the White House dismantling existing border and immigration policies that were working to secure our border with 94 executive actions. And now fentanyl has become the #1 cause of death for adults, 98 illegal aliens on the terrorist watchlist have entered our country, and border crossings are over 3 TIMES the amount it was before Biden took office. But through it all Biden, Kamala Harris, and DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas have told you the border is “secure.” That couldn’t be further from the truth. That’s why House Republicans passed the strongest border security bill to date back in May and are working hard to END Biden’s open-border agenda. But with these latest lies and attacks from the Left, we are facing an uphill battle and I need your help to FIGHT BACK and secure our southern border once and for all. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

clean_body: We need to get back to work for the American people! | | The continuing dysfunction caused by Republicans in the House is bad for the American people. While Republicans struggle to elect a new Speaker, critical legislation is on hold and we simply cannot do the jobs the American people sent us to do. That is why it is so important that we take back the House in 2024 – and why it is so critical that you know about my opponent. Last week, my opponent officially launched his campaign, and once again he is refusing to answer any questions about his friends in Washington. The new faces of the GOP are Jim Jordan and Steve Scalice, neither of which will say the 2020 election was not stolen. We cannot allow this chaos caucus to have support from CT-05. Team, the path to the majority in 2024 relies on keeping swing districts like CT-05. We need to build a grassroots movement strong enough to take whatever lies ahead.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for standing with me, – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Time is Running Out: Virginia's Future is at Stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Georgia Leadership Committee
body:
Dear Derek,
We are less than one month away from a pivotal moment in Virginia's history. Every seat in the Virginia General Assembly is up for grabs, and the stakes couldn't be higher. As it stands, Republicans are just a few seats away from gaining a majority in the House of Delegates. If they succeed, they have vowed to roll back reproductive freedoms, among other regressive actions.
The implications of this election reach far beyond Virginia's borders. A Republican majority would not only threaten the rights and freedoms of Virginians but also set a dangerous precedent for other states to follow. We cannot let this happen.
**Derek, Here’s How You Can Help**
1\. [Donate to Organizations on the Ground](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71467998/432201253/919774290?refcode=partners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2VjNWYzYy0zMTY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uv148b7dEqUV16AGuiYJlCHLVkXrFmrexhHp34aoUgw=): Your contribution can make a real difference in mobilizing a diverse coalition of voters. Click here to split a donation between New Virginia Majority, Planned Parenthood Virginia PAC, and CARE in Action.
2\. [Donate to the Virginia Senate Democrats](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71467999/432201254/1405736801?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2VjNWYzYy0zMTY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uv148b7dEqUV16AGuiYJlCHLVkXrFmrexhHp34aoUgw=): Every dollar counts in these critical races. As it stands, Republicans are just a few seats away from gaining a majority in the House of Delegates. name: News Alert (via Courier)
subject: AI: The next information battleground
body:
Artificial intelligence will be the next information battleground.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469114/432205497/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=&emci=7bfa719e-0969-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=46b542f1-3269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
As artificial intelligence use becomes increasingly common, the information it provides — and more specifically where that information comes from — has come under fresh scrutiny.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469115/432205498/-932789543?refcode=em20231012&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=)
Despite asserting it as a “reliable source” for election news, **Amazon’s Alexa voice assistant has been claiming that the 2020 election was “stolen by a massive amount of election fraud,”** citing Rumble — the conservative “alternative” to YouTube that has developed a reputation for becoming a hub of disinformation and far-right extremism.
**This is dangerous, Peter.** An estimated _75 million people_ are expected to use Alexa between now and the 2024 election, potentially exposing **millions of voters** to these falsehoods.
In a moment, we’ll explain more about AI’s role in the information crisis but before we do: **[Can you chip in anything you can to power Courier's innovative model to combat online misinformation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469116/432205499/-932789543?refcode=em20231012&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=)**
This growing issue isn’t unique to Alexa. In fact, it’s a lot more common than you might think.
**Alexa’s responses foreshadow a new battleground in America’s information crisis.** The proliferation of AI and other new technology leaps have presented a new opportunity for right-wing bad actors to broaden their misinformation campaigns, reaching more people than ever before.
And since tech companies such as Amazon have long claimed that they cannot be the arbiters of what is fact vs. fiction online, **this makes our work at Courier to call out and expose misinformation all the more important.**
**[If you agree and want to keep our network of nine newsrooms on the frontlines of fighting online misinformation, will you pitch in anything you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469117/432205500/-932789543?refcode=em20231012&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=)**
**[Donate ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469118/432205501/-932789543?refcode=em20231012&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=)**
As always, thank you for your continued support!
Courier
* * *
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469119/432205502/1416945388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=&emci=7bfa719e-0969-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=46b542f1-3269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
[**Update Your Information**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469120/432205503/1324474970?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDZiNTQyZjEtMzI2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nkREudf_z1BKHJrwlLfzKTy2OjUQu-i_iVbEeYMi48M=&emci=7bfa719e-0969-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=46b542f1-3269-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
**[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XCUEQN0BTUWWQ1xBmQeS9g2?unsubscribedata=mTeQdG8cr%2FxbAKP%2FKb3Zxw15D%2BO4Q3SBm%2FJ%2FrUDPgCLxejvoKRPBJ%2Fm1AwbDseMg9Edoqo3dHduLnGef8vIhSjHFdQFt715pxtoNb7rl%2BoU2cqCyn%2B6Wmd4bNimReVFnD9sczObFNhUKOmZjYGf0%2B88%2BdkhpTzw0nGlYDz%2Brko2sz8Lu2NrGCBW2shRYnuod4tGTc4MgMLfes1NRM8lhQ8nFRtQax9nwEUUg3yIVxfBALzU9nOqTOm6UJbbsD0Dsa9yzGyFED6cGn95wzDxLENrhsbkCJKVHheTij1EZaMwiBmkWQc7X%2FZaGW3NInWw%2FtzsEx8xzszKD5b0YR%2FE2E5PK3x04mHfNVKATY3EdVJOFKumwHzenRH%2FN1KUbsSwYWJoY9pgCF4fUsMH2d3hjzVK%2FkYNPaHq%2BDvwjyRwra%2Fy%2FG0pAcY9so9OHOU2niyj9)**

* 6,400 Afghanistan Nationals
* 3,200 from Egypt
* 1,200 from Iran & Syria
* 60,000 from Uzbekistan, Turkey, Pakistan, and Lebanon

**2.** **151 of them were on the FBI terror watchlist **

**3.** **1.5 million** "gotaways" have crossed the border **illegally** without being caught.

This is dangerous and wildly not acceptable!

How many of the 1.5 million seek to inflict damage on America?

name: Team Tina
subject: Focusing on fentanyl →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Governor Kotek announced new strategies to address the fentanyl crisis in Oregon — bringing a focused and urgent attention to this dangerous drug. **With ramped up targeted law enforcement efforts to go after dealers, increased intervention programs, and a call for more prevention efforts to combat risky behavior by Oregon’s youth, Governor Kotek is taking strategic steps to address this crisis.** Treatment and recovery services have always been one of the three top priorities of Tina’s administration, and she’s also hopeful that more action can be taken in the upcoming legislative session to help more Oregonians. There’s still more work needed, of course, but Tina’s committed to getting it done. We want to show her this team supports her efforts, so we’re asking you to tell Tina you appreciate her work to address the fentanyl crisis: [_**Peter, will you add your name to show you support Governor Kotek’s crackdown on fentanyl in our state?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469662/432207236/1227549084?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWVjOTQ5Yy0zNDY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5k_aXuDb-E_w38GwHuwrsIfj-vVmY8AtDtUUyWdIjis=&emci=c0071105-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=35ec949c-3469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71469663/432207237/1227549084?contactdata=+f+F8Ecj1ws12AZSHc/aQtfz1HOabLBK26FZ6rDvHPNU8uQVGHR/2+Cww+oAEMKjOsQNiwg+w4SqhwC4k43hruHvWNwMGuEqEmzR87B1XHpKJVmTK6LWY63LRTNGGc6/kvvsUWGJkhq2CgMXn+JWlDxwlg5qelqtIAbuYocJYTE=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWVjOTQ5Yy0zNDY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5k_aXuDb-E_w38GwHuwrsIfj-vVmY8AtDtUUyWdIjis=&emci=c0071105-2769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=35ec949c-3469-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: We’ve never had a better opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain:
#
Peter — we’ve never had a better opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for working people. **Please let me explain:**
I grew up in mid-Missouri. Then I was an active duty Marine for 13 years. When I came home between deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, I saw firsthand how corrupt politicians like Hawley teamed up with massive corporations to strip the community I signed up to serve for parts.
So trust me: **I know what needs to change — and I’m not afraid to fight for it.**
Since January, we’ve built this campaign without a cent from corporate PACs so I can be a real fighter for working people in the U.S. Senate. We’ve earned support from dozens of statewide and local unions, community leaders, and elected officials across Missouri. And we’ve put a national spotlight on this Senate race.
**Everything we’ve accomplished together so far has been incredible, but now we’ve got to keep this momentum going.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38547?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe)**
National insiders and corporate mega-donors are already spending millions of dollars to attack me and prop up Josh Hawley — their most vulnerable GOP Senator running in 2024. They’ve made it clear that they’ll do, say, and spend whatever it takes to maintain control of this Senate seat.
**So here’s why I need your help today, Peter:** the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting back is by delivering our message directly to voters online, on TV, and on the ground. But that’s not cheap — and since we’re more than a year out from Election Day, we need to raise money now to both combat their current attacks and stay prepared for whatever they throw at me in the future.
**I’ve only ever relied on real people like you to power this movement forward, not shady mega-donors or corporate PACs.** I’m proud of that commitment, but with our first deadline of Q4 coming up on Monday, it also means I have to ask:
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward our goal of raising 5,000 individual donations by midnight on Monday? Polls are already showing we’re in a neck-and-neck race with Hawley, so anything you’re able to chip in will make a huge difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38547?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38548?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38548?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38548?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38548?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38548?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38548?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38547?refcode=em20231012-3972&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3972%2E614464%2Erh0DPe)
---
Thanks for everything, Peter.
— Lucas

Last night, I attended and live-streamed President Trump's speech at the Palm Beach Convention Center in West Palm Beach, Florida at the Convention Center, where he was hosted by Club 47. I was honored to have President Trump give me a shoutout during his speech. President Trump can be quoted as saying,
> "Somebody who is extremely shy, but really talented, and she's going places. Laura Loomer. Where is Laura? Laura! Where is Laura? She doesn't like DeSanctimonious. She doesn't like DeSanctus"
WATCH the clip of President Trump giving me a shout out above.
The speech location was particularly important given the recent Islamic terrorist attacks in Israel, considering that West Palm Beach, which is located in Florida's 21st District, is the most Jewish district in the United States.
1,500 Israelis have been killed in the recent HAMAS attacks on Israel, and 3,000 have been wounded. Hundreds more have been taken hostage, including several Americans. Upon his arrival in Israel on Thursday morning, United States Secretary of State Antony Blinken confirmed the news that [at least 25 Americans have been killed ](https://substack.com/redirect/7e311924-2cb2-4db1-b0c5-2d708b17779f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in the attacks carried out by the Iranian-funded terror group Hamas. "Tragically, the number of innocent lives claimed by Hamas's heinous attacks continues to rise," Blinken said during a press conference in Israel, standing alongside Israel Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. "Among those, we now know that at least 25 American citizens were killed."
During his speech last night, President Trump addressed these savage attacks against Israel, calling on the Biden Administration to re-freeze the $6 Billion in aide that they recently handed to Iran just one month ago, despite Iran's daily chants of "Death to America" and "Death to Israel". Trump also said that when he is elected as President again, he will immediately cut off all funding to Palestinian groups. Trump also asserted that these attacks against Israel, and against Ukraine, would not have happened if he were President, and promised that he will prevent World War 3 from breaking out once he's back in the White House.
Trump went as far as to say that he would create a new U.S. missile defense system If he were elected again in 2024, citing recent attacks against Israel as the justification. President Trump also echoed my concerns about HAMAS, Hezbollah, and IRGC terrorists coming into the United States via Joe Biden's open Southern Border. President Trump said he will keep "jihadist terrorists the hell out of our country," just as he did during his first term in office.
HAMAS has called for a "day of rage" and JIHAD this Friday, October 13. They plan on killing people all over the world in the name of Islamic warfare against non-Muslims, otherwise known as jihad. Hamas and Hezbollah are already here in America with active terror cells in places like Atlanta, Tampa, NYC, Houston, Arlington, and Minneapolis. This was confirmed to me this weekend by intel sources. Hezbollah has been training in Venezuela and they are preparing to storm the US Mexico border, which is wide open. These terrorists are FUNDED and TRAINED by Iran, a terrorist regime that just received $6 BILLION from Joe Biden and the Democrats.
President Trump was the toughest President we have ever had when it came to dealing with Iran. Trump ordered the execution of Iranian terrorist leader Qasem Soleimani, imposed crippling sanctions on Iran, and shredded the terrible 'Iran Nuclear Deal' negotiated by John Kerry and the Administration of Barrack Hussein Obama. This deal also handed Iran billions of dollars.
Without a true leader in the White House, the world is descending into chaos. Americans were killed in Israel, and under Joe Biden's leadership, the same people who carried out these deadly attacks are planning to bring their violence and inhumane, third world ideology to the streets of America. These are the consequences of a stolen election. Trump summed this up during his speech, saying, "I'm the only candidate who can make a promise, a very important promise, and that it I will not allow for World War 3!"

President Trump also took aim at former Democrat House Speaker Nancy Pelosi during his speech, saying that Pelosi is responsible for the events of January 6th. "Nancy Pelosi was responsible for the security of the Capitol (on J6 2021) and she failed," Trump said.
It was an honor to be in the room during President Trump's speech, and to have President Trump acknowledge me and my hard work exposing political corruption of all kinds. I greatly appreciated that President Trump took time out of his speech to address my exposes of Ron DeSantis, and his failures as an absentee Governor that have weakened the State of Florida, and emboldened RINOs across the Nation to join forces in an attempt to prevent President Trump from ever taking the Oath of Office again.
The reason the Uniparty establishment hates me is the same reason they hate President Trump. I am unafraid to speak the truth. We are unafraid to speak the truth. And that's why I will be doing everything in my power to help get President Trump re-elected as the 47th President in 2024.

❌ In **North Carolina** , Republicans are advancing a new voting restriction bill ahead of the 2024 election, targeting everything from mail-in ballots to poll observer conduct.

❌ In **Ohio** , Republicans rushed through a court-ordered redrawing of its maps to avoid public comment and keep gerrymandered districts in place.

name: Rick Coplen
subject: Hamas, Israel, and Political Violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
The Hamas terrorist attack on Israel was a “sheer evil” act of extreme political violence. It was not an act by the Palestinian people, who also are the victims of Hamas’ barbarism, but an act in spite of them. Now there is no way to know when the bloodshed will end and how many innocent Israelis and Palestinians will be consumed in the firestorm Hamas unleashed.

Hamas gave Israel no choice but to declare war, and I stand four-square with Israel.

_As an 82nd Airborne combat paratrooper in Panama_ , I know that Israel must close with and destroy the enemy (Hamas terrorists). Such is the iron-clad logic of victory in war, whether in Israel, Ukraine, or anywhere else.

_As a peacekeeper in Bosnia_ , I also know that the international community must move past the immediate crisis to secure a lasting path to peace for all, including respect and protection of the innocents.

**No one running to defeat Scott Perry knows war _AND_ peace better than I do. Please help me bring this experience and expertise to a U.S. Congress that needs it now more than ever.**

Failing to stop political violence makes terrorism inevitable. And that is what makes Scott Perry’s refusal to condemn the political violence at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021, so dangerous. He is encouraging political violence, and the extremists are listening.

Today the extremists who support Scott Perry openly talk about waging civil war in America. They carry the Confederate battle flag – the flag of treason – and Scott Perry gives them aid and comfort.

The extremists who support Scott Perry want to burn down our government, and Scott Perry stands shoulder-to-shoulder with them. The Chaos Caucus – falsely called the Freedom Caucus – is not just incompetent at governing; they don’t want to govern. They don’t stand for democracy; they stand for dictatorship.

I believe in the United States of America. I believe in a government “of the people, by the people, and for the people.”

I believe in a government that works for all of us, that respects all of us, that includes all of us, and that makes our lives better, not worse.

**No one running to defeat Scott Perry can match my record of crisis-tested military _AND_ Central PA commUNITY service. Please support my campaign today so that I can replace Scott Perry and bring a lifetime of service to Washington.**

Stand with me now so I can stand with you in Congress.

Thanks,
Rick

He is encouraging political violence, and the extremists are listening. Today the extremists who support Scott Perry openly talk about waging civil war in America. They carry the Confederate battle flag – the flag of treason – and Scott Perry gives them aid and comfort. The extremists who support Scott Perry want to burn down our government, and Scott Perry stands shoulder-to-shoulder with them. The Chaos Caucus – falsely called the Freedom Caucus – is not just incompetent at governing; they don’t want to govern. They don’t stand for democracy; they stand for dictatorship. I believe in the United States of America. I believe in a government “of the people, by the people, and for the people.” I believe in a government that works for all of us, that respects all of us, that includes all of us, and that makes our lives better, not worse. No one running to defeat Scott Perry can match my record of crisis-tested military AND Central PA commUNITY service. Please support my campaign today so that I can replace Scott Perry and bring a lifetime of service to Washington. Stand with me now so I can stand with you in Congress. Thanks, Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

name: John Fetterman
subject: Stephen Colbert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We had fun.
#
Hey Derek 👋
Did you see my interview with Stephen Colbert last night?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231012-1?refcode=em20231012-8616&refcode2=8616_434096_IB1evq&akid=8616%2E434096%2EIB1evq)
As you can see, we left him with a gift 🤣 And we also had a *great* conversation about health, help, and recovery. I encourage you to watch the whole thing, but the short version is:
**If you are suffering from depression, please, please get help. It works.**
I will *never* stop advocating for treatment -- it's a privilege + a duty to talk about this.
Plus, the better I get, the sadder Fox News becomes. 🤭
**[You can watch my interview with Stephen Colbert at this link now. Plus, if you're able, you can support my work in Washington with a donation too.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231012-1?refcode=em20231012-1-8616&refcode2=8616_434096_IB1evq&akid=8616%2E434096%2EIB1evq)**
**[Watch + Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231012-1?refcode=em20231012-8616&refcode2=8616_434096_IB1evq&akid=8616%2E434096%2EIB1evq)**
Thank you so much. 🙏
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231012-8616-footer&t=1&refcode2=8616_434096_IB1evq&akid=8616%2E434096%2EIB1evq)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

# It's going to be a party at Fort Wayne Country Club Oct. 19th
In addition to the Bourounis family and the Dager family sponsoring my event on October 19th at Fort Wayne Country Club, I am pleased to share that the John Crawford family are also joining the event as sponsors! We're going to have a great night with good friends and amazing food in an elegant setting. Be sure to [RSVP if you would like to join us October 19th](https://api.neonemails.com/emails/tracking/click-link/lqYxU6OfZ6fvqhtZq5yz8dHon0-7TXO9kkLSRjo7i4E=/lZAuR-Qn0xvGUxkBzAzCp-p8rTR_ei8654TZXe9CmWY= "RSVP if you would like to join us October 19th") at Fort Wayne Country Club.

body:

Trump.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=822270be5a594f2db7b426ab47bff1f9&_e=jPhlEn40r1Z5z4hzzFpFrXBHc5RyyrWYwC1LWDUl_0SYKTkyvRa6PRaNmolOdmHTh2xffGZVMx2w7fLsmQn-4me0yn2yEOjgJvHAD58Q5bMMKqWgovvN668ZDci42syI16k6gqzEZqA50iRdkHJZgeQAvwZMkxMHn8DSOAt5GS5r4UpXvnT_5agaPAXDVD1yRL1GnwD9ejT2sBZUw1q9_b0kCzd4tLcSXNtZ_rhmiwTmkcp10Jm1s0lsk2SszwzWe3d5Y2DGjV9_FK__DpEVf2J6FtgeBgnuuU-LZCVcJJGhD9VqpakxxyM8sIheZWWY4quXYHpf9-TAmcFmeBtstIw1urB-kQStkf6NuZ-NNSNuoYMEmD5Lv-5LE6XNp4QpSIs59M3zwQpjeXSVnsRNU3gKUSANfYaePbsiw5Pps-TjQRvhfl9ItSUGOl4lsHb3)** I’m reaching out today because Joe Biden is relentlessly targeting me with one sham investigation after another. **He’s indicted me four times already.** He is _clearly politically motivated_ to ensure I don’t run against him, because if I do, he KNOWS I WILL WIN. Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Hey Peter, Welcome to Team Frost’s volunteer newsletter!

In case you missed it, Congressman Frost stood alongside President Biden at the White House as the President used executive action to implement Maxwell’s first bill by creating the first ever **Federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention!**

Ending gun violence has always been at the forefront of Maxwell's campaign. This is why the first bill he ever introduced in Congress was to create this very office-- something our country has never had. Republicans thought they defeated Maxwell’s bill, but last month, Maxwell stood alongside President Biden to deliver on that promise. You can read more about the announcement [online here.](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/R71Hx8-yEkNJoVnJuS8t1Q~~/AAPPAAA~)

On Tuesday night, Congressman Frost joined Stephen Colbert on _The Late Show_ to talk about some of this amazing work that has been going on in the halls of Congress and in our state. You can check out his interview [here.](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/GV3fpgu_XCX9dKX39WyFKA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnCtOpP0SZaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1reTFKeUpWcHp6QSZjZG1jPTJXZndZbld1TlBkeUE5Wk53UHpJQ2xWSUpKVCZyZWZjb2RlMj0yV2Z3WW5XdU5QZHlBOVpOd1B6SUNsVklKSlQmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9Mldmd1luV3VOUGR5QTlaTndQeklDbFZJSkpUVwNzcGNCCmUgqU4oZUjd02JSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

Our collective power made this happen, but the creation of this office is only the beginning. We must continue to organize year-round and keep fighting to create a world free of gun violence.

**So today, we celebrate this win. Tomorrow, we keep fighting. We keep organizing. We keep making noise.**

To that end, we encourage you to join us at one of our upcoming events and bring a friend or two!
