clean_body: | ~~ Hey Peter, Welcome to Team Frost’s volunteer newsletter! In case you missed it, Congressman Frost stood alongside President Biden at the White House as the President used executive action to implement Maxwell’s first bill by creating the first ever Federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention! Ending gun violence has always been at the forefront of Maxwell's campaign. This is why the first bill he ever introduced in Congress was to create this very office-- something our country has never had. Republicans thought they defeated Maxwell’s bill, but last month, Maxwell stood alongside President Biden to deliver on that promise. You can read more about the announcement On Tuesday night, Congressman Frost joined Stephen Colbert on The Late Show to talk about some of this amazing work that has been going on in the halls of Congress and in our state. You can check out his interview Our collective power made this happen, but the creation of this office is only the beginning. We must continue to organize year-round and keep fighting to create a world free of gun violence. So today, we celebrate this win. Tomorrow, we keep fighting. We keep organizing. We keep making noise. To that end, we encourage you to join us at one of our upcoming events and bring a friend or two! Upcoming Events: ~ ~ | ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ For questions, or to learn about other ways to get involved with our campaign, please contact Ray Anid at ray@frostforcongress.com. We look forward to seeing you at one of our upcoming events! When we organize, we win, Team Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. body:
Newsom just appointed the most extreme Leftist to the Senate...

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6e0ad5e67ef24e6bac826f84662fc7d7&_e=SE7ZSUwpVip-tx5lrJ0ZLN55hxRCbRUNpfe-P9Ad-Afh_UObYbTrV5c1WyKJ2PX7nC8NkeeI5VsDfCCFQLzKq-VaNsmZ7x9_7BpKOzNucPgetIN7YhEolDfiiYIDLq-4qALhhxLEvBsQ4DFuA3YxnjNNT-9yUovYFds6HqzhNaEsxQkhfUxs47cKWoNxoMIekDdEZVIUQzETaU6TXlXMrt6nBDXDwpcF4DVffwmv5GXn2GczCn6t1K2qbRd7XMUk_ZNk9jhLG7uwrw3WIakG6IxMb8zxHAw7od0nfRNKgigxj0nEd0HzZLnNvye2btvNmOhkTP-2OVKBJN6OVl4QiJxgMgY5rTFQuFv6mWcRxtZCFWkw88fr44pnM5I4zNVPFMSse4Ng9W7JjoKunzh3QV98iO2rhNz1VowVDCAh5V0%3D)
---

Friend,

I am personally coming to you with my most urgent plea yet.

Gavin Newsom just appointed a far-Leftist who has personally smeared, lied, and attacked me with MILLIONS to be California's new Senator.

This is the worst possible case scenario for me and our Conservative movement, Friend.

I'm already the Left's #1 target, and now, dark-money billionaires will be lining up to back the most radical Democrats in California to destroy ME and all the progress we've made for our Conservative agenda.

They will stop at NOTHING to defeat vulnerable Republicans like me so they can secure their Democrat Majority and pass the most radical agenda our country has ever seen.

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: A big deal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Endorsing our campaign and being a part of this team means taking on special interests, fighting for people — not corporations — and defending the dream that so many of us are striving for.
#

Can you do something important for Alex Padilla today?
**We’re looking for as many people as possible all across America to add their name and personally endorse Alex Padilla and the important work he’s focused on in the U.S. Senate.**
[**Please, use this link to add your name and personally endorse Alex Padilla >>>](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-em-October23/?source=em231012-1-30&refcode2=1564.159979.LPMkLc&akid=1564%2E159979%2ELPMkLc)**
**[SIGN ON](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-em-October23/?source=em231012-1-30&refcode2=1564.159979.LPMkLc&akid=1564%2E159979%2ELPMkLc)**
Alex is working hard in the Senate to implement an agenda for ALL Americans -- immigration reform, action on climate change, guaranteeing health care as a human right, and so much more.
He’s able to remain focused on that critical work because of the incredible support folks like you have shown him over the past few years.
But if we’re going to continue building on the progress we made in 2022, and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate in 2024, _we have to stay united._
[**Endorsing our campaign and being a part of this team means taking on special interests, fighting for people -- not corporations -- and defending the dream that so many of us are striving for.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-em-October23/?source=em231012-1-30&refcode2=1564.159979.LPMkLc&akid=1564%2E159979%2ELPMkLc)**
And that’s important, because the _best way_ to hold our majority and ensure we can make progress on the issues we care about is with an unprecedented grassroots movement of supporters like you.
So please:
[**Can you add your name to personally endorse Alex Padilla today? It might not seem like a big deal on its own, but it means a lot to Alex and to all of us to know we can count on you.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Personal-Endorsement-em-October23/?source=em231012-1-30&refcode2=1564.159979.LPMkLc&akid=1564%2E159979%2ELPMkLc)**
Thanks for adding your name.
Team Padilla

name: Team Kaiman
subject: Why did Jen DeSena endorse George Santos?
body:
jonkaiman.com [jonkaiman.com]
Hi Peter,
Jen DeSena's friend George Santos is in some hot water this week.
The embattled Congressman added 10 new felonies, including credit card fraud, to his existing 13.
But why did North Hempstead voters trust George Santos in the first place?
Because he had a critical ally in the Town: Supervisor Jen DeSena . Supervisor DeSena did not just endorse George and call him her friend - she put action behind those words. She rallied with him, walked with him at street fairs, and introduced him to unsuspecting residents. Jen DeSena validated George Santos, even after he funded the January 6th insurrectionists and supported extreme far-right stances like total abortion bans.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Skipping the BS–why I do things differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’ll always skip the BS with you: there’s a lot of work to be done to clean up Washington so that Congress actually works for working people.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31292%2E3422442%2EX96BvZ)
I’ll always skip the BS with you: there’s a lot of work to be done to clean up Washington so that Congress actually works for working people, not just the ultra-rich. **That’s why I’m proud to be “doing Congress” differently than most:**
* I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, and **I’m one of just eleven Members to make that commitment.** I also don’t take money from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Bank CEOs.
* Congress brought back “earmarks” in 2021, after they had been banned in 2011 because the process leads to corruption and waste. **I’m the only Democrat to oppose them.**
* I’m leading the fight to **ban Members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks.** It’s plain wrong that Members are getting rich off information we learn in private briefings.

Derek, I wouldn’t be able to compete in this outrageously expensive Senate race if it wasn’t for grassroots support. [**Can you make a contribution today to help power my work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231012-1?refcode=EMAM12_1_CON_20231012_V1_F&refcode2=31292_3422442_X96BvZ&akid=31292%2E3422442%2EX96BvZ)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231012-1?refcode=EMAM12_1_CON_20231012_V1_F&refcode2=31292_3422442_X96BvZ&akid=31292%2E3422442%2EX96BvZ)
Thanks a ton!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM12_1_CON_20231012_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31292_3422442_X96BvZ&akid=31292%2E3422442%2EX96BvZ)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

I’ll always skip the BS with you: there’s a lot of work to be done to clean up Washington so that Congress actually works for working people, not just the ultra-rich. That’s why I’m proud to be “doing Congress” differently than most: I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, and I’m one of just eleven Members to make that commitment. I also don’t take money from Big Oil, Big Pharma, or Big Bank CEOs. Congress brought back “earmarks” in 2021, after they had been banned in 2011 because the process leads to corruption and waste. I’m the only Democrat to oppose them. I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress and their spouses from trading stocks. It’s plain wrong that Members are getting rich off information we learn in private briefings. Derek, I wouldn’t be able to compete in this outrageously expensive Senate race if it wasn’t for grassroots support. Thanks a ton! Katie Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

Peter, I was devastated when I saw this news from the Texas Tribune:
“Texas’ political environment driving faculty to leave, survey finds”
Texas Republicans are creating an environment so hostile to educators that we are losing the very people who are raising and educating our next generation.
By enacting laws restricting what teachers can and cannot teach, targeting tenure, closing diversity offices, and more, Republican lawmakers are breaking the Texas public education system.
We need leaders who will work to help Texans — but politicians like Ted Cruz make life harder.
That’s why I’m in this race, Peter, and that’s why I need your help today.
With a massive groundswell of grassroots support, I know we can create a Texas that provides a world-class public education for all students. Please, make a donation to my campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Stop trophy hunters from brutally murdering gray wolves
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2047510?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Save innocent gray wolves and wolf pups from being viciously slaughtered by trophy hunters! [_Take action now >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2047511?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** _**Whimpering wolf pups cry out for their mama, cold and hungry and too scared to leave their den.**_ The scene outside is gruesome — blood paints the forest floor red and mangled body parts are scattered about. Mama wolf has been brutally shot to death by cruel trophy hunters, leaving her precious babies orphaned and too weak to survive on their own. Without their mama, these helpless pups will soon likely **die of starvation** or **hypothermia.** That is, unless the hunters get to them first and****_**blow up their den with dynamite.**_ Countless wolves are being violently killed like this every day, and these beloved canines are depending on us to protect them _**before they’re wiped out forever.**_ [_**Add your name now to help SAVE defenseless wolf pups from merciless trophy hunters while we still can >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2047512?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2047513?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**_Choking snares, steel leg traps, lead bullets, dynamite, snowmobiles._** Harmless gray wolves don’t stand a chance against ruthless trophy hunters who will stop at nothing to get their kill.
And in several states, it’s completely**LEGAL** to use these **barbaric killing methods** on unsuspecting gray wolves. Yet that isn’t enough for extremist lawmakers and the hunting lobby who are actively working together _**right now**_ to _**REMOVE**_ existing Endangered Species Act (ESA) protections for these iconic mammals.
We cannot allow corrupt politicians and Big Polluters to succeed in handing trophy hunters a license to kill gray wolves without consequence. Stripping away life-saving ESA protections could be what pushes this vulnerable keystone species to _**EXTINCTION.**_ **_Friend, will you sit on the sidelines while merciless trophy hunters continue to VIOLENTLY MASSACRE the last of North America’s gray wolves?_ [_Or will you step up right now in defense of these beloved animals before it’s too late? Take action now >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2047514?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2047515?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting gray wolves,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, As your next member of Congress, I promise to work tirelessly every day to fight for you and to be a voice for all those who call Rhode Island home. From protecting our seniors to keeping our streets safe from weapons of war, Rhode Island deserves a leader who is ready to hit the ground running on day one and deliver for the working families I have lived alongside throughout my life. | | | | Your support is essential in making a difference for Rhode Island. We need to make sure that on November 7th, we don’t just win, but we send a message to extreme Republicans in Congress: Rhode Island families can’t afford your extremism and political theatrics. Would you be able to spare $10, $20, or any other amount to help elect me to Congress and make a difference for thousands of Rhode Islanders across this state we call home? | | = | | = | | = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | Thank you for your support, especially as we get closer to election day on November 7th! **In case you’re in need of a brief refresher on Letitia James’ history, here’s everything you need to know:**
**_FIRST_**** _,_** she became the first Black woman _ever_ to serve as New York’s attorney general – and she wasted no time going toe to toe with the most powerful and corrupt forces in the _nation_. She took gun manufacturers and sellers, Big Pharma, predatory landlords, and more to court – all so she could be a voice for the voiceless.

**_THEN_**** _,_** she ran for re-election – and you were right there with her every step of the way. You helped her defeat her well-funded, far-right opponent and _make history once again_ as the first Black woman ever to be re-elected to the office.

**_NOW_**** _,_** she’s continuing her fight for reproductive freedom, gun safety, climate change, voting rights, and MORE – but she needs to know if you’re still on this team.
**Peter, we need to collect 5,000 responses to this poll before midnight, and I’m counting on you to be one of them. So please, before time runs out:**

But I’m not going to let the extreme-right’s dysfunction stop me from serving my community and doing everything I can to make sure every Michigander has access to quality health care, a good job and clean water.
**That’s why I want to hear from you.** As we gear up for some tough fights in Congress, it’s more important than ever that your voice is heard.

Corruption and Tate Reeves go hand in hand. 👉 Tate — and his crooked friends and family — are involved in the largest public corruption scandal in Mississippi history. Not to mention, his family personally profited from hundreds of thousands of dollars in taxpayer contracts under Reeves’ watch.

👉 Tate spent millions of our taxpayer dollars updating the governor’s mansion (including some lemon trees, ice makers, and a meditation garden) while our schools stay underfunded. Our hospitals are on the verge of closing. And everyday working people plead for help.

👉 Tate wasted tens of thousands of our taxpayer dollars on our taxpayer-funded airplane to travel the country for political events, collect campaign checks, and clink glasses with his rich and powerful cronies. We deserve better than Tate Reeves. With your help, we have a good chance to defeat him. The polls show us within single digits. You can feel the enthusiasm in every corner of the state. **And even the media is calling this high-stakes race a nail-biter.**

clean_body: The proof is in the pudding. | = FOX NEWS: "Potential nail-biter race in deep-red state heats up as Dem nominee accuses GOP governor, family of corruption" I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again, Peter. Corruption and Tate Reeves go hand in hand. 👉 Tate — and his crooked friends and family — are involved in the largest public corruption scandal in Mississippi history. Not to mention, his family personally profited from hundreds of thousands of dollars in taxpayer contracts under Reeves’ watch. 👉 Tate spent millions of our taxpayer dollars updating the governor’s mansion (including some lemon trees, ice makers, and a meditation garden) while our schools stay underfunded. Our hospitals are on the verge of closing. And everyday working people plead for help. 👉 Tate wasted tens of thousands of our taxpayer dollars on our taxpayer-funded airplane to travel the country for political events, collect campaign checks, and clink glasses with his rich and powerful cronies. We deserve better than Tate Reeves. With your help, we have a good chance to defeat him. The polls show us within single digits. You can feel the enthusiasm in every corner of the state. And even the media is calling this high-stakes race a nail-biter. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = I know I can count on you! So listen up!

clean_body: So listen up! = Hey, it’s James Carville – I’ll cut straight to the chase: We’re running out of precious time to help Shawn Wilson get out the vote ahead of Saturday’s primary, and I’m looking at you — yeah, YOU — to help raise the necessary GOTV resources in the next 48 hours. Don’t even THINK about sitting this one out, Peter. Preliminary numbers from the early voting period show that fewer people than usual turned out to vote early. Combine that with the fact that Republicans had higher-than-average early voter turnout, and the pressure to turn out Democrats in this election has never been higher. I’ll be damned if I beat around the bush at a time like this: Shawn Wilson needs a massive showing of grassroots support to mobilize the Democratic base — and I’m asking you to contribute ASAP! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks so much, Peter. Let’s geaux! James Carville | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: The next Speaker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Republicans have nominated Steve Scalise as Speaker of the House.
In 2002, Scalise gave a speech to a white supremacist group affiliated with neo-Nazis, founded by KKK leader David Duke.1 And in describing himself to a reporter in the 1990s, Scalise reportedly said he was “David Duke without the baggage.” 2
This nomination once again shows the state of the GOP: **extremism and white supremacy isn’t limited to the fringe, it’s _leading_ the Republican Party.**
[ Alexandria is working to fight Republican chaos and extremism. Are you with her in countering their destruction? Please make a $5 contribution right now to support our movement for progress →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231012.dMSDVw&refcode=em20231012-5131-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231012.dMSDVw&refcode=em20231012-5131-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)**
It’s been over a week since Kevin McCarthy was removed. Since then all legislation, all votes, and all of the work Congress should be doing to avoid another shutdown is suspended.
While Republicans waste precious time wrangling a consensus for a new extremist leader, the government is on course to run out of funding in a month and a deadly conflict is raging in Israel and the Palestinian Territories. **Republicans' chaotic leadership is dangerous.**
We need to send Republicans a message that our movement is stronger than their extremism.
[Please contribute $5 right now to help bolster our movement to fight against House Republicans as they push to elect a right-wing extremist as the next Speaker.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231012.dMSDVw&refcode=em20231012-5131-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231012.dMSDVw&refcode=em20231012-5131-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=40&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)**
Thank you for being a part of this movement,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [**The Washington Post:** House Majority Whip Scalise confirms he spoke to white supremacists in 2002](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/21265?t=41&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)
2 - [**Axios:** Scalise plays whack-a-mole with surprise speaker holdouts](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/21266?t=42&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231012?refcode=em20231012-5131-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=43&refcode2=5131_2526796_scifLH&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231012-5131-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=44&akid=5131%2E2526796%2EscifLH)**

🏛️ On Oct. 3, former EMILYs List President **Laphonza Butler** was sworn in as the junior senator from California! Her historic appointment makes her the _only_ Black woman serving in the chamber and brings an invaluable pro-choice voice to the Senate majority.

🌵 Gov. **Katie Hobbs** has filed a brief with the Arizona Supreme Court to block the state's pre-Civil War era abortion ban. Gov. Hobbs has been a fierce advocate for abortion access since taking office, and we're proud to see her fight hard for _millions_ of Arizonans.

🗽 New York City hospitals now offer telehealth abortion access, thanks to the work of local officials like City Council member and Health committee chair **Lynn Schulman**. The program is the _first_ of its kind to expand abortion care access through public health care channels.

EMILYs List supports Democratic pro-choice women at every level of office — all of whom will fight for our fundamental rights _every day_. And this community is the reason they're able to accomplish this critical work.

clean_body: In the mood for some good news? We've got you covered >> | | | = | We've rounded up some victories in the fight for abortion rights across the country, from the Virginia state legislature to the U.S. Senate. These victories are made possible by Democratic pro-choice women. Donate now to help elect more women everywhere : | = Peter, As a member of our pro-choice community, you know that the fight to protect abortion access nationwide is nowhere near over. The good news? This community is helping pro-choice champions make a REAL DIFFERENCE in protecting and restoring abortion access for millions of Americans. **Before we jump into the good news, Peter: Can Democratic pro-choice women in races up & down the ballot count on your support this cycle? Donate now >> If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. = | = ---|--- = | = = | = 🏛️ On Oct. 3, former EMILYs List President Laphonza Butler was sworn in as the junior senator from California! Her historic appointment makes her the only Black woman serving in the chamber and brings an invaluable pro-choice voice to the Senate majority. 🌵 Gov. Katie Hobbs has filed a brief with the Arizona Supreme Court to block the state's pre-Civil War era abortion ban. Gov. Hobbs has been a fierce advocate for abortion access since taking office, and we're proud to see her fight hard for millions of Arizonans. 🗽 New York City hospitals now offer telehealth abortion access, thanks to the work of local officials like City Council member and Health committee chair Lynn Schulman. The program is the first of its kind to expand abortion care access through public health care channels. EMILYs List supports Democratic pro-choice women at every level of office — all of whom will fight for our fundamental rights every day. And this community is the reason they're able to accomplish this critical work. Donate now to continue supporting pro-choice women who refuse to back down in the fight to protect abortion access: = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team ** = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Ro Khanna
subject: The phrase “school lunch debt” shouldn’t exist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Right now, student meal debt exceeds $262 million nationwide.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475455/432227132/-1645665386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=&emci=87dfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8cdfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
Friend, During the COVID-19 pandemic, the federal government worked to ensure every student had access to free meals at school. When this funding ended last year, many families were left unable to afford school lunches and could not qualify for existing federal programs designed to feed high-need students. This problem has only gotten worse as inflation increases costs across the board. Right now, student meal debt–a concept that shouldn’t even exist in one of the world’s wealthiest nations–exceeds $262 million nationwide. That means millions of students and their families are forced to choose between going hungry and going further into debt.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475456/432227133/1736070564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=&emci=87dfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8cdfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
Food insecurity has [profound effects on school performance](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475457/432227134/1641033756?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=&emci=87dfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8cdfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080). Students experiencing hunger have been shown to struggle with concentration, memory, behavior, and motor skills, as well as maintaining their physical health. Lunch debt often carries a stigma for both students and parents.
We have no excuse for letting children go hungry. [**Sign if you agree: It’s time to end lunch debt.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475458/432227135/-146718163?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frise-school-lunch-debt-petition-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=&emci=87dfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8cdfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475459/432227136/-146718163?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frise-school-lunch-debt-petition-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=&emci=87dfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8cdfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080)
---
As the son of a public school teacher, I was raised with the knowledge that our public schools exist to provide younger generations with the fundamental right to education. But how can we provide for this basic need without guaranteeing access to healthy meals? Our response during the pandemic proved that we can afford to provide every student in America with healthy school meals. That’s why I’m proud to support the School Lunch Debt Cancellation Act, a bill designed to pay off all existing school meal debt and make meals free for all school children, regardless of their families’ income. No student should have to experience hunger and the sense of shame it creates. [**Sign the petition: Support the School Lunch Debt Cancellation Act today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475460/432227137/-146718163?source=group-ro-khanna&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frise-school-lunch-debt-petition-swap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=&emci=87dfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8cdfbf89-4769-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9848080) In solidarity,Ro
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71475461/432227138/-809278668?refcode=20231012-school-lunch-debt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMyMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNkZmJmODktNDc2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=GZmVu8XoUED9q0uusUN9KJE20pa5XyKRz60Wwmdd9Js=)
---

name: Janelle Stelson
subject: I have a question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:

name: Andy Kim
subject: I am calling for expulsion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
This has to stop.Today, Senator Menendez was indicted for acting as an unregistered agent of a foreign government.

Before I came to Congress, I worked in national security. I swore an oath to defend our constitution at all costs. So when I read the new indictment against Senator Bob Menendez, I had no doubt what needed to happen.

Because of the severity of the charges against him, I think the US Senate should vote to expel Senator Menendez.

As I've said before, I believe that holding elected office is a sacred trust and that elected officials ought to be held to a higher standard. I am hopeful that the judicial system will work thoroughly and quickly to bring the truth to light. Until then, Senator Menendez should not continue to represent the people of New Jersey in the United States Senate.

This is my Senator. He represents me, my family, and our state.

New Jerseyans need a Senator in this seat that we can trust beyond a shadow of a doubt to put the interests of our people, our state, and our country first.

I'm running against Senator Menendez to restore integrity in our politics. Please join me today by making a contribution, and we can build our movement for change together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim-ak4nj?refcode=2023-10-12-menendezexpulsion&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=33932eba-4869-ee11-9937-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy

**HUGE NEWS: Lauren Boebert says there is “blood in the water” and worries her race is a “toss-up” in 2024**
Hello,
Maybe it’s her support for a national ban on all abortions – no exceptions. Or her crazy conspiracy theories. Or the fact that she is more focused on herself and her corporate PAC donors than the good of her district and our country.
**There are countless reasons to vote against Lauren Boebert – _and she knows it._**
Last year, Adam Frisch came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. It was the closest race in the country. And now, after a brand-new poll shows Adam LEADING Boebert by 2 points, all the political pundits are saying that Adam can finish the job and win in 2024.
Lauren Boebert is panicking. Her Super PACs know she’s vulnerable too – that’s why they’re already trying to smear Adam with lies.
**We can fend off the attacks and hold Boebert accountable, but we’ve set a goal to raise another $300,000 to defeat Boebert before our mid-October fundraising deadline – and right now, we’re still $64,675 short. The only way we’ll be able to hit our goal and send Lauren Boebert packing is if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: The Lack of Common Sense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Keeping It Short

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9703e5cf8cb443db8eebf411c7b8ed3d&_e=_LO6qab9CulmC-bPvqNocuQ6l2lhN83433e6G0dW-6XHWbx_P8seDsSJX_3DtiLFs94uyfk4gBlox9pzTmgvDhia8KIZjpUcE52ewjACvkpw97rMgwgLU4TA7Q_LtDeKypX3atkbQoaWBBIv-cPP0ot8eCF9c--BCPdiMT7YGy_799g67nt2UK46KVDq3j5seaBINdjF2cgjKt5LFpXiy_Pm17GFOETWHZqHfUF4JM5eGopJ75wO9HZj3zLC9AOWJfOTh7yGb2a8_KmZlpkyYyfi2vZ88iqHKVrfxO0P-vuRGG5aGrKsPUE_56FAazu1VOOr7cPmRfScQ9mBLgphwnUA7VE0v124fQb-fboKTSklcpacmY_B8ngjF9Y8y80V)
---
Friend,

I wanted to be brief but frank: **Common Sense is under attack in our country.**

Our country is headed to hell in a handbasket if we continue down this path.

I think a firm solution to this is supporting other conservative candidates. Whether it be in Louisiana or any other state in our great nation, supporting their campaigns will bring common sense back to Washington.

I am pleading with you, Friend. **[Help me restore decency, conservative ideals, and common sense leadership.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=9703e5cf8cb443db8eebf411c7b8ed3d&_e=_LO6qab9CulmC-bPvqNocuQ6l2lhN83433e6G0dW-6XHWbx_P8seDsSJX_3DtiLFs94uyfk4gBlox9pzTmgvDhia8KIZjpUcE52ewjACvkpw97rMgwgLU4TA7Q_LtDeKypX3atkbQoaWBBIv-cPP0ot8eCF9c--BCPdiMT7YGy_799g67nt2UK46KVDq3j5sEG28Ow6qqveJo1VjPIYmRiMvi0eJ1am8YBnbO2-1P9yE_zWkoEAlFUcxlRd9QWLIwZ12SYQgUXgKod_79cKjm3MIxOs24XP5-tZy6WQm2_5KBAoGnyyYwBElOpi4rugM9wRquqaDB9UcCG0ZdSLFQO6usCW08_vuwOxzyM27wgo%3D)** **The work starts now!**

name: Andy (personal)
subject: I hope I made you proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Today, I went up against my opponent in the first debate for Kentucky governor. Thank you, Peter.

Today, I went up against my opponent in the first debate for governor. It meant so much to know that you have my back, and I hope I made you proud.

This debate was a chance for me to share firsthand the progress that we've made over the last four years, and my plans to continue fighting for Kentuckians in every part of the state. While I focused on our future – my opponent spent his time lying about my record and trying to deceive Kentuckians.

It's more clear than ever that Kentuckians deserve better than Daniel Cameron – but defeating him won't be easy. Cameron has the backing of outside groups who are spending over $21 million to try and defeat me.

They'll continue to spend whatever it takes to attack me and try to buy this race. With less than one month to go, we can't waste any time.

Today's debate gave us momentum, but I need your help to keep it up. Please chip in to my re-election campaign now to help me defeat Daniel Cameron on November 7 so we can continue making progress for Kentucky → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?link2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71476245/432230105/1286826882?refcode=em23_231012_debte4_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231012_debte4_fndd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5aa37ead-4a69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWEzN2VhZC00YTY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWdV1w6UorM4t2bX_2MNBxW_oL1INVj3RWCRru2wSJ8=)

Thank you again for your support,

Andy

subject: Friend, allow me to introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
Running for U.S. Senate in Arizona

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d7baecc15c434179ac94df481ca65201&_e=7b18N8UkpLW3ye0VLZnq74xAYTx761bvMy5qklfxnw_Dg5IQLCPYbp88_-8Kn329eX_iWYjM4l8uBWrhVQHY-ziumKFgl3BAiXru7DGTWiN--3RGjg7fX5OjMmGwXQ2LfTBHOYTVPWz0AE8O-2iW8NBPMCOPhz0j3xkOz9IDkLmPmUvHpdRfOQuAhYe4Q9rmhXXwEQ6PEYCSoYfwO3yl96mGCHT2mfhmsw6xQ-VqFVCnZ5OJYCQz-yDOvLu1LTsgrYM4O4d96kqLLSZWprd85gTsGL0bH2VrL398ts7n_o9YRb_Z0nPykubPIr5ehKYYJ8o38m3lq-9XXM0NjcI6JI_pxOuKjJ0wyk7yXYZJHQU%3D)

Hey! I wanted to take a moment and personally introduce myself. My name is Kari Lake, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Arizona.

Although I grew up in Iowa, my home AND my heart lies in Arizona. Reflecting on my childhood, I am astounded by my parent's resilience. They raised nine kids on two paychecks.

[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d7baecc15c434179ac94df481ca65201&_e=7b18N8UkpLW3ye0VLZnq74xAYTx761bvMy5qklfxnw_Dg5IQLCPYbp88_-8Kn329eX_iWYjM4l8uBWrhVQHY-ziumKFgl3BAiXru7DGTWiN--3RGjg7fX5OjMmGwXQ2LfTBHOYTVPWz0AE8O-2iW8NBPMCOPhz0j3xkOz9IDkLmPmUvHpdRfOQuAhYe4Q9rmhXXwEQ6PEYCSoYfwO3yl90XeJEFBlk4LNwiyxRZ1MdmKW2tCBFw-CB1HxaMwFFe0MofiGLk3Ir8ksX_2QQDXyfqBVB4y4B4WQoE44J4Ij1WeRWiINCHcdi1B8VfYiL2uSakglW3ntEmJlgy7PIQ2TBJxwPM9XRVkDGQlUei9OSA%3D)
| [**JOIN THE MOVEMENT -- MAKE HISTORY** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d7baecc15c434179ac94df481ca65201&_e=7b18N8UkpLW3ye0VLZnq74xAYTx761bvMy5qklfxnw_Dg5IQLCPYbp88_-8Kn329eX_iWYjM4l8uBWrhVQHY-ziumKFgl3BAiXru7DGTWiN--3RGjg7fX5OjMmGwXQ2LfTBHOYTVPWz0AE8O-2iW8NBPMCOPhz0j3xkOz9IDkLmPmUvHpdRfOQuAhYe4Q9rmhXXwEQ6PEYCSoYfwO3yl93zqAkJK3UBsXxMG6sX3NWPz2ZUVy0ngVotJsdV-EDc2fsDmtg8rz0JMDb3ii_0Oj3MtMl23KirjSmrBZrx9LKJX8o6tJSWkSQzYGgChUonLc5Bh2PpUw1OrnUytrC_EeYAyWIMmbzwg99MoqfTe8B0%3D)

Today that would be impossible. The cost of living has never been higher. American families have never suffered as much as they are right now. clean_body: Running for U.S. Senate in Arizona | Hey! I wanted to take a moment and personally introduce myself. My name is Kari Lake, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in the great state of Arizona. Although I grew up in Iowa, my home AND my heart lies in Arizona. Reflecting on my childhood, I am astounded by my parent's resilience. They raised nine kids on two paychecks. | Today that would be impossible. The cost of living has never been higher. American families have never suffered as much as they are right now. In reality -- we've lost control of the destiny of this nation. Laura Friedman's effectively addressing housing affordability and standing up for workers speaks for itself._ _She is exactly who we need fighting for us in Washington.”_ \- Frank Hawk, Executive Secretary-Treasurer

The Carpenters are just the latest union to throw their support behind Laura. She’s also been endorsed by **Amalgamated Transit Union (ATU)** and the **International Association of Theatrical and Stage Employees Local Unions of the Greater Los Angeles Region (IATSE)**.
Laura is quickly becoming labor’s runaway favorite in this race, and there’s a reason why: She knows that we need to even the playing field between workers and large corporations, and the proof is in the legislation she fights for.
She led the charge to allow striking workers in California to receive unemployment benefits and zero interest loans for mortgage support. She co authored bills to protect paid maternity and paternity leave. And in Congress, she’ll continue to fight for a federal $15 minimum wage.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: Trump’s disparaging remarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I expected to wake up to a chorus of voices from within the GOP, individuals who claim to stand strong with Israel, swiftly denouncing Trump’s reckless words. Unfortunately, silence is what we received. Not a single word of rebuke or condemnation.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71476760/432231885/664569766?refcode=BLU-HSC-20231012-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTZiNWJhOC00YjY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_rvlEsgbC3mKtMDKazeUdGZhnMX-gkfb_Lc5rO48AXo=)
---
| In the face of Israel's darkest hour, the former President took the stage and chose to use his platform in a way that shocked the conscience. Trump openly mocked Israel, praised a terrorist organization (Hezbollah), and made disparaging remarks about the Capitol, the very symbol of our democracy. **I expected to wake up to a chorus of voices from within the GOP, individuals who claim to stand strong with Israel, swiftly denouncing Trump’s reckless words. Unfortunately, silence is what we received. Not a single word of rebuke or condemnation.** It's disheartening to note that every single Congressional member of the Michigan Republican Party continues to endorse the former President despite his egregious behavior. We're left waiting for a sign of moral courage and principled leadership. The silence we've encountered is telling – it speaks volumes about where their priorities lie. Now more than ever, we need leaders who will put the values of democracy, diplomacy, and decency above partisan politics. We need representatives who will hold those in power accountable for their words and actions. I am praying for all those affected by the recent tragedies in the Middle East. Hillary
---

Listen, my friend: I didn’t come to Congress to play games, I came here to work.
As your representative, I am your voice in Congress, and it is my duty to advance legislation that reflects your priorities and improves your life.
Unfortunately, we’ve spent much of this month dealing with political nonsense and while the House was gridlocked, the People were left waiting.
I will not tolerate that. It is time to get back to work.
This isn’t even about the Speaker or any one person.
This is about restoring Americans’ faith in Congress through real reforms that increase transparency and restore public trust. Our government is broken and we need a leader who can communicate their vision and implement a clear strategy for achieving it.
I work on behalf of you, my constituents, and while my colleagues bickered, I stayed on task and kept working for you because the American people cannot afford inaction!
Americans are relying on us to do our jobs and keep the government functioning and essential services & programs running, but I can’t do it alone, my friend.

Kat Cammack, the youngest Republican woman in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack, now in her second term, sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Not to play silly games Listen, my friend: I didn’t come to Congress to play games, I came here to work. As your representative, I am your voice in Congress, and it is my duty to advance legislation that reflects your priorities and improves your life. Unfortunately, we’ve spent much of this month dealing with political nonsense and while the House was gridlocked, the People were left waiting. I will not tolerate that. It is time to get back to work. This isn’t even about the Speaker or any one person. This is about restoring Americans’ faith in Congress through real reforms that increase transparency and restore public trust. Our government is broken and we need a leader who can communicate their vision and implement a clear strategy for achieving it. I work on behalf of you, my constituents, and while my colleagues bickered, I stayed on task and kept working for you because the American people cannot afford inaction! Americans are relying on us to do our jobs and keep the government functioning and essential services & programs running, but I can’t do it alone, my friend. | It’s time to put aside these silly games and get the House back to doing what you elected us to do: serving the American people. With your help, we’ll force my colleagues to get on the same page. | | Sincerely, Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-03 | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack, the youngest Republican woman in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack, now in her second term, sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- ==

There are thousands of local races in every state, county, municipality, and jurisdiction across the country and it's a lot to keep up with! [**But, that's where our fantastic Contest Every Race Research Team comes into play – and we're looking for folks like you right now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71477054/432233095/-406785378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzMxNmNjOS00YzY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7yElyoKL5hJ6T838FZKZoCZjQ-emvf5JlIQYjtAtCkw=&emci=365a46b6-0d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=a7316cc9-4c69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5534179) Here's how it works:

clean_body: Jump online with other passionate volunteers! | | | | We are a well-oiled machine over here at Contest Every Race making sure no Republican goes unchallenged this cycle, but that's in large part because of folks like you. There are thousands of local races in every state, county, municipality, and jurisdiction across the country and it's a lot to keep up with! Here's how it works: 1. Sign up. 2. Jump online with other passionate volunteers for an hour or two whenever you can spare it. 3. Identify vulnerable Republicans and open seats. 4. Share the info our prospective candidates need to run! Volunteering is fun, quick, easy, and impactful – plus, you get to connect with other like-minded folks who understand what it's like to be the underdog, and are that much more determined to make progress. You can join us and make a huge difference in what we're able to accomplish for the remainder of this year and next. Let's bring competitive Democratic candidates to every race everywhere! name: Eric Swalwell (via RBG)
subject: In the dead of night (!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee...
| Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please [click here](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2025%2E564421%2E__fvUi). If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.ronbegone.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2025%2E564421%2E__fvUi).
---
Team,

It actually happened.

In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

Kevin McCarthy is obsessed with me. Why? _Because I have worked tirelessly to bring the American people the truth about the January 6th attack on our democracy._

Kevin McCarthy has a personal vendetta against us and is using his new power to attempt to silence us. But I will never back down. **That’s why we're working to fight back against these attacks.** [**Can you split a donation between my campaign and Ron Be Gone today so we can continue telling the truth about McCarthy’s corrupt, anti-democracy party? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/23014?t=9&akid=2025%2E564421%2E__fvUi) | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/23014?t=11&akid=2025%2E564421%2E__fvUi)

name: Sharice HQ
subject: Your input is critical
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Look, if we’ve seen anything over the past few weeks with the shutdown drama and speakership fight, it’s that House GOP leadership has not been focused on working families. Instead too many leaders are in Congress to grandstand and get featured on cable news.

**That’s not why Sharice is in Congress. Instead, she is determined to continue to deliver results for Kansan families every day—working across the aisle to get it done.**

But National Republicans view KS-03 as they’re key to expanding their slim House majority and have just launched even more attacks against us.

**_[That’s why we need to hear from you as we prepare our response: What issue is most important to you as you think about 2024’s election? Answer our fall priorities survey by the end of this week→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71477343/432233949/-853054107?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231012_SV_fall_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_fallpriorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzNjNDBhYi00ZDY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7en9BRVIO38BBjmQ8bMisTuTjnc08cRZbMZjUn1iHNk=&emci=ff3143a5-4d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8c3c40ab-4d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71477344/432233950/-853054107?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231012_SV_fall_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_fallpriorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzNjNDBhYi00ZDY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7en9BRVIO38BBjmQ8bMisTuTjnc08cRZbMZjUn1iHNk=&emci=ff3143a5-4d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8c3c40ab-4d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

While Republicans in Congress have held up a lot of our work with partisan bickering, Sharice has spearheaded adding clean energy jobs, fought for reproductive freedom, as well as federal funds for affordable rural housing, federal grants to improve maternal health outcomes especially for those from disadvantaged backgrounds, and so much more.

Sharice delivers but we know we need to put in the work right now to ensure Kansas families know it—and hear it before they hear the NRCC attacks.

2024 is right around the corner and it will not be any easier than 2022’s tough race. Your input is critical to help lead us on the path to regaining our House majority runs right through KS-03.

**_[Make your voice heard today and let Sharice know what’s driving you to act. We need 1,000 responses before midnight tomorrow to be representative of our supporters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71477345/432233951/-853054107?source=EM_NBI_SD_20231012_SV_fall_1.1_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_fallpriorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzNjNDBhYi00ZDY5LWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7en9BRVIO38BBjmQ8bMisTuTjnc08cRZbMZjUn1iHNk=&emci=ff3143a5-4d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=8c3c40ab-4d69-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_**

— Sharice HQ

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: Donald Trump 🤝 Kari Lake
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We need a huge day. Ruben needs to raise millions of dollars to beat both Lake and Sinema.
#

Peter -
It’s been a busy month already, and we’re not even halfway through. If you have a minute, let us explain:
**FIRST:** After months of preparation, Kari Lake announced her campaign for the U.S. Senate on October 10th. She has done untold damage to our democracy with her lies and conspiracies. She has called for political violence in defense of Trump. And she has called for a complete and total ban on abortion.
**THEN:** This happened.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231012-2&t=1&akid=1327%2E734936%2E7WCGG9)
Trump’s endorsement is a strong signal to the MAGA faithful. She will raise untold sums thanks to Trump, and she will have a built-in network of hundreds of thousands of supporters after this endorsement. She will use that money and those supporters to beat Ruben.
**NOW:** We need a huge day. Ruben needs to raise millions of dollars to beat both Lake and Sinema. After a tough few months, we need everyone to come together and back Ruben today — for Arizona, for the Senate, and for our democracy.
If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d reach our goals today and have the resources we need to win this race.
But not everyone does give. Which is why we need people who understand the stakes of this race; who understand how important this Senate race is; who understand how important grassroots donations are to our campaign — to chip in.
Can you?
[**Please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate after Lake’s campaign launch. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and your support will get us back on track.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231012-2&t=2&akid=1327%2E734936%2E7WCGG9)

Which is why we need people who understand the stakes of this race; who understand how important this Senate race is; who understand how important grassroots donations are to our campaign — to chip in. Can you? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for making this email the one you give to. It means a lot. \- Ruben Gallego for Arizona Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: DeAnna Alvarez
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
Hello Peter!

My name is DeAnna Alvarez, and I’ve just joined Team Terán as Raquel’s new campaign manager! I’ve been taking the past two weeks to get up to speed, and let me just say: WOW! I am so inspired with the grassroots support our campaign has amassed so far.

And now is the time to capitalize on that momentum and keep the campaign moving forward. Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can right now? >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_101223_deanna&amount=15

We know this is going to be a long, hard campaign. Every dollar counts – especially since our campaign doesn’t take any support from corporate PACs. But we have something better – you! That’s why I’m so proud to join Team Terán: we are a people-powered campaign working to get the representation we deserve in Congress.

So, I just wanted to say thank you so much for being on Team Terán. I can’t wait to take this journey with you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_101223_deanna]

Let's make history!
DeAnna Alvarez

Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.

She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.

Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_101223_deanna]

clean_body: | | | Peter, I have to be honest with you - last month, we failed to reach our mid-month fundraising goal. And right now, we’re set to miss it again. With Democrats prepared to spend MILLIONS against me, I’m counting on you to help me reach this critical goal so we can take back the majority and defend this seat. With the Democrats’ razor-thin margins, we have a real chance at taking back our majority next year. But that means we can’t afford to lose a SINGLE SEAT, especially one as important as Florida. Right now, we need to show the Left that we came here to fight, and that we’ll NEVER back down. name: Jessica
subject: Fwd: Your record stood out -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Will you take a look at this before my meeting?
Hi friend -- It’s Jessica, Deputy Executive Director at the DSCC.

I’m about to head into an urgent meeting with Christie to review our strategy for the upcoming Senate elections. **But we're missing your response to our Focus Group, and we won't be able to make _critical_ decisions for next year until we have your input!**

**Without your help, we could miss the mark and even lose the Senate -- so please, before my meeting:** [**Will you join the Focus Group by taking a quick survey so I can show Christie real advice from Democrats like you? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15887?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231012-Jessica-BumpChristieFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231012-Jessica-BumpChristieFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12234%2E9716520%2E_EjjWl)

| | [JOIN FOCUS GROUP](https://go.dscc.org/go/15887?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231012-Jessica-BumpChristieFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231012-Jessica-BumpChristieFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12234%2E9716520%2E_EjjWl)
---

Thanks so much for your help,

Jessica
Deputy Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\------ Forwarded message ------
From: Christie
Date: Oct 7, 2023
Subject: Your record stood out -
| | | Hi team -- Christie here, Executive Director of the DSCC. When I looked through our past survey responses, I was very impressed with your level of enthusiasm. In fact, you were **more active than 90 percent of Democrats in our database!**

We defied history and _expanded_ our Senate majority last year because we partnered with folks like you. Now, we NEED your help to do it again.

We're launching a high-priority focus group that's ONLY open to Democrats who've proven their commitment to winning -- **and you’re in the top 10% of Democrats who made the cut. So please, accept your invitation by taking this survey right away:

[www.dscc.org/GrassrootsDemocraticStrategists/#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/15887?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231012-Jessica-BumpChristieFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231012-Jessica-BumpChristieFocusGroup-ETG-sl1&akid=12234%2E9716520%2E_EjjWl)**

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
Executive Director, DSCC
---

| Hi, Jane Fonda here.

We are in the last stretch of the year, and it’s important to remember that _**we all have a stake in this movement to protect our planet.**_

I wish we didn’t have to ask you to part with your hard-earned money, but our ability to support climate champions is powered by your support of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.

Every day, I’m proud to be a part of this movement as we do the most important work of our lifetime with you on our side. Your support amplifies our efforts to do whatever it takes to defeat the fossil fuel industry and ensure a livable future on this planet.

Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. Peter,

With the Republican House Speaker Kevin McCarthy ousted, the last thing we need is _more_ chaos in Washington. What we do need is open communication and agreements on how our nation should move forward.

However, Congressman Lawler disagrees. See for yourself: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71478057/432236347/-1721597581?amount=10&refcode=AU_LWG_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231012_PM_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY2YjAwYzAtNTA2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sraJ1eVo0gezYQ4c96W5MjgmlkjTnIfwy-u7FoTIOFk=) _“Frankly, I’m not sure where they (GOP who voted to oust the Speaker) stand at this point. They’ve proven themselves to be unwilling to work as a team.”_ Unlike Lawler, Liz knows that working as a team doesn’t mean you have to pick sides, it means finding common ground for all Americans to uplift their values.

[Peter, will you contribute today to help Liz gather the resources needed for her campaign to stay on track so that we can remove a self-centered extremist from his seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71478058/432236348/-1721597581?amount=10&refcode=AU_LWG_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231012_PM_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY2YjAwYzAtNTA2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sraJ1eVo0gezYQ4c96W5MjgmlkjTnIfwy-u7FoTIOFk=) | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71478059/432236349/-1721597581?amount=10&refcode=AU_LWG_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231012_PM_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWY2YjAwYzAtNTA2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sraJ1eVo0gezYQ4c96W5MjgmlkjTnIfwy-u7FoTIOFk=)

What we do need is open communication and agreements on how our nation should move forward. However, Congressman Lawler disagrees. See for yourself: = “Frankly, I’m not sure where they (GOP who voted to oust the Speaker) stand at this point. They’ve proven themselves to be unwilling to work as a team.” Unlike Lawler, Liz knows that working as a team doesn’t mean you have to pick sides, it means finding common ground for all Americans to uplift their values. = | | = Liz encourages you to listen to what Congressman Lawler has to say about the state of our country and decide for yourself if your values align with his. Liz envisions New York’s 17th Congressional District as a safe middle ground for people to come to an agreement — not a place where an us vs. them mentality halts progress. = Together, Team Liz = | Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom with a lifelong commitment to public service. Liz served on her local school board overseeing over a $100 million budget, working to improve school facilities and finding common ground to get things done for our kids. Liz is running for Congress to make the Hudson Valley more affordable, help small businesses thrive, and always fight for women’s rights.** PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY PO BOX 733 GOLDENS BRIDGE, NY 10526 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Team Pramila
subject: A track record of chaos and disregard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now is the time to uplift real leaders who are determined to make change, not only for their constituents but also for all of our communities.
#
Peter, it’s clear: Republicans cannot govern.
Their track record of chaos and disregard for the public has been a longstanding pillar of the Republican Party.
The GOP circus would be entertaining if only their actions didn’t have very real and damaging consequences for the American people. **Our democracy cannot afford to waste one more moment on their antics.**
**Pramila is ready to put pressure on the bad actors who are wasting our time and resources in Congress. But it’s up to us to keep up the pressure at the grassroots level, especially in these last few months of 2023.**
**[If you are able, please consider chipping in $3 or more to help power our collective work to build the democracy we deserve.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46144?refcode=em20231012-3028&t=1&akid=3028%2E420207%2EDXXNQx)**
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46144?refcode=em20231012-3028&t=20&akid=3028%2E420207%2EDXXNQx)**
After last week’s move to remove Speaker McCarthy from his seat, Republicans like Majorie Taylor Greene are already preparing a list of extremist “red-lines'' to further attack our values and undermine our ability to govern once a new speaker is elected.
**Meanwhile, the House Committee on Oversight and Reform is now shifting their focus to baseless impeachment hearings against President Biden to further waste our time.**
Now is the time to uplift real leaders who are determined to make change, not only for their constituents but also for all of our communities. **And we know Pramila is that leader.**
**[Chip in today to stand with Pramila and our collective progressive movement as we fight back against the chaos of the Republican Party.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46144?refcode=em20231012-3028&t=21&akid=3028%2E420207%2EDXXNQx)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Rashida needs your urgent support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Rashida Tlaib is facing disgusting attacks from Republicans for calling
for a ceasefire from both the Israeli army and Hamas and mourning the loss
of innocent Palestinians alongside Israelis.

Now, a Republican member of Congress just introduced a resolution to
censure Rashida. Rashida is being targeted for one thing only: being the
only Palestinian American member of Congress. While she is being attacked
for centering the human rights of all innocent people, her family in
Palestine is living through the horrors of the Israeli military’s violent
retaliation.

We know that right-wing groups will spend heavily against Rashida this
cycle and we need to make sure she has the resources to win re-election.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138933?refcode=em20231012-31295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=31295%2E1203867%2EZCXA_Y ]Peter, please
join us in supporting Rashida against this racist attack by donating
$3 to her re-election campaign right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138933?refcode=em20231012-31295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31295%2E1203867%2EZCXA_Y ]Contribute $3

Rashida has taken courageous political stances time and time again,
fighting for foreign policy based on shared humanity. But now she’s facing
attacks for calling for peace and de-escalation—instead of being the drums
of war like the Biden administration and Washington’s foreign policy
establishment.

Peter, we need
to come together to show Rashida that she is not alone in her just
struggle for peace for all people.

Real people are caught in the crossfire of this devastating war. Congress
depends on diverse voices and lived experience and Rashida brings her full
life, history, and understanding of what's at stake for everyone.

We need Rashida’s voice in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138933?refcode=em20231012-31295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=31295%2E1203867%2EZCXA_Y ]Let’s make sure Rashida has the resources to fight back against these
attacks coming her way. If you stand with Rashida, please contribute
$3 directly to her campaign right now.

Thank you so much for your solidarity,

Team JD

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231012-31295-footer&t=1022&refcode2=31295_1203867_ZCXA_Y&akid=31295%2E1203867%2EZCXA_Y

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=31295%2E1203867%2EZCXA_Y

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Tommy Tuberville
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tommy Tuberville is blocking ALL military nominations and promotions in the Senate.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1316%2E35263%2EqyJxhP)
Peter, we need to have a conversation about Tommy Tuberville. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2309_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1316%2E35263%2EqyJxhP) In case you missed it, Republican Senator Tommy Tuberville from Alabama is leading a months-long political stunt to block ALL military nominations and promotions from advancing in the Senate. **Senator Tuberville is harming our troops and helping our adversaries, all for political gain.** _It’s all part of the GOP’s ongoing efforts to control women’s bodies, as Tuberville protests the Pentagon’s policy on reproductive health care._ If Tuberville believes that stopping women servicemembers from controlling their own bodies is worth risking our national security and hurting our military families, then he is sorely mistaken. **I’m speaking out today against Senator Tuberville’s dangerous, mistaken charade and calling on him to end this blockade, and I’m asking you to join me:** **[Will you sign my petition demanding that Tommy Tuberville stop using these critical military nominations as political pawns?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2309_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1316%2E35263%2EqyJxhP)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2309_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231012_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1316%2E35263%2EqyJxhP)
---
Thanks for speaking out alongside me.
— Tammy

clean_body: President Trump’s SEAL OF APPROVAL. You really should see this. | Friend, President Donald J. Trump has granted us his OFFICIAL "Seal of Approval." The purpose of this Seal is to help President Trump's supporters recognize which candidates have his support. It is intended to protect the President's donors and supporters, LIKE YOURSELF, from illegitimate organizations falsely claiming some affiliation with President Trump and his campaign. Some candidates, PACs, and other entities are trying to use the President's likeness to facilitate donations from America First patriots. To fight this, the "Seal of Approval" is a powerful signal to President Trump's loyal donors that the sender is on Team Trump and is not a scammer. We're reaching out to you to give you the exclusive opportunity to contribute to the America First Movement. | Best, The America First Movement Team Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: nuestra comunidad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
we can win a better future for our state
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71478585/432238161/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk185-fr-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM3ZmM2MTItNTM2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5d2vwO7SRBPyvq1cgV1McEMw5VAARkXQJeKyE9IDG28=)
---
Friend, I have dedicated my career to one purpose: fighting for Florida and _**nuestra comunidad** — our community._
When I was 14, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador to find more opportunities and a better life in the United States. Like thousands of other immigrants across our country, we made a new home, seeking our own American dream, _**un sueño que muchos de nuestras comunidades han deseado** — a dream that many of our communities have desired._
My mother worked double shifts to afford rent in our small one room apartment and took English classes at night. My part-time job at a local doughnut shop helped her make ends meet. **It wasn't easy, but the promise of America held true for my family. **I graduated college, found purpose with nonprofits across our state, worked to expand health care access for our community at Florida International University, and represented south Florida as our nation's first South American immigrant elected to Congress.
My story is only possible in America. But today, the people in power are pushing our state backward and attacking all of the opportunities that made my story possible. They're leading with extremism, partisanship, and division. **That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott and build a better future for families in the Sunshine State.**
As I meet voters and lay the groundwork for a successful campaign, I'm fighting for the issues that really matter to our communities — lowering housing costs, protecting families from gun violence, and ending the division that's tearing our state and our country apart.
**I know that if we unite as one, our community — _nuestra comunidad_ — has the power to win the change we need. **[That's why I'm personally asking you to join my campaign by making a $5 donation to flip our state blue and give our families the leadership we deserve. It would mean so much to have your support — and you have my word that I will put your donation to good use.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71478588/432238165/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk185-fr-fl&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM3ZmM2MTItNTM2OS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5d2vwO7SRBPyvq1cgV1McEMw5VAARkXQJeKyE9IDG28=)

Huerta co-founded the National Farmworkers Association with César Chávez in 1962. It later became the United Farm Workers and the largest farm worker organization in the U.S.

Together, they led a national grape boycott, which secured better and safer work practices for farmworkers in California. Through the United Farm Workers, Huerta secured better wages and working conditions for farmworkers across the nation and built a foundation for robust workers’ rights.

**As workers of all industries strike to demand fair pay and better working conditions, we look to labor champions like Dolores Huerta to guide our efforts.**

-Team Sánchez

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Jim Jordan for Speaker
